room was small  staff were so helpful I left a pair of jeans behind by mistake and they posted them to me Location perfect for business in london 3 minutes walk from tube Breakfast buffet was very good Room was a bit small but fine for one

That despite ringing in the afternoon to discuss my arrival I was not told the room was not available because of refurbishment I was then moved to another hotel the Park Grand Didn t like the noise of heating and not able to regulate it properly   The room at Park Grand where I was moved was small but comfortable Breakfast provided because of inconvenience which was good Noise control was good Newly refurbished bathroom very nice Good location

The floor space in the rooms is sooooooooooooooooooooooooooooo small You can barely move Nowhere to store a case Something was broken in the bathroom The remote control did not work so we could not watch the television The pillows were unbearably hard and uncomfortable   I liked the style of the bedrooms Everything seemed fresh and modern The location is outstanding Great for a short stay
At first we had a small room with the view to the wall outside After asking for another room we got a nice little bit bigger one with street view Nice staff great place
The room is so small and the facilities are a bit old During my stay the lighting and electric plug also have problem   The location is perfect just 2 mins walk from tube station

had to change room due to damp on wall 2nd room club room Had not been checked properly as window been jammed open with pillowcase causing room to be cold Then we had water dripping from above but to be fair were move again to another room which was OK   staff very pleasant and helpful

The room could be a bit bigger   Staff was very friendly welcoming and the location of the hotel was really good 5minutes away from the station We got an upgraded room as well which was a nice surprise Really nice room with welcoming staff who are willing to go an extra miles

All good unless you are on a diet   Free fruit box of chocolates half bottle of wine and soft drinks with club room the hotel also gives chocolates every day on the pillows Nice room very clean good shower
bed could have been perhaps slightly bigger  Fruits and chocolates for guests free wifi of course clean and friendly extremely close to the station Thats all would definitely go back

The room although we were told was an upgrade to Club Class was very small The noise from the air conditioning units outside the window was very loud even with the windows closed in addition the noise from the toilet above the room off of the stairway was very disturbing particularly at 03 00 am waking us up The room was very stuffy and because of the noise from outside the windows could not remain open and the air conditioning within the room was far to noisy to have switched on On reporting the problem we were told that we were in the biggest room they had and that we could be moved into a smaller one needless to say we stayed where we were and put up with inconvenience Although the location suited our requirements for this trip we would not repeat the experience  The service from the staff was excellent and the location could not have been better 1 block from the subway station and Hyde Park

We got given a free upgrade but it certainly didn t feel like it would have been much better than any of the other rooms Our view was of a concrete wall with the air conditioning condensers right outside made it very difficult to sleep The pillows were either extremely flat or way too big The remote didn t turn the T V on but worked for changing channel etc If they never said it was a free upgrade I probably wouldn t have had a problem with these things   Room was clean and tidy It was one block away from subway station which made it handy to get around and the staff was nice and friendly
The rooms in the hotel are very small compared to other 4 stars hotel   The females receptioest were very helpful especially whose called Enrika I would recommend it for short stay in London

Staff told you to sit down instead of queueing when we arrived to check in however failed to call you after others stood in the queue and ended up being served before us even though we had already been waiting longer Breakfast charge is too much for what it is  Location

room bathroom exceptionally small practically no room for two people to move around or to dress at the same time hand towel rack towel hooks placed too high for practical use for someone 5 foot tall  bed was good personnel were always friendly accommodating as possible but we would most likely not book again here
The room could have been bigger room for a comfortable chair would be good   The bed was very comfortable and the room was very well presented but very small The breakfast was very good

Nothing  This hotel is in an excellent location Bayswater station is around 100m away The club room we had was a little small but was perfect for our stay the bed was very comfy and the bathroom was lovely We would definitely stay here again

The room was incredibly tiny to the point where you couldn t open the door of the minibar because the bed was in the way The AC made a terrible noise on the last night and we had to turn it off to be able to sleep but then the room got really hot Staff was nice and helpful but there was one night when we wanted to order some food and a bottle of water and they ordered a pizza for us and told us we could have water from the reception If we had ordered the water it would have cost 2 instead we got water from the reception and paid 4 The photos on Booking com show a basket of fruit for the kind of room we booked and there was no such thing   The staff was nice and the hotel s location was pretty great
no food when i called room service I asked for a smoking room but wasnt informed they have all no smoking still waiting for a refund of full money paid  location
Room was small but I think this normal in England  They made check in early even before 8am which was great thing for me in addition clean room and the breakfast was not bad
Room was way too small for 2 people to be in   Bed comfy room clean good quality shower products Staff were very polite and helpful especially when we had a problem with smell
So clean Great location Love the little tray with tea coffee hot chocolate sachets and biscuits Lovely staff Possible to hold luggage before check in and after check out

There was a stuffy smell which they could do away with by using nice air freshners  Location is great Was upgraded to a bigger room which wasnt too big but was good so not sure about regular room sizes

Our room 102 was above the foyer and you could hear the music playing in the foyer through the night which made it difficult to sleep to be fair They did turn it off when I spoke to them at 1am   Room was well equipped and although fairly small was fine for our needs staff very helpful and friendly
Room a little noisy  Room v small but v comfortable Staff were incredibly friendly and helpful Every interaction they just did that little extra They could teach my staff a thing or two

More information in rooms in terms of offered facilities   Excellent cascade shower everything quiet cosy and comfortable Staff couldn t have been more helpful even offering an umbrella as it was chucking it down

I couldn t fault it in any way   Really down to the helpfulness of Lina the manager and her staff I booked at the last minute on Valentine s Day and I could see that the hotel was busy but despite this I got excellent service and upgraded to a room with a bath tub without any fuss as my arm was in a plaster cast at the time Also new mattresses and carpets in rooms and 2 minute walk to the tube station

No bathroom vanity just the sink nowhere to place your stuff but this is just a trifle Could hear the neighbours sometimes  Nice looking room though pretty small but comfortable Clean soft bed kettle microwave wine glasses fridge for those who need them Close to the tube

Room could have been bigger very small for a double it was okay for me as a single occupier but bathroom and bedroom very small and a view of a dirty brick wall outside my window   Closeness to Bayswater a Tube station
A little bit of traffic noise as window quite old Room was a little small but very comfy  We were pleasantly surprised by fruit chocs wine and soft drinks in our room and there was also a microwave
Room was so small but did it s purpose USB port in our room was not working   The room was clean and tidy staff are all very helpful Very close to underground station

Front desk staff and bellhop were extremely helpful Good location for shopping on Oxford St and only 30 mins to Heathrow My daughter claims this hotel has the best shower she has ever had in any hotel she has ever stayed Thailand USA and UK

The window was not very sound proof and it was a little noisy outside in the evening otherwise everthing was all right   The hotel has a lovely London style atmosphere The room was exactly like on the pictures if not a little more spacious very comfortable clean and had excellent wifi The staff is extremely friendly and helpful they packed me some breakfast since I left the hotel early The location is perfect next to Hyde Park and a few minutes walk from the metro station Bayswater

Where to begin The rooms are tiny I stayed in a single room and it was by far the smallest hotel room I have ever experienced The single bed was not full size and I could not lie down entirely The Wardrobe that reduced the size of the bed would not open fully as there was a wall in the way and did not have capacity to hang a suit and shirt The staff were incompetent My business trip plans changed a number of weeks in advance of the stay As such I would be staying for 1 rather than 2 nights When I informed the hotel of my change in plans weeks in advance of my stay they advised that the extra night could not be refunded as I had selected an advance purchase rate This is a fair position however when I suggested that perhaps there was something else they could do for me upgrade room for 1 night etc as I would be paying for 2 nights but only staying for 1 I was simply told no Very poor customer service and they simply sought to take advantage of the change in my plans without thought for the customers position Upon arrival I sought to pay with the business card that I had used to book the hotel The staff were unable to facilitate this and I had to use my personal card to pay for the 2 nights of which I only used 1 on my personal card Again the staff were extremely unhelpful Upon proceedings to check out after 1 night the reception staff could not understand that I was not staying the second night despite the fact that I had advised the hotel weeks in advance and at check in that I would only be staying 1 night The staff at check out were unable to provide an invoice for my stay and were again entirely unhelpful to the situation The hotel needs to invest in staff training as a matter of urgency in addition to review of the room size and layout My one night was simply an awful experience and I will not be returning   Location is good and close to 2 Tube stations

False advertising on hotel part The hotel and room I was assigned to was totally different from what was advertised The hotel staff only informed me that my room will not be at Shaftesbury but at another hotel a few blocks down after I have made my payment for the 3 nights I could not back out at that point in time Very sly and totally not professional Booking com shouldnt allow such establishments to advertise there As a consumer I felt totally cheated And the room was very narrow that I could not even open my luggage properly Otherwise room was clean A very bad first booking with booking com Certainly not worth the money I paid for   Nothing really

Standard rooms are VERY small there is no space to hang a long coat and even a medium size suitcase will just fit between the end of the bed and the wall   Excellent location just off Hyde Park with two tube stations within one minute walk Complimentary fruit in the lobby is healthy and a nice touch

The room 123 was kinda small even the bed was small No place to leave a heavy luggage we were forced to leave the luggage infront of the bathroom door and each time we had to push it away just to get in the smell at the hall the view from the window   Friendly staff fantastic location 1 min away from bayswater tube station Clean room with very good bathroom facilities The breakfast was delicious but there was not much variety of goods Strong wifi signal

I recommend those travelers who want a good basic hotel in a good location I have staid here multiple times on my trips to London and for its price range it really holds up well The staff are friendly the rooms are comfortable and its easy to get to There are also a lot of restaurants etc if you want them

The TV was poor no Radio 2 available and very limited channels Would prefer more coffee sachets   Small cosy room with opening windows The character of the building made us feel real Londoners not in a glass and claustrophobic impersonal hotel The location was amazingly convenient whether you needed the Underground bus or a good healthy walk in the parks Surrounded by a good choice of eateries and pubs The free shampoos lotions hairdryer and even a toothbrush and toothpaste made life very comfortable
Very small room but just what we needed as a young couple we did not have much money to spend and I am extremely glad we chose this hotel The staff was very welcoming also

There was nothing not like other then I couldn t stay longer   In my opinion this hotel was perfect for our little get away together The location was amazing with Hyde park a five minute walk away and everything within an hours walking distance Lots of small lovely restaurants to pop out for lunch And the room service ham and cheese paninis are amazing

the single room size was very very very small and suffocating despite the clean new furniture the room doesnt worth its cost  The location is wonderful being less than 5 minutes away from two tube stations in addition to bus stops the area is very well serviced so you dont have to cross miles to get to a resturant a supermarket a spa or pharmacy etc the staff very friendly and informative the hotel cleaness furniture is great and new and room temprature was very good and controled the toilet is very clean and good the service was wonderful would stay there again for sure

We had a 3 person room which was nice and large But the third bed was not a real bed It would have been fine if it was for a kid but we were three adults and we paid full price for three people   Everything is clean and nice Reception very friendly and helpfull Location brilliant Wine softdrinks fruit and chocolate in the room for free Breakfast really good

None  Appreciate to have a club room to fit in the baby cot microwave to heat the baby s food milk The room was clean Location was good near to tune stations easy to get halal foods shops such as tecso sainsbury boots near by bus stops within walking distance

The only thing that comes to mind is the bolted window and a steaming hot room A C is awesome Though the draft coming through the window frame proved to be enough to cool down the room to normal temperature in an hour and provided a source of fresh air for the rest of the time   Location Nuff said

Rooms too small superior single avoid rooms located close to the noisy elevator it even rings during the night Windows open 10 inches  Great location 100 yards from Hyde Park 50 yards from Bayswater Tube station and Queensway 10 min walk from Notting Hill Gate Staff EXTREMELY nice helpful and efficient Very good value for the price

Room was a bit too small for two adults and a toddler   The little touches like a packet of biscuits every day made me smile Location was excellent and our room had a nice view Bed was comfy but the room WAS on the small side but this is London after all The staff were friendly and helpful

Not a lot of extra space in the room but wouldn t expect a big room in central London   Staff very friendly and helpful Lovely clean bathroom with power shower Lots of tea coffee hot chocolate and biscuits Microwave and fridge in room very useful Stones throw from tube and 5 min walk from Kensington

The hotel was in a great location Nice and quiet at night but just round corner from bars and shops Very clean and the bed comfy Room was small but very nicely decorated Would have struggled in there with a big case Would def go again
Wasn t aware no evening restaurant on site normally stay at another hotel in the same family of hotels   Good location very comfortable room was upgraded to club

No more gym here they should remove the picture from site That s the only disappointment   Excellent location bayswater train station and Queensway train station is just in front of hotel Victoria line and central line Can t ask for more Staffs are very helpful especially Erika and Anu Surrounding have many great food and 3 mini supermarket and an Oriental minimart Is near Notting hill portobello market a must go on Saturday any craving for Chinese food Four Seasons just 2 mins walk opposite bayswater station

The room that we ve stayed in was quite small In fact so small that it required some coordination from us to get around it However it is very cosy and nice   The staff is excellent friendly and helpful

Rooms and hotel in general is very dated wouldn t have paid more than what I did for it   I paid 88 00 for the night which in London is cheap Tea and coffee facilities in the room and a fridge which was handy If you re staying more than one night then probably not for you as the rooms are small We stayed for one night as we were seeing a show and having the Saturday and Sunday day time sight seeing so the room was fit for purpose in that respect just somewhere to lay your head
very small room they didn t change the billow s cover but I would recommend it   perfect location new furniture and toilet i like the lights in toilet

I stayed in this hotel for a weekend away with my partner and some friends it was brilliant that they hold your bags for you before you can check in and when you check out This is a lovely hotel however we was given a single room the beds are nothing like the pictures we got given a single bed for two and they refused to do anything about it I had an awful nights sleep my two friends were transferred to the shaftesbury premier because of electrical faults in there room and that was much better than this one

Location is great 5min walk to hyde park 1min to circle and district lines bayswater station In two mins walk there are supermarket and places to eat Clean modernly furnished rooms friendly and helpful staff
OK The room was very small   Although small the room was perfectly comfortable The staff were open hospitable and welcoming Great location to explore Central London

Hairdryer in room 407 needs to be changed There should be TV channels from different countries The view from the window is depressing We could hear the sound of the washing machine every morning from 9 o clock Booking com please update the breakfast section as it actually costs 15 12 if one pre pays the day before   The hotel is located within 2 minutes walk to Bayswater Station and 3 minutes walk to Queensway Station Helpful staff The deluxe room is very cosy and comfy but extremely small 9 square metre for a couple

The staff were exceptionally friendly and helpful Great location just a 1 minute walk to the tube station Restaurants and grocery stores close by Made for an Excellent trip

Room gets a bit stuffy after a while ant the airconditioning unit was blowing cold air even when switched off Had difficulty in switching on the airconditioning   Clean room

I stayed with my sister last week and we had two single rooms which were also used as doubles I would not have like to have shared it as a double as it was very small We enjoyed our stay and would use again The staff were very friendly and helpfull

Location to Paddiggton Station Hyde Park public transportation was extremely convienent and felt as a safe area to stay while traveling alone

The room was really tiny even by London standard Did not even have the space to open a suitcase properly Only good with people with a backpack and stay for one night   location staff

Small room not uncommon in London Fairly small bed for two people Limited storage space  Great Location esp for Hyde Park Friendly helpful Staff Clean and well looked after Rooms Quiet no street noise Everything in good working order

just that the WiFi kept login out when your device is idle But the speed was great Not bad at all you just have to re login everytime   The staff were just amazing great hospitality I was blown away by their niceness especially Enrika and andrea

The receptionist in the sister hotel was very emberast but very nice to us and gave us a complimentary taxi to Oxford street who sadly got lost As my partner was very distressed by the whole expireance   Nothing to like we was not give the chance to see the room as we were informed by a very unfriendly receptionist they had double booked our room and we was put in thier sister hotel on the otherside of the road this was NOT a 4 star hotel The room we changed as soon as we saw it as It was not fit to stay in the second room we had was not a lot better the room was about 11foot square with steep steps into the room As this was supposed to have been a special occasion for us and we were also assured this room was an upgrade the whole event was laughable sadly and we felt very let down by Shaftesbury Hyde Park Hotel

First of all the rooms were too small There is no sofa or chair to sit If you open your suitcase on the floor you literaly no place to walk around so you have to jump over it The bed is too small for two people that was really uncomfortable with the worst thing in London was this hotel There is no place to hang your towel in the bathroom and that s just one example to emphasize the size Breakfast room is in the basement so there is no windows   I would say only the stuff is great they are helpful nice location if you re interested in Hyde Park but if you wanna go the other side of the town you have to walk quite a long way or taka tube from bayswater If first time in London you should stay Knightsbridge site where museums closer

Breakfast seemed very expensive and there is no facility to have an evening meal a very small bar in hotel lobby but felt a bit awkward   The location was perfect and good value for money Staff were very helpful
The hotel was fab and more than I expected the location is great 2 mins walk from Bayswater tube station and Kensington Park and 30 mins walk to Marble Arch

Small rooms on Ground Floor Much noise from the floor above A bit cold until we found out that we could run the heat our self Cold bathroom   Excellent staff Hurray for the breakfast Very nice hotel with tradition
The single room I got was a bit too small and the staircase to the room was bit difficult with my suitcase   The staff at receiption are very friendly and helpful

size of the room was tiny i expected a small room due to the location but there weren t even a full size double bed which was not indicated when i booked otherwise i would not have book my partner is over 6ft tall so this was less than ideal   very close to Bayswater underground easy to get around London and see all the sights

Unknowledgeable staff rooms very small absolutely different to the picture no space in the bathroom at all what type of the bar it is breakfast not included in rate too expensive for that type of room and service tried to charge me twice preauthorised all and still charged me 2 nd time hassle to return the money hotel has duty manager only no general manager who to contact housekeeping entered the room without knocking no apology just run away did not feel safe as doors were opened and nobody was there reception said probably it was housekeeping how can i know that and room smelled bad from previous guest cleaning very poor other guest hairs on my bathroom rubber mat horrible dirty furniture needs upgrade missing shelves in lockers tv scratched wifi had to log on all the time did not stay connected Overally i would not suggest anybody to stay there and i would never return there kind regards  Only location

I stayed here twice in 1 room the wifi was v good in another it was a bit patchy   Room was cozy and bathroom very good modern and clean Overall very happy
The room was small  The hotel is pretty good located and it is not expensive in comparison with other hotels in the area The room is clean and the WIFI connection works perfectly

Room was very small and that was with upgrade Only complaint   Clean Nice location Only small and very quiet Breakfast was very nice if a little steep

The first thing I didn t like was that there wasn t one room available upon check in at 11am on a Saturday morning but it was Carnival weekend so I understand they were busy The main thing that I didn t like was that after I did check in that they try to stick you in the worst room first When you ask to change they stick you in another room I went from the back alley room off the lobby to the 3rd floor room next to the elevator It was just annoying that they do that especially as a solo female traveler I read other reviews where they did the same thing to others I think it s really bad hospitality They told me I could look at a third room but by that time I was just annoyed and thankfully the room next to the elevator was quiet You couldn t hear it and there wasn t a lot of people or loud people constantly using it so it was easy to sleep through the night   The location is excellent As a solo traveler being able to walk to sites or take the Tube from either stop was amazing The London sights are so much more spread out than I thought so even if you aren t staying right in the city center it s convenient The room was small but clean and comfortable for one person A couple might want to get a larger room but if you re on a tight budget it s manageable If you re there to just sleep after a long day of sightseeing then it s great The bathroom is also modern which is nice

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Myself and my girlfriend had a wonderful overnight stay It was a special occasion and the staff went the extra mile to ensure we were extremely well looked after The bedroom suite was luxurious and the hotel itself was perfect from the decor to the amenities we could not fault it The adjoining pub serves great beer and food We enjoyed lunch there the following day before departing I have stayed in other 5 London hotels which are pricier but did not match the level of service we received here Excellent value for money Highly recommended

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Such a comfortable place our room was exceptional and the staff so very attentive I would definitely stay again and highly recommend the hotel and their facilities

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: I was traveling there for wireless festival which started at 2pm the same time as check in I called ahead days previous and asked for an earlier check in so we could get changed after travelling I was told this would be arranged When I arrived i had no room ready and the staff on the front desk weren t very accommodating with regards to the reason it was needed   The room was stunning bed was really comfy and the size of the room was brilliant The decoration of the hotel was nice too quite grande The late check out is also a plus

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The bed was too narrow remote control for TV was not working properly mini bar food was out as if they were free of charge until I checked the price list  check in speed of lifts sitting area in house umbrellas

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The bed is unreasonably high  The hotel is located next to Barbican Centre with a lot of nice bars and restaurants though of course they come a bit pricy

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: I honestly can not remember something that caught my attention   The staff here are simply excellent and always willing to go the extra mile to make ones stay as comfortable as possible This is my third stay here and I will certainly go back

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Well there is rather a lot I didn t like Firstly my room was flipping miles away It was in a separate wing I had to be escorted there up the lift to the first floor walk for miles across a footbridge find another lift up to the fourth floor walk for miles again Getting back to reception was a nightmare I went a different way every time and often in circles I know women have no sense of direction allegedly but this was ridiculous Then I was in a very small room with a chipped bath tiny dirty windows loose electrical parts hanging down in the wardrobe and dusty Instead of hanging a do not disturb on the door there is a small touch panel you are supposed to press near the bathroom that says if you want to be cleaned or not I didn t even know it was there no instructions anywhere and must have pressed it in the night unseen so they didn t even clean my room on day 2 The bathroom has the most complicated set up with no taps and an automatic bathplug that has to be prised out with your fingers as it doesn t work So you gingerly twist a chrome blob and the hand shower whacks you in the face full pelt No instructions anywhere and you shouldn t need a manual to run a bath All the surfaces in this tiny room were covered with things to make you spend more money I don t need four wine glasses menus corkscrews bottles of wine tubs of nuts etc etc The fridge is full of overpriced alcohol that I don t want How about putting a small carton of fresh milk in there Montcalm And reception is full of snooty staff who can t break a smile and don t even ask you how your stay went All this joy for 240 a night without breakfast Unfortunately I have to stay there again as my company is hosting an event and we will be taking 30 rooms It had better improve or there will be fireworks   A comfortable bed Black pudding croquettes in the Jugged Hare

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Unfortunately there isn t a 24 hour bar and the Juggged Hare next door closes too early  Very clean comfortable and great value Staff are always friendly and the location is perfect

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Original double bed very small with mattress overhanging Base Booking com said it would be kingsize but hotel said double They did change us to kingsize though Lay out of bathroom odd few shelves and had to put everything on floor Air conditioning came on in middle of night both nights even though we had turned it off Few drawers except v shallow ones which we of little use  Closeness to Barbican for theatre in Evening

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: over priced breakfast was terrible gutted we paid 45 for 2 breakfasts and a coffee   the room was gorgeous great location friendly woman on the counter

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The staff were helpful and accommodating It was one of the comfiest cleanest rooms I ve ever stayed in I had a parcel delivered and set up in my room no problems we were also upgraded because of my partners birthday

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The bathroom is really small   I requested connecting rooms but the hotel said they didn t have any The rooms we stayed in were actually connecting rooms but with the door locked One of the rooms had no bedboard

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Breakfast was too expensive but you have a lot of options in 2 5 minutes of walk 5 10 GBP full English breakfast   It was my wife anniversary so we got free upgrade to Montcalm Club room bottle of champagne and tasty chocolates Big room with 4 windows huge comfortable bad Nespresso and tea facility complimentary fresh fruits every day room and lobby friendly staff speaks Russian good and safety location 5 min to tube or 15 min to St Paul Cathedral by walk modern and pleasant design

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Check in took forever the queue was out the door Many staff were just floating about asking questions like are you checking in rather than actually checking us in The large double bed was not large in width but was very high off the ground and had a slope from middle to edges making it really uncomfortable   Location next to the Barbican Theatre

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The room was very tired in places lack of storage space places to plug things in and lack of surface space My partner also very nearly sliced the top of his little toe off from one of the wheels at the bottom of the bed lots of blood Just needs a new look over and a general refresh The toiletries were a little disappointing   Breakfast comfortable bed and sheets Friendly staff

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: For a five star hotel Parking was 10 minutes away in a complicated underground car park No one to park car for you There s no bar on premises it is a pub at the end of building Room was dark Bathroom heated towel rail didn t work Heated bathroom floor didn t work Plug in bath dint work Light on small mirror didn t work No sky channels i e Sports etc

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: I Felt that some of the Staff could have been a little more helpful than just working off a script The girls on check in seemed fine earlier in the morning but when I came back later to get my keys the Gentleman on there was so cant be bothered to be here attitude Some of the staff didn t seem genuine at all actually felt a little embarrassed around them Not the best value for the Money

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Shower was very weak Had better electric showers at uni When I go to a hotel I want a proper power shower not warm rain It also didn t get very hot Other than that it was perfect

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Nothing  Beautifully restored old building across the road from the Barbican great location for the city maybe not so much for tourists We were upgraded on arrival to a large and luxurious room with a glass panel view into the bathroom see to believe it there is a blind for the more squeamish Staff were very friendly and the in house Jugged Hare gastro Pub wonderful its is pricy but the quality of the food is top class Nearby is a sister hotel with a wonderful roof top bar and restaurant that is well worth a visit

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Stayed previously but in London City Suites part room then was much bigger than this time Because of its location some shops and cafes close at weekend as mainly for business people during the week  The staff are really welcoming and helpful The Jugged Hare does great food and only just a few steps away Really like the location if you want a quiet place in London at the weekend to stay as close to the city mile Not too far to walk to the Thames

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Overall nothing to not like   A nicely apportioned room with a comfy bed I also dined at The Jugged Hare which is associated with the hotel and found the food to be very good The menu is different to your usual fare and has a good selection of game The location of the hotel is great with everything close by and good access to public transport

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The hotel is in the financial district and is thus a little out of the way Nearby tube station though so it isn t too much of a problem Hotel bar and restaurant are really good too   My stay was excellent The staff were wonderful and the hotel itself is very well kept The decor and amenities give off a really high end vibe We were pleasantly surprised to receive a room upgrade on check in We also received a bottle of champagne after mentioning that it was the end of our honeymoon in the U K We ate at the restaurant associated with the hotel and the food was excellent I can t thank the staff enough for what a good experience we had It really made the end of our trip special

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The room was very compact and a little too small   Staff were friendly and helpful The hotel is located centrally and is a short walk from several tube stations

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The kettle in the room leaked boiling water Quite dangerous really I left a note in the room and reported the issue to reception As a gesture of goodwill the receptionist offered to waiver the cost of any minibar purchases when we departed Nice thought but I was charged anyway on my card after we left Although I would expect to pay for minibar consumption the staff should not make promises they can t keep Sorry but that s crass   Great room very comfortable bed and location perfect location for Barbican Staff friendly but see negative comment

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Can t fault this hotel Best we ve stayed at for a long time  Friendly Hotel staff upgraded our room as it was my partners Birthday They took our bags to the room for us and demonstrated how everything in there worked Beds are very comfy and we were impressed with the shower Bar restaurant next door also very friendly and do really nice food very close to the Barbican tube station which was handy

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: What is the point of that green night light in the room other than to annoy The light switches generally were insanely difficult to work out   We were very pleased to be upgraded on arrival to a studio suite which was very comfortable although located across the road in one of the several historic buildings which make up the complex The location whilst not in the centre of things and requiring a taxi to reach is a short walk for example from Broadgate Circle which has a wide range of bars and restaurants

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: There was a fair bit of road noise but I guess that s what you get in central London   Staff were excellent always with a smile and helpful The room was very well appointed and comfortable A few more amenities than you d normally expect which is a nice welcome i e fruit bottled water coffee machine etc The bed was comfortable and temperature of the room just how I like

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: They tried to send me to another associated hotel which I refused as I booked solely for the location I stood my ground and they found me a single room with a discount Not what I expected when I booked a supposed high quality hotel on the morning of my arrival If location had not been important I would have booked a budget hotel

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Apparently the hotel had been rented for a wedding party the night of our stay Our room sat over that party which lasted well over midnight The music vibrated the walls of our room keeping us from sleeping Then to add insult to injury as staff left the hotel at 5am they stood beneath our window on the street loudly visiting with each other at times yelling and joyfully screaming This lasted for at least 30 minutes They apparently failed to consider that they were standing underneath guest rooms Our window to the street was very poorly insulated and so all sound from the street was audible The next problem was the dearth of USB outlets and universal plugs We had to keep the bathroom light on all night in order to use the plug in it to charge our devices very disruptive   Nice breakfast quiet and well appointed restaurant and friendly staff

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: It s location near barbican makes it not as convenient on the underground as you would assume   Very nice and well appointed room Nice soundproofing for a good nights sleep

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: I fell quite badly as there was a step right inside the bedroom Have bruised arm and back Maybe a sign somewhere outside bedroom would have been helpful

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: For the price we paid I would expect a bathroom without mould on the ceiling Room was also very small and the bed was tiny  The staff were very helpful

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: My only suggestion would be possibly a towel hook near the sink   The friendly staff who were really helpful The WOW factor suite that we were upgraded to was outstanding The bed was so comfy I didn t want to get out of it It was our 30th wedding anniversary weekend and they certainly knew how to spoil us bubbles chocolate and strawberries on arrival And our bed turned back with towels as swans and rose petals was a lovely gesture We were truly delighted with all the surprises and will definitely be returning Outstanding

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Pillows rock hard very uncomfortable   The Bed was very good and standard of Hotel very good Staff efficient but not that friendly Bar come restaurant over priced

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Items in room were dated for the star of the hotel I would expect digital Bluetooth radio etc and the shower and bath were difficult to operate  Location

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Distance from main tourist attractions  The staff aloud us to check in early which was most accommodating as we just got of a 30 hour flight The property is a fair walk away from the main tourist attractions but there is a subway about 10 minutes walk from the hotel

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Nothing to complain about though it was a bit of a Labyrinth to get to my room Not the most interesting part of town in terms of sightseeing but that doesn t detract from the comfort or value of my stay there as The Underground is a few blocks away   Lovely accommodations close to the Liverpool Street Train Station and the Barbican with a luxurious shower and bathroom almost as large as the bedroom they even provided a cellphone and free UK US calls Wonderful comfortable and quiet with a friendly staff and nice Pub downstairs

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Better signage around the hotel so you do not get lost Also the room I stayed in had a window with an electric shutter in side the bathroom The shutter didn t work which meant while I was showering my partner was having a free show of watching me shower while she laid in bed Forgot to report this to the hotel   Staff building location room is all good

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Entrance more like a nightclub than a hotel You walk through the bar down a dark corridor to reception 5 star atmosphere lacking Tables not clean in the restaurant   Very clean Good breakfast Comfortable bed

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Air conditioning leaked and carpet was sodden We complained and once we left we were pleased with the response from the hotel and the apologies were accepted   Staff were very attentive

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Attention to detail missing I didn t have a remote for the TV in my room there were bread crumbs from the previous guest on my chair and in general the room could have been cleaner They offer a handy a smartphone for your use during the stay Would have been great had they not forgotten to charge it   Friendly staff

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Room had everything including bottled water and fruit and it was wonderfully comfortable Staff allowed me to chevk out an hour past chevk out Didi not try free phone to US Did need the French phone charger plug as I had no British adapter Very thoughtful

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: No bidet but as in English standard   an old brewery in Central London just few steps from Barbican Centre and Tube Station The Brewery was visited by Queen Elizabeth very elegant and formal but highly friendly Very large and confortable rooms silent bathroom was very large and functional In summary excellent

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: There was a rotten fruit in the fruits basket Not much amenities inside of the hotel such as pool or gym   The mobile phone handy was very helpful for us since we didn t have local phone The bed was also very comfy that I slept well very much

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: At 20 quid plus breakfast is overpriced even by London standards so we avoided Window only single glazed so a lot of street noise bins emptying wedding parties etc for a room being charged at 160 quid a night that could be better   Well presented hotel with friendly staff We were upgraded to a club room with a great comfy bed

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Initially the room we went to first was small and there was a loud noise outside in street so we couldn t sleep However very helpful staff upgraded us to a club room which was more spacious and quiet It was done quickly and we were impressed with how the staff responded Also no spa facilities for a 5 hotel unless you are a Montcalm club member and can access the ones at the other Montcalm hotel   Very stylish rooms if you like a modern style Clean and comfortable Staff were all very helpful and friendly

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Nothing  Absolutely fantastic service and staff We were checking availability dates for September before we had even checked out of the hotel The hotel even provides you with a phone which was invaluable for getting around and using as a map These little extras and fantastic service sets this hotel apart from anywhere else

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Excellent location near Barbican handy for Moorgate station Staff were fantastic always willing to help with any query Thoroughly enjoyable stay

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Wee bit off the beaten track but tube station 5minute walk away  Staff were lovely helpful nothing too much trouble complementary coffee at reception were able to leave your bags and they were in your room on your return bed so comfortable also left bags on checking out and knew they were taken good care of

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Booked as a party of 6 3 X 2 2 couples got upgraded one didnt The one that didnt got a very small room Thankfully reviewed this with the manager and compensation was provided to the couple who didnt get the upgrade   Friendly and helpful staff Very relaxed breakfast with good a la carte options

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The bath plug was broken and there wasn t a bar in the hotel I guess I should have checked this but I just thought all hotels had bars esp as it was in an old brewery   They showed us to our room which was useful as the place is a maze the staff were friendly and helpful

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: for 3 nights at over 1 000 spent there was no bottled water with the exception of the one on arrival feel this was poor when compared to Hiltons were you get bottles each day at a fraction of the price   great location and staff were very good

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: I have stayed here a couple of times and is always been excellent Staff are very friendly and the rooms are clean and comfortable Lovely place to stay would recommend

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Really struggling here but the pillows could have been a little softer   It was my wife s birthday which I mentioned to the hotel prior to arriving On arrival we were treated to a very warm welcome an upgrade and some treats in the room The staff couldn t have done any more for us on our stay in particular Gemma who was great The room was spacious club room clean and comfortable with no outside noise Location is excellent just a short walk to the nearest tube station The pub next door has a lot of character and sells a nice selection of beers

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Please open the bar the hotel is in an old brewery You have the dining rooms but the bar pub was closed   A great hotel very attentive and friendly staff The room was great large and airey well equipped a fabulous bed very little road noise The hotel has an old world charm about it but has all the comforts of 21st century Very centrally located but not to touristy By public transport this hotel is no more than 20 minutes to most of the main attractions of London

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Really spacious clean rooms We were attending a wedding nearby so didn t get a chance to make use of many facilities but everything we did encounter was great

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Having to leave after just two days   A wonderful team effort made our stay memorable for all the right reasons which was to celebrate my husbands 60th birthday Complete with a card and complimentary bottle of wine from the staff Just perfect

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: I was disappointed in the location It was in the middle of nowhere Staff should be trained to give adequate instructions or advice on areas that we can go besides the Jugged hare   I thought the rooms were nice and fairly big for London

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: It was unusual and a bit disappointing not to be able to sit and have a social drink and relaxation in the bar after a meal out in the city No bar open after midnight room service only   Great location close to Tube Quiet area Very comfort

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The room was far too dark with no proper natural light It was not a room that you would want to spend any time in which I think for the price is a poor reflection  Good location

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Room standard was not of a five stars hotel small bathroom no place to place our personal belongings safe out of order after two useless interventions to fix it   Staff very friendly and helpful cleanliness

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Stay there all the time when in London one of the best beds i have slept in Staff always on their game and very helpful long queue at check in due some convention that weekend but apologies given straight away and was shown to room if not stayed there before it is a bit of maze but you get your bearings quickly Continental breakfast in the club room was quite good in the package Apart from 2 dirty coffee cups in the room which was quickly attended to i would add i cannot fault our stay Will definitely be back

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: N A  Liked everything would stay here again and would recommend to everyone The staff were so attentive and friendly The room was lovely and everything we needed was in there including a spare umbrella for the typical english weather luckily not needed It is a little out the way from the centre of London if you are being a tourist however we got taxis to and from which was fine and no problem

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Significant finger marks on the bathroom and doors made the room feel less clean though I m sure it was   Arranging the free fruit to reflect the overhead room lights meant you were greeted to your room by a line of smiling apples

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Ordered breakfast by room service and it was terrible Not very warm and toast was no more than warm bread Advised reception and they took action and refunded   Facilities in the room were excellent and the hotel was very clean

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Room very small for a double Returned late in the evening couldn t get a drink in the lobby Jugged Hare had closed Not ideal having to entertain guest in bedroom in order to have a drink   Bed very comfy the room has everything you could need Staff very friendly helpful

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The Hotel was beautiful and immaculate The staff impeccably professional and friendly there wasn t a single staff member we walked passed that didn t say hello or good day The room was as well equipped as any hotel I ve stayed in and to think it was cheaper than most other options available Amazing value for money Couldn t recommended highly enough

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Room terrible not 5 at all Location average easy to get round London with Underground anyway Noisey room Definately would not recommend or visit again

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: We were upgraded to a superior room which was very spacious and beautifully decorated and furnished Lovely breakfast Wonderful views from the rooftop restaurant Very attentive staff without being overbearing

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The Club Room Members Lounge had access to continental breakfast afternoon tea with sandwiches and complimentary early evening drinks Very attentive staff throughout the hotel It is nice to be in a building which has all the features and comfort of a 5 Star Hotel but retains much of the character and style of a historic building

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: I had a room at the front As is normal in London for some very very vague reason the hotel has not put a penny into installing decent window frames So I advise to bring ear plugs Rest of the hotel is relatively well maintained and has some nice lively restaurants Rooms at the back obviously do not suffer from the noise problem

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: No master light switch in room hate having to search everywhere to turn off unnecessary lights TV had problems with cable access Room difficult to get to from reception  Reasonable business accommodation Appreciated them allowing me to check in and go to room early

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: aircondition was problematic to set no view from window but is standard in London  the club romm was excellen choice nice room good and quite breakfest the hotel restaurant pub serving excellent food and beers

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: nothing   Comfy bed very nice hotel for reasonable price in central London Barbican and moorgate tube station 2 minute walk Lovely building from the outside polite helpful staff and overall 4 5 star hotel for very reasonable price

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Comically bad shower pressure was a big let down considering the not exactly low room price Your mileage may vary but for me this was a huge minus The bed was not the best but we slept decently   Beautiful old building extremely attentive and professional staff free to use smart phone with free Internet service spacious enough room complimentary bottled water and fruits

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Nothing to dislike  Staff were fabulous Upgraded us as it was our 30th anniversary trip made extra special with rose petals on our bed Wonderful place

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: We had the breakfast in our room and unfortunately it was a little cold   The staff were excellent and we were given a free upgrade as it was my partners birthday along with balloons and the bed turned down with petals and towels made into swans a really nice touch Dorina I think that was her name she was one of the duty managers also gave us a complimentary breakfast

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The main problem was that the air in our room got very stuffy even though we didn t have any heating on We tried turning on AC and opening window but the window would only open slightly We sometimes had trouble sleeping because of this   The staff was so nice and accommodating The location was a bit out of the city center but it was nicer to be closer to East London area as it isn t as touristy and it is quieter It also was very nice and clean

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Went for evening drinks but bar area full so we went in corner out the in restaurant area But made uncomfortable by waitress staff   The hotel was outstanding had to wait a bit for room to b finished from housekeeping but was given free drinks in the Aviary

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: No hooks in the bathroom to hang clothes The toiletries table was placed bu the shower far from the sink which was tiny   Staff very friendly and helpful room spacious comfortable bed even pillows were good I liked complimentary fruit after a long travel

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Rooms are tiny if I had a cat I wouldn t have been able to swing it Bed was lop sided my feet were higher than my head for some reason I was laid on the left and gravity also the lop on the bed was constantly willing me to roll to the right Bathroom and in particular the shower was great   Nice looking hotel staff very nice and polite Good pub and restaurant added on to the property which was a bonus Decent location

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The concierge desk was inconsistent when we required attention   Appreciated the extra care taken at check in by the front desk staff They were very accommodating

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The food prices were slightly excessive We would have liked to eat at the restaurant but unfortunately could not afford to However next time we will be aware and budget accordingly   The room was beautiful and the staff were so accommodating and polite

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Bar and restaurant was closed weekend Hot buffet breakfast was cold Staff serving at breakfast appeared indifferent and unhelpful   Location cleanliness bathrobes room Reception staff efficient and helpful Concierge friendly and helpful

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Its an old brewery so it can be a bit of a maze sometimes to get to your room   Super comfortable and cosy rooms with all the things you need Friendly and helpful staff would definitely visit again

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The staff were wonderful I honestly could no fault them one bit I popped out early evening and when I had returned they had tidied my room and turned the bed down for night They all referred to me by my name Truly 5 star thank you Montcalm

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Roadworks outside meant no quiet lie in for us Not hotels fault of course but very noisy Maybe ask for room away from it we didn t know until next morning   Lovely added luxuries in the room heated bathroom floor fab lighting comfy bed even mobile phone free to use during your stay friendly helpful staff even left free gifts for my husbands birthday

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Airconditioning did not cool room correctly even when reported to front desk and maintenance staff attended   Good location Staff very professional unique transformation from brewery into hotel

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Booked a Club Room very comfortable bed air conditioning toiletries hairdryer tea and coffee facilities very clean surprisingly quiet Taxi to Shaftesbury Avenue approximately 11 but a walk along the Thames to Westminster via St Paul s recommended

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: No spa as advertised which was very disappointing and no one at reception bothered to inform us if this Rooms rather small and window frames were covered in mould  Great location and reception area rooms slightly shabby mould around windows and small

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: We didn t pay for breakfast as it was quite expensive at 25 00 each for an English breakfast   Lovely room with a waterfall shower and comfy bed TV with lots of channels and radio nothing missing all great Very short walk to both Moorgate underground and also London Liverpool St is only 10 15 mins away so very central to see all the sights in London

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Our stay was fantastic all around I booked as a surprise trip for my girlfriend s 30th birthday and we arrived in the free upgrade room to a bottle of champagne balloons and a birthday card from the staff I couldn t have asked for a better stay and the staff made us feel so welcome Many thanks and we will be back

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Noisy there was some kind of machine plant outside of the window and it was very noisy all night The layout of the hotel makes it very difficult to find your room Would have been nice to have a residents only bar lounge rather that just the pub on the corner   Good location and well equipped room and very friendly staff

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Constant air conditioning noise in the room air conditioning and shower controls too complicated   Perfect location very friendly and welcoming staff beautiful old buildings and lovely room with comfortable bed Easy access to public transport and surprisingly quiet

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: In general it is difficult to find some of the rooms The one I had this time under the roof 326 were a bit too small and noisy without a real window they have much better ones  Great location designer hotel friendly and helpful staff

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Lovely pub and restaurant on the ground floor some of the best food in London Club rooms come with access to the club lounge with complimentary snacks and drinks

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: But the mattress in our room for disabled person was far too deep to climb up into bed Not value for money only because we didn t make use of all the facilities available   The bed was comfortable We will come back again We ve got what s important to us

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The 6 o clock Sunday morning fire alarm the bizarre extra layer a bit like a duvet but strapped on top of the mattress that made the bed really soft   The gimmicky lights and little handy 4G device that would have been useful if I didn t have my own phone

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: This is the 3rd time I have stayed at the hotel and I was disappointed this time The room was small barely 18 inches either side of the bed The air con wasnt working well and the room was warm and stuffy room 249 Sitting in the chair was like sitting in a narrow corridor   The staff remain very efficient and welcoming but I was disappointed that I was asked by 3 different staff members is this your first visit to the hotel In today s IT savvy world it would have been nice if only when booking in that it would be noted that this was my 3rd visit not feeling any loyalty to return

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: It was so very warm almost subtropical inside the hotel Points for keeping us all very snug and it clearly is an amazing place however the temperature could do with being a little more reasonable   The hotel is lovely as are the staff Nothing is too much effort food is lovely Perfect place for business or leisure

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Hotel is a bit of a rabbit warren but that s part of its history and we were shown the shortcut back to reception   Comfortable bed in stylish room Good shower over bath Nice toiletries

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: At check in front desk wanted to put me at a sister hotel that was farther away from the conference center They were likely overbooked The temperature in my room was ridiculously hot the thermostat did not work despite my turning it all the way down to 16 degrees Celsius I called front desk and was assured someone will swing by to rectify the issue Four nights at the hotel and nobody bothered to address my complaint It felt like sleeping in a sauna   The only redeeming quality was its distance to the conference center that I had to be at that week

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Nothing   Beautiful spacious room Found out it was my birthday and I was pregnant so when I went back to the room later there was a orange and lemonade a chocolate cake balloons and a pregnancy pillow Really showed they cared and listened Room was immaculate

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Reception staff were cold and indifferent on check in slightly better on check out Given the room was paid for and credit card details given was there really any need to take copies of photo ID of a British citizen The bed had a cheap open coil mattress Putting a lovely topper on the bed does not solve the issue of a dip being created in the middle of a cheap mattress if one person weighs more than the other This outdated style also means there is excessive mattress movement everytime someone turns over Generally good hotels use hand side stitched pocket sprung or memory foam for this reason The lounge area was tiny and uncomfortable not everyone wants their social space option to be the noisy pub The coffee in the room was little instant packets at the room price point I d expect Nespresso or Krups   Great location for the Barbican Nice bathroom and great shower The Elemis toiletries were a nice touch pleasing to see a cruelty free British brand

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: We were in a room that was literally just off the street and opposite to the hotel we walked out of our room and on to the street which was a bit weird and a bit noisy   The rooms were decorated nicely and the reception was quite glam Breakfast was good but expensive 17 per person I would recommend going down to the road a bit to Cotes they do a breakfast for a lot less

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Localisation close to lots of useful points business and leisure but barbican itself is not very attractive   We are returning customers and will return The room lay out some are a bit small but all optimized top personnel and room equipment The ambiance is also great and there are a couple of nice old London fashioned streets around the hotel

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Poor lighting in room Nowhere to hang things in bathroom No shelves in bathroom Bed comfy but very high Had to climb up  Free mobile phone Excellent concierge service

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Property was in the financial part of the city so quite quiet at weekends but tube station walkable so not an issue   The staff were full of energy and were very helpful Great asset Montcalm Julia on front desk was particularly helpful

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: I booked a room at the Montcalm at the Brewery but was upgraded to one of their hotels 15 minutes away which was annoying on 2 counts 1 I had parked my car on the Barbican car park before I found out about my upgrade only for the other hotel to have an NCP right outside it So had to walk 15 mins to pick my car up and 2 I wanted to stay at the Montcalm at the Brewery which is why I booked there Poor show really  The bed was comfortable and the room facilities were great

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Our room number 12 was on the ground floor and looked out onto what I m assuming was an air conditioning unit for the whole hotel There was no point in having a window no light came in at all I wouldn t have paid so much to stay in this hotel if I had known this in advance Not good value for money   Central location Good room facilities

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: It was difficult to get the temperature exactly right at night too hot with the duvet too cold without it and I couldn t quite understand how the air conditioning worked Breakfast was OK without quite being special enough to justify the price   The overall standard of cleanliness and the facilities The helpfulness of the staff The location near the barbican Centre

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Could not fault our stay   It was a special birthday and the staff went above and beyond their duty with the room and service Hotel is connected to pub which serves excellent beer and food Lovely building

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Our room was very small and very dark The mattress was not very good and could have been firmer The room was very dark even when we opened the curtains view was a wall so no light could get in anyway We were told at reception that we had been given an upgrade and I can t help wondering what a lower grade room would have been like I think that we should have been taken to our room by the most direct route rather than via two lifts and several corridors and steps Fortunately we found the shorter route afterwards as directed by the staff member who took us to the room   The staff were all delightful and happy to help

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The only negative was the lovely room we were in was quite low just above the street and we could hear the conversations of pedestrians outside at night Better deals on the windows would go a long way   Beautiful room gorgeous communal areas friendly helpful staff made everything a pleasure best room service chocolate brownie ever We needed a break and were thoroughly spoiled Only had one night but it felt like a holiday

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The sink in the bathroom was very small difficult even to wash hands in and I don t have big hands and impossible to fill the kettle provided   The english breakfast tea brand Jing I think was particularly good

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: If I had to be extremely picky there wasn t any lighting at the wardrobe which made it hard to what you had in there   The bed was ridiculously comfortable Spent the night in the Montcalm Club Room 100 recommended and would choose this room again myself Staff are brilliant I was greeted on arrival but a couple of members of staff whilst I waited to check in They were polite and cracked on with conversation like they knew me whilst telling me a little about the history of the hotel and how they can be of help during my stay The location is pretty good and convenient Shops are within a couple of minutes walking and Moorgate underground station a 5 minute walk away

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: wifi connection was very poor dropped connection every 5 minutes and all sessions otherwise everything about Montcalm was excellent except I did book it thinking it was a Brewery that I could drink locally brewed beer at That was sad for me   Fontina was very patient and helpful while I sorted out my corporate credit card running while out of US Staff were all very very helpful and nice Location was amazing

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: I booked at the Hotel NOT with City Rooms I expected to be in the main part of the hotel not the further most distance from the facilities At one point I was offered a room in a different building entirely up the road which was totally unacceptable This made it exceptionally and painfully difficult for me due to an injury to move around the hotel and I was indeed restricted to my room after arrival by this There was no other chair in the room apart from an unstable office type chair   The rooms are all well fitted and the beds extremely comfortable Food both breakfast and Room Service were excellent as usual The hotel is very clean with excellent facilities and the are friendly and very helpful

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The Hotel looks like a labyrinth We got lost on several occasions Breakfast had to be prepaid and I had to show my creditcard 3 times on a 48 hour stay   Liked the free cellphone unit in the room allowing us to tour the city with free internet and apps like googel maps etc

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Didn t like having to go across the road to my room I didn t like having to chase for my dinner that was forgotten And I didn t like my dinner turning up the following evening that was cold   Room itself was good and staff were attentive

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The staff were fantastic all very friendly and nothing was too much trouble We were upgraded on arrival for no extra cost and the staff had put some balloons in the room as we were celebrating my partner s birthday The location was great quiet and close to the tube station

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: It was a it noisy but then we were next to a road so what do I expect   The bed was nice and big and very comfy decor was modern and up to date I mentioned it was my husbands birthday and hey upgraded us and provides us with a bottle of proseco which I thought was a lovely touch and a surprise

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Couldn t get a table for dinner in jugged Hare until 9pm Friday which was no good as we travelled a long time and the phone wasn t answered in the chiswell rooms Not great if these are the hotel eateries Looking slightly worn room 120 carpet stains and worn desk chair fabric Finally asked for a room with a bath and didn t get a reply at all in a whole week Ended up with a nice shower as it was a disabled room so large wet room but not what we wanted Check in and out queues substantial In the end I walked out and emailed the hotel about our extras The two concierge stood waiting to help should be able to check out guests and the check in process is unduly long   Great style and service

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The staff provided excellent service The tea service complimentary water in the room housekeeping great breakfast etc all made for a wonderful stay

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: entertainment system kept going down Then remote wouldn t work Asked reception twice to sort it didn t turn up went out hoping it would be sorted when I got back but nothing done Dissapointed   good location

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: We mentioned upon departure that there was a loud noise of running water in the ceiling space which did keep us awake The hotel were going to look into this with their maintenance staff   A very nice hotel with very nice furnishings and clearly is of a 5 star standard Bed was extremely comfortable and all in all a very nice experience

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The moment you step towards the hotel you are treated like you are part of an family The staff are friendly and caring The rooms are wonderful and spacious You have everything you may need even an umbrella in the wardrobe for those rainy days I would definitely go back hopefully for longer this time

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The electric blind in the bathroom was really temperamental the bath control was broken and kept falling off the window didn t open not really 5 star standard but 5 star price   Great staff lovely lobby area nice bed very comfortable attached pub looked great Nice bathrobes

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Breakfast service was poor No menu just help yourself to lukewarm food Tea and coffee not fresh and only provided after long wait   Location was good room was small but comfortable

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Breakfast completed over priced at almost 25 each  The lobby and rooms are exactly what you see in the pictures No surprises Beautiful rooms for the price and comfortable bed Didn t have breakfast or anything in the room as far too expensive The mini bar had the biggest choice I ve seen again was too expensive but if you are prepared to pay for it then plenty to choose from however there is a Tesco opposite

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Everything has its price to the point that the room rate doesn t buy you a 4 5 experience you incrementally have to trade up to it From peanuts to toiletries to a film in your room everything costs slightly more than you feel it ought to Not permitting a burger to be served medium to adhere to a mysterious regulation is a little tiresome Nice team but ever so slightly commercial chain feel rather than boutique charm

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Poor service A 5 hotel who refuse to cook your burger medium rare is not a 5 hotel especially when it takes 50mins to prepare Being told we can t have have a cocktail on a Saturday at 19h because the bar is closed is also not 5 And a doorman who care more about our chauffeur driven car to move from the entrance instead of welcoming us and offering an umbrella to protect from the rain is not 5 either   In the heart of the City of London

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: I disliked almost everything apart from the location and the architecture Exhibits all of the worst features of luxury hotels e g 1 Pointless staff whose only role is to suck up to narcissist guests door openers bell hops etc 2 Tediously long winded check in check out 3 Opaque pricing and billing 4 50 minute notice to use gym facilities 5 Broken desk chair 6 ridiculously small desk 7 stained shower cabinet 8 atmospheric but functionally useless lighting I could go on  location

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The property itself was beautiful but the staff really made this hotel come to life they could not be nicer or more helpful They tailored our stay to suit us perfectly and went above and beyond to make our stay memorable as it was for a special occasion Also in a great location a 5 minute walk to the closest underground station and a 7 minute walk to Liverpool Street Station

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
