Full_Review: Unfortunately the hot water mixer wasnt working in the bath however the concierge offered to help us move and a complimentary bottle of champagne   We were upgraded to a beautiful suite so this review is for a room that we were upgraded to which was amazing a great space over two floors beautiful bathroom and a very comfortable bed

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: it was cold and it took me a long time to get my room to a bearable temperature   rooms are comfortable location is great staff efficient love jugged hare and the dining rooms

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Breakfast could start a bit earlier for those of us with early meetings The food prices were also a bit high   Great staff The coffee in the lobby was a nice touch

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: There seems to be a lot missing for a 5 star hotel Starting with the inside bar which closes so early for a 5 star hotel The room was clean but super small   Clean hotel Nice bathroom amenities A good 4 star hotel Location is good walking distance to the Underground

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: We arrived around 7pm on a Feb evening so it was dark and the curtains were drawn in the room As a result we had no idea until morning that there was no natural light in the room We had one very small window didn t open overlooking a high wall to another building blocking out any sliver of light dark and airless Would have asked for a move if we d noticed the night before   The Jugged Hare was a superb addition to our stay for an evening meal and drinks

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Set up of the hotel was confusing to find rooms and the bar attached was small so not much seating  Service was outstanding staff were genuinely happy to go above and beyond without prompting I had an issue with the toilet flush when I got there as it was sorted out straight away

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Well we sell beds for a living and we always like 5 ft Or bigger Your bed in club room 4ft 6 and very very soft didn t sleep well at all But this is my ONLY complaint otherwise fab   Loved having a bar to go to in a lift straight from hotel although we didn t eat in the bar restaurant it did look good and the bar food

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The room was quite small the breakfast was very expensive and although nice the service was very confusing and the staff seemed harrassed I expected to have more included in the price considering it was not a cheap hotel   It was high spec and very clean

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: There was a repeated whirring noise which made it a bit difficult to sleep but otherwise a great room   Very easy check in and check out process The staff also helped to accommodate my request to be in an easy to locate room as it can be a bit confusing Very comfortable room and the bed is excellent

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: No decafe tea in restaurant Last time we stayed had a choice of eggs today only very wet scrambled eggs and streaky bacon Breakfast wasn t as good as normal

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The main issue was the room itself You don t have access to open windows turn AC heater off constantly blows Lots of lights from electronics clocks bar and from under the door to the hallway You can t turn them off   During the week it is a good location

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: What s not to like Great location great rooms and very friendly and professional staff 5 hotel for 3 money And the pub next door is awesome

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Hotel was in a great location close to several tube stops so it was easy to get around The hotel itself was really well decorated with nice furnishings As the hotel is an old brewery it was quite a maze to get around and rhe ceiling was quite low in our room but I think it just added to the charm The staff were very Friendly and helpful during our stay

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Lack of public areas and hotel restaurant If we wanted a drink we had to go out into the poring rain and walk round the corner to the hotels pub this was not evident on the website Did not feel like a hotel but more like a serviced appartment   Location as required However as its an commercial area most restaurants etc were closed on Saturday Sunday night had to walk a considerable distance to get a meal

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: I got downgraded to a single room which was still a nice room your insensitives helped maters on departure I was ashored that I will have a full upgrade on my next visit Which I will definitely take up   Your staff are very helpful are your biggest asset

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: There were minor problems with the loo flush one night but this was remedied by the hotel   The location and comfort of the hotel are excellent this was my 4th stay

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The security staff were over zealous at the end of the evening basic attitude of we have had your money now get out not good Wasn t helped by booking com not sending the booking through to the hotel at least that s what we was told This resulted in a 30 minute wait at reception to get it sorted   The rooms and reception staff were excellent a credit to the business

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: one minor point was that I found it difficult to tell the security level of the WiFi however and as such did not use it overly   The staff were friendly and approachable and made me feel valued as a guest I would recommend this hotel to anyone The room was excellent and hope to visit again soon

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: I would have preferred a harder pillow   The rooms were comfortable and I enjoyed the decor and layout There was a handy phone you could use to find out info and even call people from for free Staff were helpful and courteous

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Not a single complaint   The loveliest hotel Spotless very comfortable and all the staff are exceptional Highly recommend this hotel in every aspect

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: I was annoyed at the repeated attempts to sell us the very expensive breakfast 25pp when we checked in about 5 times The hotel is a listed building and a complete maze difficult finding the room and way out every time   The bed was very comfortable and we slept really well Great location and quite a quirky hotel Very attractive lobby

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Our room in the South Wing was smaller than the photograph for this room type probably due to working around the architecture of the building Also the double bed smaller than expected   The design of the original old brewery is good Lovely staff The pub

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Staff were so helpful couldn t have done more Also The Jugged Hare next door was lovely for a pint before heading out or a nightcap on the way home

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Nothing   The room was clean and spacious The facilities were perfect for one night The location was ideal for the Barbican and convinient for the tube There was always a member of staff to help when needed

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The hotel is beautiful and the staff was very helpful The room was not very big but it had everything one needs and the bathroom has lovely amenities The bed was super comfortable We only stayed one night but I would recommend it for even more Although it is not in the heart of London the neighborhood is very nice and the Tube station is 5 on foot

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Being bumped to another hotel with no advance notice   Got bumped from here to their sister hotel on Finsbury Square which was annoying as my party venue was the Brewery but they provided courtesy transport between the hotels and a complimentary breakfast for the inconvenience so it all worked out OK

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Better window glazing for sound proofing warmth The heat was set higher to balance the old windows I was warm but it wasted energy   Beautiful very comfortable room Lovely staff nice London City location

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: It s not evident to switch off the television so I always need to call the reception and ask them about how to do it   Very nice room everything one may need good location

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: A little bit pricey but understandable since every other hotels in London is quite expensive   Very nice and helpful staff Also great location If you are up for a walk you can go to the river and tower bridge by foot The restaurant just around the corner serves excellent dishes

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Coffee machine in room and real milk in fridge would have been a nice touch Minibar contents were a little too overpriced Nothing else really   Nice room upgrade friendly receptionist who took the time to take us to our room when her colleagues weren t available well stocked minibar good food and service for breakfast attractive decor throughout comfy bed nice tea and biscuits in room free wifi and phone excellent location tasty bar snacks and availability of Erdinger no alcohol beer the best in The Jugged Hare great location for The Barbican

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Doesn t look the same as the picture showed on the website so I was expected a bigger room but in fact the room size was quiet small   The location is quiet convenient to the underground station And if you like shoreditch and brick lane it is very close to there Also close to one of the most famous club Fabric The room was tidy and clean staff is very helpful and friendly as well

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: That I couldn t stay longer   Everything The staff were all so lovely and accommodating they really made our stay perfect Especially the concierge and the Duty manager 22 01 17 The breakfast at The Chiswell Street Dining rooms was beautiful best scrambled eggs I have ever had The room was lovely and comfortable and well presented nice and quiet too And the building is beautiful Would definitely recommend and will be returning

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Not much   Great staff and lovely room in the centre of London Great value to for what you get compared to many places Also try the Jugged Hare next door for lunch very good

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Reception area was cold Our bathroom was even colder The club lounge was very poor understaffed and seriously underpriced poor selection and not enough of continental breakfast and not enough seating to accommodate those of us who had paid for extra comfort and Service very disappointing To have the main restaurant shut at weekends was surprising and to not have an internal bar lounge equally as surprising   The bed was really comfortable Room facilities were good Reception staff concierge and doormen polite and attentive

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The TV was in an odd position in our room This could be placed on a movable stand Although this isn t a big deal   The room was beautiful The staff where brilliant And thr breakfast was delicious

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: It wasn t super clean and I was expecting something a little more from a 5 star but it was an amazing stay though The window in the bathroom made cold air enter from outside even when closed making the bathroom not so warm and the insonorization was not so good because I could hear all the city noise in the early morning   Excellent staff and the room was amazing and well furbished Nice location for central London Bed was super comfy and the bathroom big and very nice

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: On our first morning the tone was set with a negative response to my only request Unacceptable for a 5 star hotel Lots of distance to cover to our rooms Would have preferred the club room to be closer to the lounge even though the lounge didn t offer what we were expecting The iron was old and wearing a wrinkled shirt was preferable More space needed in the kettle area aircon temp fluctuated during the night and lighting too dim   There was always lots of staff in reception One lovely guy went above and beyond duty to assist me with an uber issue The atmosphere was good Very accommodating with an early checkin The bed very comfy and the room was very quiet Very impressed with the room iPhone as it helped us get around the city

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Breakfast quality was poor family report that sausages and bacon were undercooked Pastries were overlooked attentiveness of staff in Chiswick rooms at breakfast for pensioner and teenager who weren t au fait with hotel etiquette poor guests unsure of whether to seat themselves get own tea coffee toast etc   Location and staff attentiveness

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: location close to my office Additionally Quality of service and attitude of staff encourages me to stay in this hotel again and again Special thanks to Vlad who looks after me every time I stay

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: small double rooms poor bedroom and bathroom lighting no tea coffee bar replenishment at turndown service  location first impressions staff friendly and attentive excellent breakfast

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Very minor quibble note to hotel in room 148 the curtain didn t fit properly and let some light in But otherwise nothing to dislike at all   very quiet room bed really comfortable Don t be put off by the location in The City it is only a couple of mins from the tube station The pub part of the hotel Jugged Hare is also very good built in an old brewery so not your normal modern hotel

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Nothing really  The beautiful duvet and pillows The complimentary wine which I did not drink as I don t drink alachol and the chocolates were a lovely touch along with the fruit

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The staff were quite rude and icy on arrival It was difficult to understand the receptionist checking us in The bed was not made until the evening time We were requested to pay 3 nights accommodation despite staying two nights and that the extra nights fee would be returned to me within a few days not great if you had a certain weekend budget   Comfortable bed room decorated nicely quite modern The bathroom was lovely Good location directly between two underground stations

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The room was noisy this is inevitable when situated on a fairly busy road The room clearly needs secondary glazing A shame as otherwise was very good value   The excellent value courteous staff and being upgraded to a larger room Perfectly sited for visiting the Barbican centre

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Stayed in a club room it was small compared to executive rooms in many other hotels The bathroom too small too No natural light in the room a small window Decor could be better there was only one mirror in the room by the desk Would have liked to have a separate shower too The desk area was taken up by the telephone mobile and sound speaker Was not told that the hotel has a steamroom and sauna before or during my stay   Great toiletries slippers bed and bedding and tea

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Small closet typical of big city hotels weird bathroom set up insufficient room light they upgraded us supposedly but then put my wife and I in the smaller of the two rooms didn t like the service button seemed to work intermittently all that is being picky   The accommodations were very good room size bed was comfortable gave us gifts over several nights wine chocolates which was unexpected Very near many sights and good restaurants on the east central side of the city

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Limited to 1 coffee pod per each for the Nespresso although the upgrade is sold on this being a feature Little things like this really annoy Water pressure shower mixer system dreadful to operate and no pressure at all for a decent shower so had to wait an age for bath to fill Only one robe in room Bathroom needs tidying touching up in respect of d cor No information provided by staff as to facilities   Location was handy One member of staff was very polite friendly and helpful Turn down service

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Easy walk to two tube stations close to places to eat very friendly staff huge bed great shower ultimately WAY exceeded my expectations and will definitely be recommending to friends and staying here again

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: 1 Concierge seemed to have VERY limited knowledge of specific restaurants nearby for us to enjoy and sent us to a chain restaurant Cote which was certainly not the experience we were looking for He seemed disengaged and disinterested 2 The Hotel has two restaurants One of them was closed for renovations which we were not made aware of The only other option was the Jugged Hare which is solely for meat eaters Not ideal for a vegetarian They had only one non meat option which was incredibly bland and disappointing 3 Three pieces of fruit were left in our room for our consumption however the fruit was old and past its time 4 Our room on the 4th floor had very small windows and was very dark 5 Room itself was ok it had no interesting design elements or personality which is a shame as the history of the hotel lends itself to such possibilities   Architecture of the hotel and history

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Service at breakfast could have been better very few people in the restaurant but staff paying little attention to those who were there   Staff in hotel were all very helpful

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: It was quiet staff very helpful Room had the facilities we expect and more the complimentary fruit and water was good Overall it exceeded expectations

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: A bit of confusion at check in but staff apologised immediately and upgraded our room because of this   Smart hotel great location friendly staff and a very comfortable one night stay

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Not being in the hotel taken over the road to a different building which had none of the wow of the main building  Bed was comfortable shower was great

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: It s somewhat of a maze inside of the hotel once you re on your floor My room had a window but it was very close to a wall No daylight   Nice staff concierge to carry your bags Room was pretty nice bed storage for clothes mini bar multimedia tv alarm clock with dock for smartphone Small but clean bathroom with bathtub shower in tub toilet sink large mirror Lots of power outlets including HMDI port USB 5v port

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Nothing   Everything was top notch staff was superb especially Valentina the receptionist Room was exactly as we saw on the website maybe better eheheh All the amenities are in room Definitely a very pleasant stay

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The noise oh the noise On a quiet weekend I was put in a room above a courtyard with a party until 2am then staff dragging chairs and talking much longer Reception too dark could not read forms to sign in check in was very slow After working non stop for 6 weeks I just wanted a decent sleep and though given the price and reviews this would be possible   Location from Liverpool street

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Tired room enamel coming off bath grouting needed renewing Hotel paid no attention to details about how special our stay should be for our joint birthdays and tried to move us to a sister hotel which we have stayed in before and loved but specifically wanted this one Made husband late for his meeting with an important client whilst arguing with him that as the room wasn t booked in his name he couldn t check in without me Told him we then had an upgraded room but we hadn t He has stayed here before and has a far nicer spacious room Room aircon not sufficient duvet too hot and had to strip bed down to get to a bearable temp Cups in room only big enough for an expresso not tea   Assistance to our room with luggage appreciated breakfast chef was friendly and chatty next morning couldn t do enough for us which went some way to improve matters

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Teething problems with the room technology meant we didn t get a good night s sleep Reported to management so doubt this will affect other guests   Brand new hotel so everything new clean and plush Liked the champagne on arrival and the free breakfast

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Although we enjoyed the Jugged Hare for breakfast it was often very busy in the evening with no seats and we missed a hotel bar to simply relax in after a long day But when we did drink there staff great at creating drinks to order   Great staff Nice room Elegant and interesting building

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Poor support on concierge and business services for a 5 star rated hotel Staff not on top of their game and miscommunicated services available Furniture in the room was tired looking and facing noisy street   Comfortable bed

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Nothing I loved the hotel  The hospitality I received from the staff was absolutely first rate Because it was my birthday weekend I was upgraded to a beautiful room with a complimentary bottle of red wine and some chocolate truffles and finally if that wasn t generous enough we were also given a complimentary breakfast We were truely amazed by the generosity of the hotel and we will definitely be staying there again and not only because of the lovely extras but because the hotel is beautiful the location is fantastic and the food at The Jugged Hare was just delicious I would highly recommend this hotel

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: A very comfortable well appointed hotel with friendly helpful staff set in an excellent location for what we were doing We liked the traditional feel and surroundings to the hotel

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: the location was ideal for what we were going to nice quiet dark room when curtains shut really comfy bed big bathroom and a shot off a phone with info about London on it should u need one

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: My only slight criticism is there was no where in our room to sit a do hair or make up lots of mirrors but none with a surface for placing straighteners or make up But this didn t affect our stay and wouldn t be enough to make a complaint   The hotel was beautiful located close to Liverpool st the barbican we even walked to the south bank in about 25mins The staff we helpful and happy and our room was lovely

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: No pool gym Not a great night s sleep due to overnight noise from local brewery No hotel bar after midnight  Excellent Breakfast Very friendly effective staff Comfortable rooms with good WiFi Great Location

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The room was dark and small and felt claustrophobic TV did not work and accessing it was like walking through a maze Given the rate night not good value for money

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Our room was really small when our friends also booked the same room but got a huge space It was also difficult to find   Really good value for money lovely reception area and bathrooms were good Elemis toiletries which are great

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Fitness room Tiny room with no functioning air con window or ventilation  Nice rooms great building with a lot of character Very nice venue for conferences

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Nothing all good  Excellent hotel staff couldn t have been more friendly or helpful very clean and comfortable lovely pub within the hotel free coffee in reception good location and would definitely staff here again and recommend

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: maybe slightly bigger room  Staff was very friendly competent Excellent service Room was small but very comfortable with all amenities and uniquely a cell phone one could use around London That was a first for us Nice bathroom with floor heating

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Staff knocked 3 times to restock mini bar replenish fruit we didn t arrive until 4 30 turn bed down greatly appreciated but at 7pm   Small but very comfortable room not in main building but good value for location well equipped bathroom

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Our room was across the road in suites which didn t work for me but for some would be a great bonus   The attached pub and dining rooms were lovely

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The food hate to say it but ordered a duck salad and boy it was repeating on me my god where do you get your stock from Also my salad came out b4 my bread n butter god I hate that   Everyone and everything

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: First I was given a small room in the basement with a lot noise from various air condition hanging outside on the wall But upon request was promptly given another better room

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Lots of different lighting in the rooms but none of them particularly bright not great for putting on make up   Very comfortable and quiet great facilities

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Got room 327 on the first night and didn t love it Staff upgraded me to club room 130 after I mentioned it which was great   Great staff quirky hotel with rooms going off in all directions awesome food and pub Will stay here whenever I m in London from now on

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: There was a bit of a mix up over what payment included but they apologised for the mistake and corrected it more or less The radio stations on the TV didn t seem to work   I liked the high and soft bed I liked the bathroom facilities I liked the size of the room I liked the numerous amenities on offer I liked the staff who were very friendly and helpful even when busy and under pressure

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Room could have been a bit cleaner few stray short hairs on the bedding Hot water took a while to come through and the toilet continued to run after flushing Staff advised not unduly concerned but said would inform housekeeping   The location of the room was good Second time I have stayed and the first time the room windows faced an office building

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Unable to run bath took 45 mins Staff responded within 10 mins but problem not fixed and the promise of a room change never happened Room very very small Mini bar had selection of drink but only one beer Hotel bar hard to find very small so couldn t get in it Sat night Draughty windows and shabby curtains   Well situated

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The lay out is a bit unusal over different levels and floors but we got our barings quick enough might not suit less mobile customers   We stayed here on a very busy London weekend international Rugby Football The Lord Mayors show and Remberance I usally stay over by Marble Arch and this was my first stay in the city The hotel lcation was excellant and the room had every modcon you could think of including a hotel mobile and umbrella The mini bar was well stocked if a bit expensive but the fruit tea and coffee were all complimentary I think this might also be the most comfortable bed I have ever slept in even if it was the tallest Plenty of coat handers bathrobes slippers and quality toiletaires We booked a cooked breakfast which was served in the Jugged Hare which had a great atmosphere even for breakfast This is a good looking hotel with great staff We are memebers of a club in London but I am serious about making this hotel our go to location when the club is full Very happy to recommend

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Only issue was no window in the room as such there was a window it was mirrored and didnt open not a huge problem though  Everything I didn t want to come home

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Was told on checking in that I had been upgraded however this only involved being relocated from the beautiful Brewery site to the rather plain London House site which was a 10 minute walk away and which didn t look any nicer than the room I d booked   Bed is comfy

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Thought hotel was closer too many staff on desk all of them came across like they were new everything took a long time jumping from one computer to the next we had 5 rooms booked I couldn t count on how many times we had to go back down to reception as the key card would not let us gain entry to the rooms very frustrating

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Check in was slow with some panic by the front desk Room 327 an insult to be in this room NEVER put me in that room again Let s have some better directions to the rooms  Location always works for me

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Nothing to be honest room facilities were great and we didn t eat or use the leisure facilities   The staff couldn t be any more polite Fantastic service and great modern and clean facilities

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Everything was fine  Hotel had excellent facilities everything was there from bath supplies to sewing kit plus iron and ironing board I was very happy The room we stayed in was quiet so we were able to have a lie in every morning

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The next underground station is barbican that s cool but not too cool the hotel is based in the banking district The metro is bringing you in under 10 minutes to the touristical areas   Friendly staff high standard rooms very comfortable beds I would recommend this hotel for a trip to London

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: This hotel is perfectly situated and close walking distance to the tube The hotel and staff were wonderful Extremely polite and the hotel itself is glorious The enterance hall was beautiful The rooms were excellent Shower was Devine as were the in room bathroom products Mini bar was fairly priced and fully stocked Bed was very comfy We shall definately return Thank you for a wonderful stay

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Our room was at the back of the hotel The bassy noise and vibration of external cooling units was disappointing as we had been excitedly told at check in that we had been upgraded Breakfast too expensive at 25pp   Attended a wedding at the venue so made the day evening very easy Great location Staff very efficient friendly and polite Cafes nearby

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: But don t have breakfast Breakfast was a travesty we had to ask 4 or 5 times for cutlery drinks etc and they had run out of mushrooms and brown bread and had congealed under cooked bacon Every member of waiting staff just yes when we asked for anything and then never returned The chef was excellent cooking special requests to order and the food he produced was great The hotel handled the problem really well and offered a full refund of the cost of the breakfast which I did not request   The hotel is fabulous everything you could wish for and extremely helpful staff Lovely rooms comfortable beds free wifi Very easy to find I would highly recommend staying here

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Beware they may check you into their sister hotel over the road My room was located very far away from the main reception and as the hotel is like a maze it made it a trifle difficult finding everything I had to take 2 lifts to the 5 floor   The Club rooms are fantastic the hotel is very clean and up to date The tech in the rooms is fabulous would definitely recommend

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The trash mostly bottles I assume was wheeled out over cobblestone two of three nights and dumped early the next morning Also voices were amplified in that courtyard   Nice location attentive staff

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: A bar to have a drink after midnight before you retire which on a Friday night was disappointing because there wasn t one open   Staff and the manager Dorina were simply outstanding

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Full place was excellent and the Club Room was well worth the extra Nice continental breakfast and girl in Club Room very good Staff in the hotel were all very good and room was great Great idea having the free mobile in the room for use even though we didn t need The Jugged Hare was great for a drink at night and had very good Sunday lunch there We stayed over a weekend Friday to Monday and got an excellent deal due to the area being very quiet at weekends Having stayed in area before though we know the links around London are excellent and easy to anywhere from the hotel

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Could not control the a c Two light bulbs not working Long confusing walk to the room from reception   Bed very comfortable Staff welcoming and efficient Room well equipped

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: It was my husbands birthday and we where upgraded to a suite when we arrived The staff where extremely polite and helpful We have stayed there before and we will definitely stay there again when we next visit London

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Although a good location there is no tube stop in the immediate vicinity meaning you have to walk 10 mins to get anyway Unusual for a central location A little difficult to find if you don t know your way around The room service carried a hidden charge for having food brought to the room as well as a tip being added on Paid 10 06 for a plate of fries   Being shown to your room was a nice touch Well kept and quite fancy for the price Staff were friendly and it s a good price for London

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Basic amenities were too complicated there should have been instructions on how to switch on and more importantly switch off the innumerable lights in the room The shower was also over complicated

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: On check in I asked for a quiet room but had the feeling the polite young lady on check in didn t really take any notice of my request Our room ended up being directly above the hotels own gastro pub When we arrived back the noise was intrusive but the duty manager was polite and professional and moved us to another room   Smart hotel in a great location

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Irritatingly the lights and electrics fused As a result the appliances didn t work although a maintenance guy did sort out the lights Not what you want in a hotel of this calibre

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The staff were very welcoming friendly and helpful Our room was upgraded FOC to a Montcalm Club room as we were celebrating our minimoon complementary bottle of champagne was also given The room we stopped in was perfect couldn t fault it at all We would stop at this hotel again

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Looking at the great reviews from others it seems to be something of a lottery how your stay will go dependent on which room you re given The room we had was so small even by London standards and dark that it was difficult for two people to get ready together without bumping in to each other There was also so much stuff in the equally tiny wardrobe and bathroom already that it was actually difficult to hang anything up or put your toiletries down The water system or something similar overhead also made a considerable noise and kept me awake for part of the night The hotel is something of a maze and we managed to get lost between the room and reception twice as the signage isn t also helpful as a side note it s also a little odd that anyone can walk into the hotel bedroom corridors bypassing reception through the wide open door in the pub next door without being checked I suspect that if we d had a slightly bigger quieter room I d be giving this close to a ten However a hotel with five star aspirations really shouldn t be hit or miss in that way We tend to go back again to hotels we trust but it seems unlikely we ll visit here again The person on reception didn t ask how our stay was when we checked out so perhaps that doesn t matter   Comfy bed and 5 mins from the Barbican if you re attending something there

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Mice in the club lounge Struggled a bit with finding light switches but that s a personal thing   Loved the room and the comfy bed The little touches like bathrobes and slippers

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: We had to leave the hotel to walk round the corner for breakfast Not really an issue just a little odd  The gentleman that showed us to our room was extremely helpful and pleasant I mentioned it was my husband s 50 and a card and box of chocolates appeared Such a lovely touch Thank you

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: No bar What hotel in this day and age has no bar You can order drinks through room service but sometimes you need a bar   Great place history and luxury smashed together to make a excellent hotel

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Shower not very powerful Noisy outside from air con loud humming noise No bottle of something or upgrade for being our anniversary   TV great Wifi great Bed great Helpful porter

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: I paid for a Club Room but not sure if I got a Club Room I did not get a room marked as a Club Room and I did not get access to the hotel Club area   Clean quiet good location

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Room and bed was a little small The road outside can be very busy at rush hours as you would expect at this location   Excellent location walking distance from Barbican Centre where we had a wedding Jugged Hare was an excellent place for food for dinner as well as breakfast

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: we stayed here on the weekend and found the local area extremely quiet struggled to find restaurants etc so had to travel probably better suited to weekday business travellers staff were helpful however we felt we were being stared at spoken about behind ours backs by some staff that clearly had a snooty attitude their problem not ours didn t ruin my visit  Beautiful hotel and really comfortable rooms with lots of nice little touches such as slippers and robes and Hermes toiletries

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Reception recommended I try the gastropub the Jugged Hare opposite which I did but I was disappointed Not really gastropub quality and my sirloin steak was tough with gristle as was my neighbour s who sent his back Note did not try the hotel restaurant itself Reception could be better signposted when trying to get from bedrooms back to Reception as it is something of a maze   The bed was very comfortable and the room was quiet and conducive to a good night s sleep Although the fridge door was stuck open wouldn t close upon arrival the staff had it seen to quickly

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The only person who spoke passable English was the doorman The lady who greeted us at the reception was not only incredibly rude but also very unhelpful and at times hard to understand The chap who showed us to our room while very nice also did not speak a lot of English The complimentary fruit basket consisted of one pear The staff member who showed us to our room remarked upon this fact with pronounced embarrassment and promised to have it refilled immediately Sadly this solitary pear was with us for the entire duration of our three day stay It never received any fruity or other companions The complimentary bottles of mineral water were non existent Both of these water and fruit were advertised to us on numerous occasions however we never actually had the pleasure of enjoying either of them Repeated complaints to various staff members achieved nothing All in all it was not a horrible experience but one that could have been had at a much cheaper hotel with much less disappointment After all if you stay in a five star hotel you expect a certain something and that was most assuredly lacking   The internet worked very well just as internet should neither too fast nor too slow The room was clean ish The tv was of a size perfectly adequate for the size of the room There was an appropriate number of chairs for a double bedroom

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Only fault was our mini fridge door wouldn t close But nothing major   Free upgrade on arrival Excellent room beautiful building staff all helpful

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Nothing of note   One of the quietest rooms I ve slept in for central London it was a weekend The location was great for that area to stroll around and see the sights The pub and restaurant were also very good options to die in

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Took ages to check in while the manager moved us to another room This turned out to be disabled room The room itself was fine if a little small but the bathroom was awefull Good shower but the wash basin was only 12 x 6 inches and had no mirror above This was across the other side of the room It did have a shaving mirror but this was hanging off the wall The basin was also at wheelchair height which for someone 6 foot is a little low The hotel did not seem to have a resteruant but offered room service at a very high price Staff need a lesson in how to meet and greet guests Remember who is paying the bill and its not the staff   The ambience of the hotel lobby

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The receptionist at check in was extremely miserable and made our first impression not a good one she did not explain any facilities at all to us breakfast times nothing at all we were standing at the desk for a few minutes while she was doing something on the computer and did not even acknowledge our presence or say sorry one moment please I ve worked in a 5 hotel and would get fired if my manager knew I was treating guests like that Worst of all we walked mindlessly around looking for the restaurant there was a bar restaurant next to our room but too loud for us so we went to reception to ask about the other restaurant to which the same rude receptionist said what was wrong with the other one I replied we just wanted a quiet meal We were so offended it was almost as if she didn t want us there and looked down on us Apart from that every other single member of staff we encountered was lovely and so helpful and the food was so impressive   Great facilities very clean room amazing food

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Unfortunately our room overlooked the courtyard which meant that we were woken at 8am when they emptied the bottle bins every morning this took 15 minutes and we had to listen to the guests attending functions shouting until the early hours All in all not good for getting a good nights sleep   Friendly and helpful staff Comfortable bed if you could get some peace and quiet

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Went down for breakfast and there was dead game hanging in the resterant and this has put my wife and my self off staying here again sorry  We love this hotel or we did

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The Bed had a roll together in the night thing I didn t complain as we were only there one night but I would not have wanted a second night   The room was lovely the The staff really great

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: There was absolutely nothing that I didn t like   The bed was extremely comfortable and the room was well appointed I had a most enjoyable stay at this impressive hotel I just wish I could have stayed for longer

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Very noisy at nighttime and curtains in room were not long enough to fully cover the windows so light came in from street lights all through the night resulting in very little sleep   Comfortable bed

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The Room service staff keep getting their tea bags mixed up Menu says Camomile flowers herbal infusion and I keep getting a basic camomile tea bag Has happened twice now Just frustrating as it s on their menu   Great location for Shoreditch Old Street

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: It was difficult to locate at first and the room service mini bar was a little over priced   I loved the little gifts they gave us for our anniversary

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Breakfast was a bit average for the price maybe not worth having it at the hotel I would have liked coffee to be more available during breakfast Clearly they did not understand the concept of caffeine addiction   Great location Close to Liverpool station where London Stansted Express arrives from the airport Easy to walk to two other subway stations that serve a number of convenient lines Great staff Great toiletries I was extra psyched about a cellphone to use during my stay for GPS and phone calls to US As well as about the fruit that greeted me in my room Nice beds 24 hour room service and concierge

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Room too light due to outside spotlight near window   Room a bit light with spotlight outside but generally a good standard hotel Water in reception a nice touch

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Breakfast is expensive at 25   Initially had a problem with our room but it was quickly rectified and we were upgraded to a superior room Excellent service by the staff

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Aircon wasn t working properly very soft bed   Great location next door to the Barbican lovely old brewery buildings some rooms are a long way from reception like ours you have to use two lifts over a bridge around the corner etc Full satellite TV package great rainfall shower

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The bed whist okay was not a super king size most hotels now have beds that my feet stay in 6 7 tall   Clean rooms we had three all good Nothing was too much trouble for the staff We left our luggage there until 17 30 no problem

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The hotel is an old Brewery and as such it can be a bit of a trek to get to your room especially when the lift is not working   Very central for the City of London and for attractions such as the Museum of London and St Pauls Fantastic property comfortable room and very helpful staff

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: When booking the hotel make it very difficult to book with a company card when I asked to do this I was to provide a whole host of private information and after this was sent they did not fulfill the wish to pay with the card and charged the traveller instead When asked about this there was little acknowledgement of the inconvenience caused and when they finally responded they barely apologised and just signed off with the barest of responses Too expensive a place to stay considering the fallow customer service experience Very disappointed but sadly all to common in such places   The location

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: I booked for my son and his girlfriend and thought the deal price was excellent for the location and so did they I know they were happy with everything

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Nothing   Fantastic club room and extra facilities friendly staff and nice touches given to us as we were celebrating our wedding anniversary Will definitely return

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: To ensure value for money I would have expected other services available such as a Spa The shower drain appeared blocked and as such water was all over bathroom floor The room was noisy until quite late as overlooking their event venue with a wedding on that day Fantastic breakfast but don t book via hotel as they appeared to accept walk in for much cheaper prices   Friendly and efficient staff nice old building as old brewery and good deco great location and very comfy bed Great gastro pub next door with amazing food which also provides breakfast

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Perfect location for Liverpool Street station and central London Bed was incredibly comfortable had a great night s sleep Staff on reception were lovely as were housekeeping when I left a dress behind

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Yes there was a few small issues the vanity mirror in the bathroom wasn t working We did report this But it still was not working when we left You do get complimentary water but they do not replace it if you drink it on the first night We stay in hotels across the world and all 5 star hotels do not quibble about complimentary water There were also some issues with some of the furnishings the glass table in the bedroom had clearly been broken in the past and had been repaired badly also the toiletries shelf in the bathroom was loose   We have just left this hotel after a fantastic city break From the moment you walk through the doors you are greeted with a warm welcome from the porters to reception which was a quick and easy process The porter then took us to our room Yes the hotel is split into all different levels but that gives the place some character We stayed in a montecalm club room which was very spacious Breakfast is served at the gastro bar attached to the hotel called the jugged Hare Breakfast was good with a good selection The only warning I would say is that it gets very busy and cramped on a Monday morning due to all the City workers having breakfast So get there after 9am I am finding it difficult to rate this as 5 star due to the issues that we incurred It sits between 4 and 5 stars it just lacks the final Polish and finesse

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: A little bit noisy from the road below  The room was large and comfortable with an excellent bathroom and shower Also very handy for the Barbican Smithfields area The attached restaurant the Jugged Hare is excellent with the best Chicken Caesar salad ever

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: I liked the location and how close to Liverpool Street we were Rooms were perfect and the hotel was genuinely quiet All staff were very polite and helpful

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Couldn t get Air Con working so room was very hot We only found this out during the night but i m sure the staff would have had this sorted out if we had asked   The extras in the room were a big surprise and made this hotel stand out from many others we have stayed in

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: room size was very small bathroom Bath room very small would not take 2 people at a time Booking com said we booked a deluxe room but hotel Said it was stander double Who is to blame   area was good for getting about london

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Absolutely nothing   Fantastic place plush great staff quality fit out Just a 5 minute walk to underground Also the Jugged Hare pub is part of the establishment which had a great ambience Took heed of another reviewer and asked for the east wing The building was once a brewery 300 years old completely refurbished but the numbered rooms don t necessarily follow

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Great building A little challenging to find one s way around but excellent staff always helped Lovely room with lots of amenities Great bar restaurant downstairs

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Rooms could be a little nicer the bathrooms are beautiful but felt like the room decor wasn t very 5   The hotel is stunning in a great location and the Jugged Hare on the corner is fab too Staff let us check in with no problems a little early so we could drop off our bags and get freshened up

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Bed too soft and in need of a new mattress as both rolled into middle of bed or off the edge No proper window therefore no fresh air Would prefer to upgrade to a room with a window in future if an upgrade gives daylight   Staff so friendly and helpful Room so full of extra touches and exceptionally clean

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Wifi could have been better  Really helpful and friendly staff Free upgrade Wonderfully comfy bed and quick efficient room service with delicious food

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: There are a lot of miscommunication The room was too small and i don t feel like staying at 5 star hotel I booked for 2 people but found only one dressing gown We asked the staff to come and pick up the plate after we ate the food in the morning and had to explain why Well the room was too small and we don t have enough space to walk I came back home and my passport disappeared so I tried to call the hotel many times at 9 30 am and no one pick up the phone   We ordered a burger and it was really tasty The hotel provided a smartphone with free internet and free phone call which is very useful

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Within three weeks I used this hotel twice the first time the room they gave is very small but the second time it is bigger and comfortable than previous one However the hotel is very very good hotel   location is very good Room is clean the bed is comfortable Check in and check out is very fast

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Hotel is a warren so be careful which room you get allocated especially if you have luggage You can go up and downstarirs several times Some of the rooms have small windows which make them appear dingy Awkward to unload vehicles if travelling with luggage  Location the upgrades of rooms friendliness of staff Nearness to The Brewery where we were for a function

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: not really 5 star no bar area bar closed by midnight rooms good if not distinguised Almost impossible labyrinth of rooms still a good stop in the heart of the city if the price is right   excellent staff on arrival very helpful

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: No sound proofing with the connecting door to next room which meant that I had to listen to 3 sessions of love making and could hear every word of the talk between next door couple

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The room was really quite small especially for a Club room with no view whatsoever and as with so many hotel rooms gloomy   We had an upgrade to a club room which was appreciated but see the flip side to this

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: my only complaint is the cost of the products on the mini bar were very very expensive 5 75 for some peanuts   Everything was excellent the room was spacious and the bed comfortable and it was great ot have a resturant next door whic hwas excellent to

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The room not being serviced whilst we were out of the room for a four hour period in the middle of the day despite leaving the electronic please clean my room sign illuminated  Excellent front of house ambience around reception where staff are on hand to assist

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: There were some issues with our room On that basis we would not rate the standard of the room as 5 on that occasion   Attractive hotel Friendly professional staff

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Awful service we complained about a leak in our room twice and nothing was done about it Paint was scratching off zero view directly facing a brick wall   Well located hotel

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: At breakfast the tea cup was quite small and I kept having to ask for a refill   The minute I walked into this hotel I was made to feel special and welcome The staff were fantastic The room was beautiful and quite spacious for London and I particularly liked the free fruit and water in the room Breakfast at the pub down the road was also great awesome bacon

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The staff in The restaurant need more encouragement by their manager They were tired and a bit lost   Really fantastic staff confy beds good food and excellent service Good location j

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Constant aircirculation noise that cant be turned off Moved rooms and was just as noisy Really crap sleep Not worth the money compared to other places you could stay   The staff were helpful

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Room was much smaller then expected could do with a lick of paint Reduced price advertised on Booking com is clearly standard room rate would be upset if I had paid several hundred pounds for the room   Staff were very attentive Good location

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: I had booked two rooms for us and our daughter who arrived later on the 12th August and left on the 14th I paid for both rooms in full on arrival and yet when my daughter arrived she was charged again before she could gain access to the room It was rectified the following morning but it was annoying When we checked out on the 15th I was told that I hadn t paid for breakfast for our room although I paid for everything on arrival I had to go back to Reception when we collected our bags as it was going to be investigated further Again it was rectified and I was told there was nothing further to pay but it was annoying and inefficient The Reception staff are lovely but the administration seems muddled The coffee at breakfast in the Jugged Hare was always cold horrible   Location is great and it s an interesting building Staff all friendly and polite Breakfast excellent apart from the old coffee

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Nothing  Type of traveller categories needs more flexibility see the answer I was forced to offer The closest response was Group of Friends None of your categories allowed for the nuance of my visit I was travelling with my son to celebrate my 70th and his 30th birthdays Apart from this no complaints This was my third visit Twice booked by myself and once by my partner Gill Thackray and as ever an excellent experience all round The Jugged Hare excellent also whether simply for a drink at the bar or really good food in the restaurant

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: At breakfast in the club lounge on Sunday and Monday was a little disappointing Firstly the member of staff was a bit abrupt and we had to ask for hot drinks Also there were no yoghurt and considering this was a continental breakfast I found that a little upsettin   Our booking had been incorrect and the manager upgraded us to a club room Most staff were really pleasant and accommodating

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Moved rooms 3 times trouble with bath and lighting no electric points in 028 had to use extension lead and room maids not speaking english one really serious issue needs addressing the sauna spa in the dungeon its steep going down wasnt supervised i slipped and pulled emergency cord nobody came i was scared having just been in hospital Overall it was nice but needs to tweak things i see everyone putting 10 for a score but sadly my expectations are of a high standard for personal reasons   Certain aspects of the rooms as it s not really a hotel and some nice staff loved the four poster bed

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: My only problem was finding my room after going out   The staff went out of their way to be helpful sociable courteous The variety at breakfast was excellent The food at The Jugged Hare was delicious

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: the fact that you have to cross the hotel y outside in order to get to the sauna and steam room There was no lockers while you are in this facility  Staff friendly Room good size

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Nothing Just the fact that Booking seems to have a bit of an issue with the reservation of breakfast it happened to us with another hotel too but that is not the hotel s fault but Booking s   This hotel is in a very central location having quick connections to both King s Cross and Liverpool Street Stations It offers a very comfortable accommodation experience as well as an outstanding breakfast Staff are extremely welcoming and helpful The rooms are well maintained clean and provide good isolation from external noises We appreciate the fact that the hotel puts a lot of thought into making each stay an enjoyable experience for all guests An example of this is the complimentary smartphone available in the room during the stay with plenty of useful touristic information

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Nothing  Everything Fresh fruit in room a lovely touch Hermes toiletries delightful Mini bar well stocked and not unreasonable prices Decor very pleasing Location ideal for Barbican centre Staff friendly and very helpful

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: A C didnt work most nights  Great staff very comfortable bed Stay in East Wing if you dont want to take 2 lifts and go through a convoluted maze of corridors

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: 1 Staff sat on stair eating their breakfast as guest pass by 2 Breakfast being in a nearby pub not being told before booking that was the case and then having booked being told we had not paid when sat in the pub awful Poorly handled and we left 3 Communication is everything and much is lost in translation when there is a language barrier suggest you get some indigenous staff Pl saw don t take that the wrong way but it made everything hard work   Breakfast is a pub around the corner Beware in the event you are not in the list you will be ejected appalling

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: It was quite a trek from reception to our room however this is not really a criticism being part of the layout of the charming old building and the location of the room was very quiet with a lovely view of the courtyard   The room was extremely comfortable the flowers and chocolates I d requested were waiting in the room on arrival and staff couldn t have been more helpful It was our 40th anniversary and we were given a complimentary upgrade and staff had noted our celebration and welcomed us Even without the upgrade the price inclusive of breakfast was one of the best I ve found in London at a luxury hotel I wish I could breakfast in The Jugged Hare every day The hotel made our weekend away one to remember I m sure we ll return

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The shower head would not extend and kept slipping down The location Is Not great for sightseeing faraway from underground  The Bed is huge and so comfortable the room is nicely furnished in keeping with the style of the building Great value at weekends

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Breakfast is overpriced for what is on offer For that price I would expect made to order rather than mass produced buffet   Montcalm at the Brewery is a terrific location for Central London Rooms are good service is good and the bar on the corner has a good atmosphere

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: I stay in a lot of hotels in London From the moment I got there to the mimute we left the staff were exceptional The service is second to none The price does not reflect the standard or the facilities Very pleased and I will definitely be staying again No where competes Very cost effective if your looking for a quality hotel great facilities at a great price

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Our room also faced the inside courtyard area where there were floodlights on 24 7 Even the thick curtains weren t enough to darken the room I would suggest they turn them off or use dimmer lights at night so light sleepers can doze off more easily They also have a marquee set up in the courtyard for events but I guess the guests were moved inside later in the evening so it was still quiet   All staff are really helpful and friendly The room we had was very small but comfortable and stylishly furnished and didn t feel generic The whole hotel has a nice boutique feel Great central location too although not the most charming location being in the business district

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Paid 36 for a Rib of been with hand cut chips Beef wasn t nice and should of been for that price also not hand cut chips they were frozen On departure reception tried saying I owed 59 VAT on the room as they didn t take for it when checked in was about to pay it and checked the price id be quoted and id paid the VAT already   Rooms are incredible beds are so comfy

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Double glazing for front facing road facing rooms to ensure less noise could do with bottle water free in room and more bathroom hooks  Big large comfy beds lovely large bathroom in the clubroom with Nespresso machines to use

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Nothing   Staff were wonderful during the entire stay The hotel is in a very interesting part of London with some great pubs and eateries nearby The Jagged Hare part of the hotel is worth a visit Our room was lovely and quiet the beds awesome felt like the princess and pea Perfect for a London break will happily return

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The air con system was broken in the room and rattled all night as well as the bins being dragged down the cobbled street outside our room at 3am consequently didn t get a lot of sleep   The staff were helpful and the room was ample

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: I was charged 94 for breakfast for my partner and I when we were offered this as complimentary for my partners birthday at check in Only after we ordered and ate the breakfast we were informed the offer only extended to the continental breakfast 94 was utterly ridiculous we would not have bothered had we have known  The location and cleanliness were excellent

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Everything We came here for our 10 year anniversary The staff are lovely food great and the location you couldn t fault I ll definitely be back Thank you for a wonderful weekend in London

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Price could be a little better but we were happy to pay the price   The staff were very welcoming and attentive The hotel did a night visit to the rooms to prepare beds for the visitors The hotel is also 2 minutes walk from a Tescos which is great if you need drinks or snacks There are many restaurants near by and the underground was 5 minutes walk away

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The please clean sign on the door didn t work so we had to ask them to come and clean the room whilst we were out in the evening They were very apologetic and the room was cleaned perfectly they also left extra coffee for me which was most welcome   Lovely room and super comfortable bed

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Nothing to complain about   Reception staff were beyond 5 star Couldn t fault anything about our stay I had emailed ahead to mention it was my husband s birthday To our amazement we were upgraded as were the other two rooms for our offspring and their partners and there was even a bottle of champagne in our room when we arrived We would have no hesitation whatsoever in staying at this hotel again

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Nothing at all Except some sqeeky chair in the room   The most comfortable bed plus the anmeties are incredible The best part is the staff extremely kind and lovely

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The only point of criticism is that it s not clear where breakfast is served also depending on what breakfast you have We were constantly pointed back to the entrance of the hotel on your left hand side but what they should say is that breakfast is served in the pub next door   Quaint hotel with excellent rooms bed mattress pillows of high quality modern bathroom with rain shower Egyptian cotton wool towels Breakfast buffet is excellent with a wide variety of choice

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: A warm welcome was received when we arrived at hotel and check in smooth Our friends had arrived a day earlier and the hotel overheard them say it was my birthday When we got to our room we d been upgraded to a wow suite which was beautiful The staff were very helpful with any queries or questions we had

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Shower in the bath off centre average flow glass screen was too short so floor got wet  Clean comfortable and stylish rooms Air conditioning Friendly staff Excellent cocktails in bar Free mobile phone to use around London

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: A very nice hotel Good service excelent room and bed Recomand to eat and drink on The Jugged Hare gastro pub in the same bulding as the hotel Excelent food

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Air con made a really loud noise at 2am waking us up We had to turn it off Serious amount of steps to get to the room with luggage   Great location Lovely room

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Got lost finding the room though can t change the building Also couldn t figure how to turn off all the lights took the card out in the end   Location room staff

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: I could only choose this hotel because the room was on offer 200 night is max budget on business I squeezed a little more to benefit from this offer

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Feeling second class  Very clean and smart felt like we had been put into one of their smallest rooms because we paid a discounted price also room did not look like the advertised room on your booking form although it was also in the same colours The room was part of the next doors suite in the morning I was over come by the smell of aftershave almost to the point of an asthma attack from a nearby room It was peaceful and staff welcoming I do not believe we booked the bargain I was led to believe

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: THe hotel is more or less in the square mile so very quiet in the surrounding areas at the weekened which meant a little travel to find somewhere to eat but don t let that put you off the hotel has great food   A fabulous hotel with excellent staff from reception to porter and everyone in between Amazing beds and pillows just what you need after a long hard days sightseeing and shopping

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Accommodation on 4th floor and for 3 days lift out of action dinner reservations not made fire alarm at 1 30am and staff unhelpful as to why it is on only the 4th floor List was endless Will not be staying here again   Rooms very clean

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: 1 Complementary water was not restored for the second night 2 Checking in could be faster It seemed the receptionist was trying to practice her Chinese with me I was fine with that but I do not think every customer would find that efficiency enjoyable 3 A false fire alarm went off at 1 00 a m one night but no apology was delivered later 4 A lady with an exotic accent knocked on my door one night asking do you need any sleep service which did not sound very wholesome to me so I was shocked at first but later I learned she just wanted to help make my bed so I would friendly suggest better language drills be located in the hotel   1 Breakfast and room service was amazing a bit pricey though 2 Staff were very friendly and helpful 3 They were generous in providing complementary kits 4 I left my passport in the room and it was really appreciable that the staff let me go inside the room again after my check out to look for it and I found it

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Why do hotels need to have complex bath shower operation All I want is either a simple shower or bath but to be faced with working through the operation options when somewhat tired isn t always appreciated  Very good value

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: used multiple times because of the location but the room has never been clean once Because of the extremely compliated layout of the wings of the building floors and rooms if there were a fire there should be many casualities

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Bit of a maze inside and a little dated needs a lick of paint and more attention to the small details For instance in our room the window might as well have not been there as it was very thin and there were gaps where you could feel the wind coming through just get double glazing And stuff like the curtains not going far enough to cover the window or plonking a big out of date radio next to the bed that didn t even work properly Also we were a little bit angry when the breakfast staff started clearing up and laying dinner service while we were still eating our breakfast And we weren t slow eaters but felt rushed and in the way which for a 5 star hotel is actually horrendous Please don t get me wrong though it was a lovely place to stay it just needs somebody to go through it and sort out the little things that are either unnecessary or impractical And for the kitchen and dining staff to show a little more respect for their guests   Nice people nice rooms and good food Location was quite good as well

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The only one thing negative I have to say is that 24 95 for a continental breakfast is very expensive   Very welcoming very helpful staff friendly The hotel is fantastic all the facilities are first class rooms are fabulous Every night when we came back to our room the maid had turned our bed down and left chocolates on our pillows the beds are very comfortable and there was no noise from other guest in the hotel

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: There is nothing not to like here   The team were fantastic We stayed here on our wedding night last year and wouldn t have chosen to stay anywhere else to celebrate our first year of marriage this year Look forward to staying again next year for the 2nd year anniversary

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Had to go to separate building for breakfast not nice if raining I had noisy function in greenhouse that was situated under my room   Clean comfortable and breakfast good

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The Montcalm At Brewery London City is a wonderful place to stay in London It stands out from the crowds of luxury hotels with the exceptional service absolutely amazing staff and the attention to details I have had an opportunity to travel and stay in some of the best hotels in the world and my stay at the Montcalm At Brewery London City is one of the most memorable My trip to London was for my mother s Birthday celebration it was her first time visiting London and the Assistant Manager of the Montcalm Daisy Slavkova made sure that this was a really trip to remember If you want to experience first class hospitality do not hesitate to book this hotel the staff really goes out of their way to make you feel comfortable and welcomed

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The cups sorcers designed for right handed users only unstable and far too small   The staff are very helpful Enjoyed using the spacious shower room with facilities for disabled users

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
