Full_Review: The courtyard is lovely though it would have been nice if it had actually been possible to have drinks in the marquees set up there They must be reserved for special events The only criticisms I have of our stay are that the walls are a bit thin so when the other guests came in around 1am on both nights we could clearly hear the closet doors and the sound of conversation Also our room had only one bath towel which we only realised after emerging from the shower and there was no bottle opener or corkscrew for the minibar The free bottle of water and the evening chocolates were appreciated but we only had them on the night of our arrival I rather expected that these would be there on the second night as well All minor points   The Montcalm at the Brewery is as the name would suggest in the old Whitbread Brewery right beside the Barbican The building reflects its history and is quirky and stylish Our room 403 was smallish but had most everything you would need including slippers and robe though there was only one robe when we checked in It was on the 4th top floor with only two other rooms in the wing and had a small window overlooking the courtyrard and the gilded weathervane and clock from the brewery days The rooms comes with a smart phone that can be used for touring the city and making free phone calls I didn t use this but it is a nice touch Overall it is good value for London convenient to the Underground and a well appointed and pleasant place to stay and I would certainly return

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Nothing   The staff couldn t possibly have been more accommodating given that my husband and I were travelling with our newborn baby We were offered help getting our daughter s pram in and out I never had to battle opening doors because the staff were totally on the ball and everyone greeted us with smiles We were upgraded to a suite in their apartments over the road from the main hotel because it would be a quieter room for us and the baby which was lovely of them The room was superb I wanted to take the bed home with me everything was immaculately clean the shower was great and we wanted for nothing in the room regarding facilities A fantastic stay for a very reasonable price by London standards and I would go back should I be working in or visiting the area again

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: i was given a room with NO WINDOWS Tiny room with tiny bed and no windows Really strange having no natural daylight but having instead a window to the bathroom Wall that divided the bathroom from the room was clear glass   location was right by where we needed to be and tbh it was the only thing going for it

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: There was some rubbish under the bed and the grouting in the tiles was missing We didn t really enjoy the meal in the hotel and it seemed very expensive compared to local restaurants   the location was amazing and the staff were really helpful

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Lots of great additions to the room such as a steam free mirror in the bathroom to a docking station to play your music Beds extremely comfortable too

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Walk to the room is little far from reception but is still easy to find and not really a problem at all Parking is in nearby carpark and is quite expensive typical london prices   Comfortable beds Large room Great bathroom with a cool glass wall to the bedroom which also closes with an electric blind

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: D cor in places looking a little worn  Fantastic old brewery staff very friendly would have liked to have more time to look around the building and joining restaurant and pub will return

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: phenomenal service made the experience memorable I was there to propose to my partner and they did everything possible to make it a special occasion Amazing staff the best room I have ever stayed in and an all round phenomenal experience Second time I have stayed here and I would only stay here when coming to London

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: We had a room as were attending a wedding at the hotel The only issue is that the room they put us in was in the south building I think and as the hotel is converted from its previous use access was not very straightforward especially with a pram But very helpful staff lovely hotel and the wedding venue was stunning   Good location helpful staff and lovely decor

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Had to leave the hotel and go next door to the pub for breakfast Bed seemed a bit small   Bed was comfy Staff were very helpful and friendly Breakfast was nice

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Having to return back to work   The friendly Staff well appointed bedrooms that were contemporary furnished and a short walk from the Barbican Tube so very central

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: It s London so it s expensive   Staff were amazingly helpful Vlad is a star Furnishings and decoration lovely room was superb Great location at the Barbican good bars and restaurants close by It really is a lovely hotel

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Room was quite small Perfect for 1 person not much space or storage for 2 There were also a couple of things in the room that could have been attended to pen on the curtains a frayed desk chair and the bath tap came off in my hands We received a bottle of water fresh fruit on arrival staying for 2 days i felt that could have been refreshed on day 2   Staying in the City at weekend mean t peace and quiet around the hotel Only a 5 minute walk to the tube to get to the livelier parts of London Great staff very helpful Beautiful setting

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: It was crazy high to climb into Being vertically challenged didn t help but it has never really been a problem before   The bed was super comfy but

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: A bit noisy ventilation Breakfast is expensive   Nice authentic hotel at the old brewery building Good location if you have meetings in City Friendly staff Small nice things water small chocolate

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: nothing  The complimentary phone was one of the best surprises I ve had in a hotel You could make calls and take it with you to use Google maps Great idea

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Not having to have breakfast in a pub Abit poor for standard of rest of hotel   The club room that we got upgraded to was very tiny but the bed was lovely and comfy

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: External noise waste deliveries early in morning The Windows didn t seem to block noise out too well   Staff were always cheerful and seemed happy with their work Room was excellent very modern bed very comfortable rain shower brilliant

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: I took my partner here for his 30th birthday and would highly recommend the hotel the service is excellent the staff are friendly and eager to accommodate you in any way they can The d cor is beautiful the food s delicious and the beds are incredibly comfy The location of the hotel was perfect for where we wanted to go while in London with the tube station a short 3 minute walk away

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Very small room poorly furnished Lots of noise from outside Communication with some of the evening staff was a struggle They were generally less helpful than the daytime staff   The building itself is very attractive as are many of the communal areas bar reception etc Most of the daytime staff were friendly and competent

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Room layout a bit strange due to an old building Quite small room for a 5 star  Very friendly staff good location between 2 Underground station Nice restaurants just around the corner Jugged Hare C te

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Called ahead to confirm booking and mentioned it was mine and my partner s anniversary They upgraded us to a suite for free with a complementary bottle of wine as a gift Service was wonderful the room was comfortable and very luxurious Would recommend

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: We had to change room since the first one was a bit noisy but this was done easily and smoothly  Excellent service both front desk and room Very kind and helpful

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: We were handed a device by a member of staff at our door to use for finding places but our room had knowhere to dock it like our friends did which meant it was useless as it had no power to switch on  Rooms were great size comfy bed great shower staff were very helpful

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The room bed bathroom were a lot smaller than expected The room was also very dark The bath plughole was broken tv remote was not working batteries lights were hard to turn off   Location building staff breakfast all excellent

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The hotel doesn t really have a 5 star feel But London hotels are always expensive for what you get   Good location near tube stop Friendly service

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: no towelling robe gym poor but I was lucky and went when empty need a stepper  loved the little extras in the room smart phone even though didn t use nice villeroy bosch spelt wrong cups nice green teas loads of towels

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The only thing that would have made it a 10 instead of a 9 5 for us was the size of the room While every room has every amenity some of them are small While we didn t spend alot of time in our room because it is London after all we would have liked more space for our luggage  Fabulous facility Amazing welcome from the staff Lots of extra touches such as fruit water and coffee available on arrival Beautiful building and decor Rooms had everything one could possibly need Very modern but cozy Lovely linens care products and bed comfort Easy to get around from nearby tube station Excellent price too

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Nothing everything was Fabulous   From the moment we entered the staff couldn t be more helpful Very attentive lovely decor Can t wait to return

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Paid for buffet breakfast at discounted rate which was great but wish we had known we could have just ordered off the al a carte menu as I love eggs benedict This is just a tiny tiny issue   Attention to detail was second to none From the concierge welcome on arrival to the rooms themselves everything was worthy of the 5 star rating

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The traditional English breakfast in the Jugged Hare was a delicious way to start the day We enjoyed the the club room for a drink and snack between our day of touring and heading out for the evening Staff was nicely attentive and helpful Location is close to 2 Tube stops making touring simple

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Confusion booking in and out We booked an extra night took ages to explain when checking in told she understood the following day after going out and returning with bags found we were locked out of the room another long explanation and again on check out Rooms are small the chair at the desk is too big smaller ones would help Breakfast really expensive and need to go next door Restaurant next door closes at the weekend so the pub is the only option   The bed is to die for really comfortable Lovely luxury items dressing gowns and slippers provided Second night the staff had placed fruit in our room Although there was no bar in the hotel the fridge was well stocked an very reasonably priced So good for parking and round the corner from the Barbican Centre 10 minute walk to St Pauls

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: No bar It would be nice to have a lounge bar to meet up and for a nightcap   Staff fantastic very helpful Stored our cases on arrival and departure so we could extend our days

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The whole hotel had the feel of somewhere that had been given a cheap makeover to make it look more expensive that it was There was poor attention to detail e g on arrival in room we found the fabric on the desk chair to be ripped evidence of poor quality repairs in bathroom The classic double was the smallest hotel room I have ever stayed in made worse by the tiny windows situated high up the wall The hotel is a labyrinth and guests are provided with a poorly designed map to navigate

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Our room was on the small side and didn t have any natural light The window looked straight onto a wall  Great location for the Barbican which is why we made the reservation Not so good for the west end

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Pillows are like bricks I did mention it at reception and they were quite surprised However all of us struggled with them Pillow menu is de rigeur in a 5 hotel non   Lovely beds bathroom hotel itself

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Room little smaller than expected Breakfast was very noisy like a street cafe not what you would expect from a 5 star hotel If we stay again I sure we will deffo opt for the club room breakfast   Good location staff couldn t do enough for us able to get our room before lunch facilities great If not staying in club room would not recommend adding breakfast

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The room Visited twice before but never stayed in the south building and I am will never stay in the south again  Dear location and staff always friendly

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: We stayed room only which was very comfortable quiet with excellent en suite facilities We liked the location close to Barbican and Moorgate tube stations we also enjoyed the fact that it is in the financial district at the weekend and found it amazingly quiet The Jugged Hare restaurant was very good if a little expensive All the staff were excellent

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: I informed the hotel that we were staying for a particular occasion my partners 23rd birthday on arrival they upgraded us to the club room and in the room there were balloons and the number 23 written with rose petals on the bed It was a lovely touch and would 100 recommend

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Room was on the main road and curtains didn t really cut out external lighting Single glazed windows also allowed intrusive noise late on   A very enjoyable experience from start to finish

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Had to get in the bath to start the shower or run the bath The prepaid breakfast was poor value Would have been better off to order off menu   The beds were super comfy Hotel had a great style Staff were very helpful

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: We could hear what sounded like a radio playing in the room even to we didn t have one on people around us were quite noisy and we could hear them very clearly  The bed was super comfortable and I loved the bathroom window and the club lounge was good once we were told about it

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Gym is poor and my card didn t give me access I gave up Also the in room amenities are average I dint mind small rooms provided they re well appointed  Good reception and staff service

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The staff were really welcoming on arrival The dressing gown was lovely to slip into after a shower The fruit and herbal teas were very welcome after a hard day

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: From the reviews I expected more My room was quite average and the location isn t that close to shops or other restaurants although it is in central London   The room was clean and the staff were friendly

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: We had at first a room which was directing to the courtyard It was a bit dark and noisy due to the AC ventilators and you couldn t open the windows I like to sleep with open windows We asked if it would be possible to change the room and the very friendly lady at the reception checked with the manager and gave us another one which was bright calm and friendly Before we left the hotel the manager enquired about the problems we had with the other room Very delightful experience Would definetely come again

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Did seem to be like a maze with endless corridors and difficult to find your way around but not too critical for me sauna not that good   Very friendly staff great central location great facilities liked the steam room bed just right with fluffy pillows very quiet inside the room excellent hot hand held and rainfall showers with all accessories included Did not need it but did have iron hair dryer free tea coffee with kettle and a bottle of water with 3 shiny apples absolutely wonderful stay very good value for money and Vlad at the door with his bowler hat and suit really topped it off with his affable and friendly manner total joy recommended

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Nothing   Staff were amazing especially Grazia Guest Relations hotel was modern immaculate and a pleasure to stay Got an upgrade which was so appreciated Club Lounge is great and serve fabulous drinks and snacks free of charge All the staff are so friendly professional and cannot do enough for you They treat you so well you think that your the only guest Will be back

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: 50 extra added to the room bill in case of any damage I wasn t aware of this but understand the policy Reimbursed once you check out So this is knitt picking   The staff made sure we had an excellent stay and were so accommodating after I told them that our stay was part of a surprise for my girlfriend s birthday They organised some champagne to be sent to the room which was a really nice touch Staff were very helpful when asking for directions and recommendations also Great breakfast in the pub next door included in the price Check out is not until 12pm and breakfast is served until 11am which gives you time to organise your morning day

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: There wasn t anything not to like Maybe a map of the hotel as hard to find room without assistance  The room was beautiful the bed very comfortable and the staff were helpful and attentive

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Complete nightmare trying to find your room It is a complete rabbit warren At one point I just wanted to find a phone ring reception and ask them to come find me and take me to my room I am staying again in a couple of weeks and have asked for a room on the first floor of the main building Guy was very lovely and took note of my request   Beautiful building and lovely staff Good location for Barbican where I was on a training course

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Online customer service should be vastly improved Emailed requesting table reservations in the 2 associated restaurants on seperate nights Received an email back basically saying book them yourself  Staff in the hotel were very welcoming and helpful Nice quiet location with nearby tube Both restaurants were of a good standard

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: A stylish hotel with comfortable beds and very helpful staff A bit pricy if you have to pay the full rate so look out for promotions If you don t want the hotel breakfast there s a Pret a Manger just down the road note that it s not open on Sundays

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The bed in the Club Room was very small In fact my husband and I woke up a lot during the night as it was just too small for us both it was a small double Too many light switches in room I nearly got smacked in the face by the doorman who slammed the door in my face   The hotel was beautiful Great complimentary breakfast and drinks in the club room

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: We didn t like the fact that the rooms are small and cluttered with plenty of things we don t need There is no space to put our clothes or computers Too many things in a very small space Uncomfortable bed and too high Not a good sound insulation We could hear people pass in the corridor at night and also outside on the street   We liked the location 15 minute walk to the city 30 minutes to Islington 2 tube stations close by

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: All members of staff were friendly and efficient The room was clean the bed extremely comfortable and there was a nice range of Elemis toiletries in the bathroom We were pleasantly surprised to find at night that the bed had been turned down chocolates were placed on the pillows and a bowl of fruit had been left for us We had a lovely stay at this hotel

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Room was ground floor 029 overlooking the street Old sash Windows meant it was freezing in the bathroom and very noisy I woke up early to what sounded like people next to the bed they were on the street walking past  Lovely staff

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: There was absolutly nothing that i would say was a let down at this hotel   This is the best ever hotel i have ever stayed in The staff were absolutly brilliant This is how customer service should be An amazing gem of a hotel This is how it should be done Pure bliss

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: In order to charge our mobile phones overnight we had to keep the key card in place to ensure a flow of electricity to the room Unfortunately this meant that we couldn t switch off the light above the tea coffee making section We also felt it was dangerous to not have any lights on at all if you needed to get up in the night Also although the pillows were changed to non feather pillow they were rock hard and very uncomfortable We hardly slept due to the light being continually on and the rock hard pillows Breakfast was very over priced as you couldn t have a small breakfast like coffee toast without paying an excessive amount we bought fresh croissants from Tesco around the corner instead   The Reception staff were very pleasant

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: All was perfect  Told staff before arrival that it was a surprise trip for my partners birthday they put champagne and chocolates in the room with a birthday message and balloons on the bed Wonderful service

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Had a club room that was really quite small previously stayed in a club room that was twice the size   Very luxurious hotel Large comfortable beds Staff very helpful Breakfasts amazing

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The location is in the city so for leisure not really convenient But we knew and we choose it due to the great value of the room Also it s an old building so it has long and winding corridors and lots of stairs in unexpected places   The room was big enough the bathroom was amazing the bed was extremelly comfy the services top notch and the staff amazing

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Our room which was not the cheapest available had a bizarre bathroom with a tiny cloakroom style sink It was thoroughly uncomfortable   Great staff Good location

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Really small bedroom everything was crowded not even space for small suitcase Lots of walking around complicated buildings Lots of steps   Comfy bed Powerful shower Complimentary water

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Nothing  All the facilities in the room were excellent and the bed was very comfortable as well Due to twins celebrating a 21st birthday the rooms had been decorated beautifully with balloons and petals what a lovely touch

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Requested on booking and early check in for a room in quiet area Was provided a room in separate building over looking road so there was traffic noise Air conditioning in room was too hot and many attempts to reduce temperature failed Had to open window to reduce temp so road noise interumpted sleep When using shower water poured through ceiling light fitting next to shower Very dangerous as possibility of electric shock as had to walk through pouring water and large puddle to get out of bathroom It took over 25 mins for anything to be organised by hotel staff for me to use another rooms shower Very poor communication This made me very late in my schedule so demanded a taxi to take me to my appointment which the hotel paid for something I guess No reduction of room rate to compensate for inconvenience   Pretty standard hotel room Bed was comfortable

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The bed could ve been slightly larger The staff could ve had a better idea of the location of the rooms the shaving mirror light could ve worked   Nice features in the room coffee machine umbrella the mobile phone etc Friendly staff

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The only thing missing was a view nothing they can do about that otherwise a very good hotel   The staff were exceptional every one we met and we met quite a few were helpful and friendly they make the hotel special Comfortable room Good breakfast The club lounge was excellent Provided plenty of milk with of tea coffee in the room which was refreshing

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: No on site parking but at weekends you can park on single yellow lines so no issue for us  Superb rooms and hotel Free mobile phone and wifi Free international and local calls Free fruit Super bed and bath Great staff

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: We requested a quiet room and were placed away from the road which was great However what we didn t notice when we arrived but did when we were trying to get to sleep was that there were people continuously moving about above room 235 floor 2 all night There are no rooms available on this floor so presumably it was the staff It was noticeable enough to delay getting to sleep and to wake you up again during the night   The rooms were spotless cleaned throughout the duration of our stay one night which we weren t expecting The mini bar was well stocked and refilled and the room was extremely well equipped with everything you could possibly need

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The hotel is huge confusing with long corridors on different levels and the signs are misleading signs to lifts and reception lead nowhere It is impossible to find your way around Several staff members agreed but said there was nothing they could do The bathroom fittings are broken and the hot water system so complex it is impossible to use When I asked staff if they enjoyed working there they said no the hours are long and the pay is poor   Staff were helpful

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Reception wanted to relocate us to a sister hotel upon check in selling it as an upgrade but also suggesting we didn t have a choice Confusion about the booking type of room breakfast included yes no but everything was solved fine eventually   Very good hotel situated in an old brewery at an excellent location Perfect breakfast at The Jugged Hare Value for money thanks to the significant discount during the weekend

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Amazing staff big thanks to concierge Vlad who made sure our stay was special Liked the room spacious by London standards Location was excellent for our needs Overall it was a 5star experience

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: It s a very nice hotel for the price but not really a 5 star We didn t like having to walk out of the hotel and to a pub for breakfast It doesn t tell you anywhere that this is the case The rooms are not soundproof you can hear the traffic at any time and creaking floorboards The staff was very friendly helpful when we arrived but after that anyone could have walked into the hotel despite a huge number of staff   The food was excellent but as you had to walk out of the building you don t really associate it with the hotel It was great to have the handy but the tool itself is not very advanced The bed was very comfortable

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: This was our third visit to this hotel and each time the room has gotten smaller and smaller to the point where we weren t y very comfortable with the space we had and it made the room very hot meaning the air conditioning wAs on all night quite noisy might try another hotel next time shame  The reception staff were excellent and the bed was very comfortable

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: There are a lot of stairs so this might be inconvenient for people with disabilities   The club lounge was very comfortable and the stuff there Simona was very polite and helpful The hotel was great

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Upon arrival we were missing a bathrobe and our tissues were not topped up when empty When checking out the doorman insisted on watching our bags so we left them by him at the front door outside when we came back to the door he was no where to be seen and the bags were left outside on their own So not 5 star as a few details have been missed but otherwise excellent 4 5 out of 5  Great location just by the Barbican tube stop We had breakfast in bed both days which was hot and excellent Good WiFi Nicely decorated Great hermes toiletries

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Issues with mini bar not being stocked broken glass in the carpet and room was not cleaned despite 2 chase calls  Good location nice hotel with good facilities

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Since the hotel is located in a 300 years old building it was confusing getting to my room and I had to request the help of the staff Hotel is located on the Financial district so location is not very convenient for tourism purposes Metro was located a few blocks away Rooms are small WIFI worked well   The staff was very helpful Breakfast was very good Hotel lobby is beautiful

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: This is not a criticism more an observation As a tourist the hotel location is a little out of the way hence quiet at night However Moorgate tube station is a mere 5 minute walk away as is Bank But be aware there is a large building site blocking a direct walk Barbican tube is nearby too St Paul s Cathedral is a 15 minute walk so overall the hotel is not badly placed But the location does not have a wow factor of for example overlooking a London landmark the river This is not an issue for me but may be for some   Very welcoming and attentive staff clean comfortable room on ground floor some slight traffic noise as a result as expected in Central London I really cannot fault the service I was travelling with my sister niece we had two adjacent rooms We spent our time exploring London so I cannot comment on any of the facilities or even breakfast But given what we did experience of the hotel I would expect them to be impressive

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Rooms are slightly on the small side but more than adequate   The location was great just a few minutes walk from both Moorgate and Barbican tube stations Moorgate is maybe slightly closer but if it is raining take the covered underpass to Barbican Friendly staff and doormen and was very grateful of the lend of a large umbrella during the rain

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: It was an adjoining room which wasn t specified when we booked it was locked though We could hear clearly through the door which was a little awkward Check in could be quicker and the lobby maybe a little more comfortable tea coffee papers maybe And air conditioning instructions would be helpful   When they found out it was my birthday they spoilt me with cake wine balloons a card and rose petals on the bed It was truly lovely and made the day even more wonderful Bed comfy room spotless and the staff couldn t have been more helpful

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: We did get the room for a very good price but it was very small We would have started to feel bit claustrophobic had we been staying for more than a night but for the price we were very happy I m not use that I would have been happy to pay much more for a room of that size   Service was excellent We were made to feel important and they couldn t do enough to make us feel welcome Lots of nice little touches too like a hair scrunchie in with the shower cap and Elemis toiletries A lovely place and hope to go back one day

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: I didn t like that a flexible rate meant I was due to be moved to their new city road hotel It was with an upgrade but the hotel was chosen due to its location so I di not want to relocate The hotel did find us a room in the London brewery in the end  The hotel is quirky and beautiful at the same time The rooms are nice clean and modern The club lounge is a nice touch with snacks available free of charge The jugged hare is a Fantastic little gem good food and great gins The bar manager made a beautiful gin and tonic with a twist a definite must I would go back to the hotel

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Not a huge amount to do around the hotel  Upon checking in the receptionist realised it was my birthday the previous day They offered us an upgrade to the M by Montcalm at Shoreditch in a suite with complimentary breakfast When getting to our room room service bought complimentary cakes wine and fruit

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Location is slightly off near Barbican but very close to tube so easy to get to central London   The bed was like a meringue exceptionally comfortable

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Breakfast expensive at Jugged Hare but tasty   Really easy reach to Barbican Changing the doormats during the day a subtle and nice touch Welcoming door and concierge staff

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Cleanliness could be improved as we found that a towel and a cup had not been cleaned properly Nothing serious but it stood out in contrast to the high standard of the hotel   Very kind responsive and helpful staff Quick check in and check out Great breakfast Very comfortable and well equipped rooms Location is very central with great links to trains buses and underground We will consider returning to this hotel for our next visits to London

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Room was small and being at the front of the hotel there was road noise Staff at check in could have been more helpful but the rest of the staff were fantastic   Comfy bed

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Not the best location in London for a weekend but walking distance from main attractions   The room well we had been upgraded the Hermes products in the bathroom the staff the pub just outside

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Nothing it was all great  You were made to feel special at all times nothing was too much trouble by the staff have stayed before and will stay again great value for money

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The overall stay was excellent upon arrival we were promptly meet and our luggage taken and checked in whilst offered complimentary drinks Room upgrades were given as we were celebrating a friends birthday and the hotel had made a cake and placed a free bottle of bubbly in the room arranged by Daisy the Assistant House Manager Service from staff was exceptional and the rooms very clean and comfortable During 5 30 7 30 the complimentary services in Club Lounge were very satisfactory Breakfast was in lovely surroundings and exceptional standard Our stay was fault less and we will be returning in the summer as a consequence having stayed at many hotels even the higher rated for facilities don t always get service right but the Montcalm had everything expected and more

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The staff were the most attentive helpful we have ever come across They nearly made the trip for us Superb value for money as well as an excellent location only a couple of mind walk from the tube station

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Nearest tube was a little further than we wanted and had to travel quite a while on the underground to get to the main attractions in London   The staff were lovely the hotel was modern and clean and they went to extra effort to make our anniversary special

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Wish I could have stayed for longer   Possibly one of the best hotels I have stayed in exceptional service friendly relaxed atmosphere comfortable rooms and beds had an exceptional nights sleep Stayed there for business but felt more like a holiday when I checked out Highly recommended

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The bed wasn t as large as we hoped   The room was very nice Staff was extremely helpful and kind English breakfast was great And the location suited us well

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Nothing  A fantastic welcome Great service Very comfortable bed in a beautiful room with great facilities Being a Club room we had access to the Club lounge which was a real treat

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: There was an issue with my room but the staff were accommodating and upgraded me to a new room however when we got there ut was already occupied Quite embarrassing But the staff changed my room again and offered complemintary breakfast

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The room I stayed in was on the third floor and required a native guide to find We took the lift to I think the first floor walked across a bridge then took the lift to the second floor then climbed stairs to the room on the third floor Taking the main lift to the third floor did not bring me to my room which was on the third floor but in a different wing from the reception area Staff were extremely helpful and pleasant However the room had tiny recessed windows allowing no natural light in so the roof felt a bit claustrophobic

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Having reserved 4 separate rooms for 4 separate parties in advance I was surprised to find on the day before we were due to check in that the hotel had decided to deduct the full amount from my account without advising me or asking me for authority On the day of arrival I explained this to the check in staff they said they just blocked the amount that it hadn t left my account that they would only deduct the amount for my room However 4 days after checking out my bank still shows the full amount as being deducted when I rang to query I was given some lame excuse about it being my banks fault Will not stay here again

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The Standard double rooms were so small you couldn t move around in them There was no hotel lounge area only an adjoining pub which you could not bring a small child to in the evening so we were stuck in our room   The Club rooms were lovely and spacious The travel cot provided was clean and of a good standard and the staff were very helpful in regards to our requirements to heating up our babies food

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The hotel is a little out of the way near the north side of the Barbican Centre and north of London Walls in the City of London The area is a Brewery Conservation area and this hotel has been tastefully restored into a chic hotel however in my view it lacked atmosphere There was no communal area to relax with other guests unless you had booked a room which would give you access to a small lounge area but it was not available to all guests just a few The Jugged Hare pub next door is actually part of the hotel but operates as a normal pub with access by the general public straight from the street Our room 035 was situated directly over a set of traffic lights at quite a busy crossroads in Chiswell Street this meant we heard traffic all night long on the first night so be warned Complained the next morning and was given a room across the road in the Montcalm Suites This was better and much quieter I m sure staff knew our original room was not quiet even though I had requested a quiet room I must say I have noticed this kind of treatment from other hotels where my booking had been made via Booking com I am now convinced some hotels give Booking com customers reduced service including allocating less bookable rooms Oh and one other thing there are some tables chairs located outside the Montcalm Suites On the day when we moved rooms we noticed a number of used drinking glasses on one of the tables When we checked out 3 days later those same glasses were still there on the table Why hadn t hotel staff noticed this and removed the glasses Pretty poor in my view   The price for 4 night stay including a Friday and Saturday night stay was very good via Booking com

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: We upgraded at reception where we had free happy hour drinks and snacks which we found was excellent and good value for money Would definitely recommend

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: our room faced out to a wall about 6ft away so quite dark as v little natural light But we weren t there much in daylight and it was quiet as requested On the other hand we counted 17 lights in the room you can turn on so not really a problem No room here is going to have much of a view anyway   very comfortable quiet room excellent breakfast excellent situation excellent bathroom partitioned off from room by glass screen so you have to know who you are sharing with quite well though there is a screen to pull down However this means you can watch tv from the bath or loo Uniformly charming staff Just to note you have to set the little light with the picture of the maid by the door if you want the room done we should have read the room notes Quirky layout memorise the route to your room

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: We thought everything was perfect for us   From the moment we arrived we were treated like royalty We had a 21 month old and could do enough for us Great location near London Liverpool Street All the staff we encountered were very pleasant

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Nothing   Luxurious feel to the room and bathroom Bed was extremely comfortable Access to the club lounge was great for us and the inclusive breakfast was brilliant

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: I didn t like being upgraded by an officious receptionist to what was to be a very dark no windows room across the road in another building which had the benefit of a kitchen We felt obliged to accept the room as we weren t offered anything else and didn t want to make a huge fuss when our reluctance wasn t already acknowledged by the receptionist However while I was out my husband had to ask for another room he never complains he couldn t get any work done because of the noise right outside our bedroom door which was the first room on the ground floor I am happy to get the room I book and pay for and don t like being fobbed off with something else just to suit the hotel It certainly didn t appear to be any kind of an upgrade If they don t like customers paying a reasonable rate for the rooms then they shouldn t advertise on booking com   The reception area was very glamorous Some of the staff were very helpful and very pleasant especially in the bar and restaurant The bed and pillows were extremely comfortable The bathroom was lovely and the toiletries excellent

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Nothing   The service is impeccable for the price This was my first experience with 5 star service Welcome included complimentary fresh fruit and water evening greetings of chocolates tea and coffee The king sized bed was like sleeping on clouds No hallway noise was audible I wish would could have stayed for more than just our single booked night The decor is beautiful

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: There were a couple of functions in the brewery building behind which our room faced which we could hear into the early hours It wasn t loud enough to wake you up but it was still audible   Really comfy bed Loved the technology including pushing the button that leaves a light on outside for do not disturb or house keeping Very friendly and welcoming staff

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: I found the beds a little too soft I didn t like sinking in   Top class service Staff extra attentive knowledgeable and very helpful going out of their way to make guests feel like royalty The hotel is beautifully furnished in a historical brewery building The staff looked very smart and confident and added so much to the posh ambiance The rooms were awesome and had all those extra bits that make for a luxurious personal space Loved the breakfasts at the Jugged Hare I enjoyed my time at the Montcalm very much and will certainly visit again

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Staff coming into the room while we were in the room to empty the mini bar felt like we were under suspicion that we might take something perhaps could have been done prior to us being shown to the room  Room was excellent staff excellent extremely polite and helpful

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: There was nothing i didn t like The location could be better but thats just a personal thing   The service was excellent The staff were more than helpful first class I had a club room and the facilities were really good Bed really comfortable with big pillows We had the continental breakfast and it was the best continental breakfast I ve had on my travels There was lots of choice and everything was fresh and really good quality An excellent stay overall

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: There were a couple of minor complaints with the room nothing major We wanted a drink in the lounge that took a long time to arrive   The rooms are lovely if a little small and the building is lovely The staff were very attentive and friendly

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Had to queue for breakfast Could not get the tv to work from the bed Bath shower tricky to operate Carried own case to reception to checkout  Case carried to room Good choice of breakfast Lots of extras in room

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: It would be better if there was a bar restaurant on site but that is only a small issue we loved our stay  The rooms were lovely if a bit small staff all incredibly pleasant and helpful

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The staff forgot to send me the invoice via email as promised   Excellent Location just a few minutes away from Moorgate Barbican tube station clean room comfy bed great hospitality

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Staff were excellent in the hotel itself as well as in the Jugged Hare bar and in the restaurant When they found out it was our anniversary they sent some cup cakes and chocolates as well as a bottle of wine to our room

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The toilet cistern kept on running which was irritating but it was sorted   Lovely staff particular thanks to the doorman he was really cheery helpful and informative

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: It was all good  Vlad the doorman was awesome a very happy chappy helpful and welcoming the glass window between the bedroom and the bath it was great fun

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Small room described as deluxe A small very high window that you couldn t see out of Remember this is a deluxe room A duvet type cover on top of the mattress which you slept on not under Curtness of the staff Hotel is like a rabbit warren Only a couple of sachets of coffee   The free wifi

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: 1 my check in I arrived at 5am to be told my room wasn t on the system and told to take a seat while the person next to me was told they got a free upgrade 2 as the hotel has many stairs that you have to take there should of been an offer atleast to bring down my luggage for checkout 3 5 star hotel not having bath robes bit rubbish 4 shower itself is terrible zero water pressure 5 bottled water is a usual also that wasn t there overall pretty disappointing  Bed was good and hotel is nice loved the bar underneath

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Only one very minor quibble We were in a room directly over a restaurant where a private party was happening well into the early hours It didn t bother us in the slightest but just imagine if Bridezilla had got that room   It was my wife s 50th birthday so we d booked in for the weekend at a hotel that we d normally consider to be several points above our usual level It was well worth it Despite the fact that the staff were dealing with three different wedding parties and a particularly moody Bridezilla at the time we booked in they found the time to make us feel welcome and surprise us with a bottle of champagne and a divine chocolate brownie Later that night we returned to our room after seeing a show to find the staff has covered the bed with rose petals and arranged them to make a 50 The room was very nice luxurious without being showy The beds were perfect And the ritual of working out how the bathroom shower worked was made easy by the simple instructions next to the plumbing The hotel is in a converted brewery hidden behind the Barbican on the fringes of the City During the weekend it s a quiet oasis in the middle of the town

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: We were disappointed and didn t feel it lived up to a 5 tar We were shown to our room but the eye old not open the door Porter left and came back with a master promising to return with keys Never cne back Only on leaving room for dinner I d we realise he had put us in wrong room Also remote fr tv did not or properly Very little space for makng tea coffee quite awkward Also felt that there was inadequate drawer space for clothing

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Requested bath but only shower provided Rooms were not ready when we arrived and then were not as requested Explanation was there had been a wedding the day before and fashion show that day Breakfast too expensive to consider  Comfy bed Good location Quiet Staff tried to be helpful and were very polite

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The continental breakfast could have had more variety been in a larger dining room  The staff were so so friendly and helpful The bed was super comfy and the location great and easy for getting into central london We had a fantastic weekend stay and the staff were really just so helpful and friendly The hotel feels really luxe and it was like nothing was too much trouble

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Noisy Room had to ask to move Breakfast was extremely bad was told to dine in Club room long queue no food left totally inadequate space and very little choice   A great deal of staff and very attentive and helpful

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: There was no complimentary gin available in the Club Lounge at 6 45pm on Friday So no pre dinner G T Very poor and not re stocked before 7 30pm despite several requests Given we were offered complimentary use of the Lounge with our package and that it was re iterated at check in this was pretty poor from a 5 hotel Stock on the breakfast buffet in the Club Lounge wasn t replenished quickly enough given how busy it was at 9 30am on Saturday Breakfast was good though once it was filled up Overall the Club Lounge was rather disappointing the staff and there were always several didn t seem to manage the volume of customers well not what I d expect from this standard of hotel   Very comfy bed Enza was an excellent member of staff at breakfast very friendly and efficient Excellent value menu in the Chiswell Street dining rooms for Friday night dinner excellent value menu with very good service and excellent food Wine reasonable prices to for quality wines

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Nothing to fault   The reservation team went above and beyond to create a romantic experience for me and my boyfriend This included rose petals swan shaped towels a welcome note and snacks We had a lovely Valentine s Day which we will never forget

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Only negative comment was the bed was actually very high Someone with poor mobility would struggle   Literally everything Great service incredible room

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Several of the rooms we tried had strange noisy vibrations in them coming from pipes or fans the staff on the desk didn t know about them but the people who took us around did we had asked for a quiet room and it took three tries before one was found for us also the music in the jugged hare was far too loud for breakfast we asked them to turn it down but the staff weren t too happy about it it was like a disco in there ditto in continental breakfast room background music is called that because it s background it was oppressive

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Rooms too dark and very hot A C noisy kept us awake bed too small double with mattress topper most uncomfortable  Staff very friendly and hotel spotlessly clean Breakfast excellent quality and value

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Remote control didn t work very well its the only thing we could find fault with   Really comfy bed slippers and robe were provided in the club room as were a number of other added items such as an umbrella and a fruit bowl Staff were wonderful we could not have been made to feel more welcome

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Breakfast rates were too high for us to afford so we went out for that Even with a discount was over the top   Very attentive and friendly staff Lovely atmosphere

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Breakfast was excellent chef obviously took pride in his work Beds really comfortable Reception staff from door man to management all really accommodatiing and friendly

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Fabulous hotel lovely rooms fully equipped for all our needs all staff were helpful and friendly Excellent value for money especially as we were given an upgrade on our room Highly recommend

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Corridors but that s the nature of the excellent refit from brewery to hotel   Location comfortable modern rooms excellent food only ate in the Jugged Hare bar and the club bar for pre dinner drinks

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Worst breakfast you could get at that price What s even worst I was charged for the whole stay after I asked no more breakfast due to it s poor quality Salmon was low quality pain aux raisins was not fresh at all The hotel itself is a maze and it s easy to get lost   Bedding is great location was perfect

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Ideal location for work restaurants entertainment Very comfortable room and fantastic facilities Doormen are fantastic curteous and immaculately turned out truly great hotel

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The breakfast price was immense so we went out for it Shame would have been nice to have it at the hotel for 15 per head   Lovely staff on reception Room was modern clean and still had character Toiletries were really good

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The breakfast cost a lot more when booked through booking com than at the reception   This was a very pleasent suprise real comfort and style a stone s throw from the Barbican The staff were very focused on helping and pleasing and the room had several complimentary extras Food was very good

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Nothing really   The staff were unfailingly polite and helpful Our club room was very acceptable with some nice luxury touches We really appreciated the canapes and drinks in the club lounge which set us up nicely for our Barbican theatre trip just one minute s walk away The hotel is very well placed for sight seeing in the City of London and is an interesting historic building in its own right If you don t fancy the dining opportunities within the hotel there is plenty of choice in Whitecross Street just across the road All in all a very nice place to stay at a decent online price We recommend it

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Nothing  Amazing room in an amazing building Very friendly and helpful staff Breakfast was lovely had full English in the hugged hare Would definitely stay again Overall 10 10 couldn t have asked for a better stay

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: On arrival we were put in a very small room which we were not happy with We were then moved to the correct club room but we thought it was still quite dull looking but more spacious than the first room The first night we placed our breakfast card on the door for breakfast to our room the next morning we woke up early expecting breakfast between 8 45am 9 15am and opened the door to see if anyone was coming and noticed nobody had even taken our breakfast card so we had to phone reception so our breakfast was late And again was late the second morning Very poor this year especially when our expectations where so high after a great time last year   The bed was very comfy had a great sleep both nights

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: I took Deluxe room and I knew it will be smaller room but they gave us room divided with fire door in the middle of room and then you fell like inside small box not in the room In so small room were doors for bathroom and that fire door and behind them wardrobe with minibar In room was space only for bed and small table nothing else You won t find photos of it on website   I asked for very soft bed and we got it It was great Breakfasts were nice

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The staff is plentiful and kind but not so experienced The minibar wasn t filled after we drank some and someone got into the room unexpectedly while I was using the bathroom   The breakfast is great and true value for money

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Absolutely nothing   Can not recommend this hotel highly enough The building is lovely the room was really nice with the comfiest bed I have ever had in a hotel Every member of staff were extremely friendly and helpful Every little touch in this hotel makes your stay so enjoyable This has become my number 1 hotel in London and I will always endeavour to stay here

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: That I had to leave so quickly   Beautiful venue in a great location with exceptional service and friendly staff One of the best hotels I ve stayed at in a long time

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: We were upgraded to a different cheaper Montcalm hotel on the pretext of a power failure whereas actually there was a VIP function it would appear they didn t want us near I was promised I d be contacted to explain the different room rates Still waiting   Never got a chance to see anything

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: I am afraid that the breakfast room which was at the back of the pub it was connected to didn t live up to my expectations of the actual hotel The staff on the Sunday morning were not in correct attire for a 5 star hotel and the room was over crowded with some guests having to wait for a seat or take hot plates of food up and down the stairs to an overflow seating area It is a shame that this let my stay down   Hotel staff very polite and changed my room to one with a larger bed

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: We were in room 419 and were very conscious of the fact that there was no adequate curtains at the window in the bathroom when it was dark and we had the light on   Very comfortable bed Beautiful room and hotel building Staff were extremely friendly and helpful and location was perfect for our visit

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The taps and lights were all a little too flashy and it wasn t needed and was confusing The breakfast in the trendy pub across the road was extraordinarily expensive and we went without  Nice hotel friendly staff good location and interesting historic building

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Terrible room very small and incredibly hot Didn t get a wink of sleep all night which spoilt our next day We have stayed several times before and have always been delighted with our room so very disappointing to have had such a poor standard this time   Friendly staff and good location

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The bed was too soft for me the kettle didn t boil hot enough and their wasn t enough shampoo for two people   The shower was amazing the complimentary coffee tea and biscuits were great Sky sports in the room was a brilliant bonus

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: I should have requested an orthopaedic mattress as I found the bed too soft for my comfort Next time I will ask if they could provide that   Fantastic breakfast buffet Very friendly staff

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Very small room Very noisy Room very difficult to find No restaurant open at the weekend most local restaurants also closed at the weekend esp Sunday Reasonable value at 118 but certainly not worth the 325 advertised rate   Very comfortable bed

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The breakfast room in the jugged hare adjoining restaurant was very crowded and so on our first morning we had to sit in isolation in the basement room 2nd day was excellent though  The club bedroom was very comfortable the bed was huge and the Hermes toiletries were gorgeous The club lounge a great idea complementary snacks and drinks for guests Breakfast was very high quality

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Nothing really some staff could have been a little more attentive happy courteous most were excellent though This is only a small criticism on a high rated stay   Very nice building and a lot of effort has gone into a very nice interior Rooms were spacious well equipped and very comfortable On site Jugged Hare gastro pub was bustling book a table is recommended and served an excellent spread of breakfast options and evening meals Would not hesitate to stay again for leisure or work

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Nothing   We stayed for a couple of nights the staff were really very friendly almost too helpful The room was very nice breakfast was good no complaints

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Stay every year for last 3 years Last two years I have had email from Montcalm a few days before date I was booked in for offering rate at over 60 off room rate I had paid I booked thru booking Com and was advised to book direct in future My experience this year was that doing so resulted in much the same higher rate offer I would hope regular guests would be given good rate Your central reservations unit offered free breakfast which was welcomed but hopefully next years experience is better on initial booking   Friendly staff

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Very noisy hotel I have stayed their 3 times and twice have had to move room Air con very noisy when you need it on 2 out of 3 rooms and outside there is a large air conditioning unit which is also loud Shame as good location and staff are nice

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The first evening of our stay the customers next to us were having a party and made much noise in the corridor at 1h in the morning We called the reception The staff was very helpful and tried to persuade our neighbors to go back in their own rooms And the most incredible thing is the next evening Night Manager of the hotel gave us a bottle of champagne for apologize This is a real five star hotel

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: When checking in was told breakfast wasn t included in my booking when it was had to show booking confirmation to prove it was included Room was cold black mascara stain on the white bed covers bathrobes had no ties on them   Hotel is very nice room was very nice too and a good size with a large bed staff are helpful and friendly breakfast was very nice with a good selection

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: We were told that afternoon tea would be delayed to 530pm A lot of staff who did not put themselves out to help but seemed to linger expecting a tip A great deal of walking along corridors with flights of steps to get from reception to our room including a covered footbridge to get from 1 part of the hotel to another Quite a long walk to the car park involving quite a walk underground 34 charge to park overnight   Bed comfortable Quiet location Well fitted out Clean

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: There was a fan outside our window which was annoying to begin with but soon became unnoticeable Also no view from our window   Beds extremely comfortable Lovely treats left in our room for our anniversary Great shower

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Although the breakfast was very good it felt quite chaotic at times as there wasn t a lot of room in the restaurant and both mornings we had to wait in the bar until a table became available   The room was very comfortable only problem was there wasn t enough light The breakfast was very good with plenty of options

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: If you are not traveling alone in business mind I highly recommend to avoid this hotel We booked their double premium room as expected to have normal size bed and larger room What we get was smaller room than in description and the bed was less than 160cm wide and bumpy in center For two it was very difficult to sleep and caused backaches After two nights we got another room but there was no warm water in the shower only freezing cold In morning when we waited long for it to be fixed we lost our prebooked transportation to the airport and although they promised that manager will contact us later no contact or any compensation Never visit there again if travel as couple

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Exceptionally poor service for a five star hotel first told that I should move to Another hotel then told that breakfast wasnt included all was wrong Eventually put in some annex building Staff didn t seem to have a clue

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The room itself was a little small   I was delighted that my husband s birthday was acknowledged with cakes balloons a card and champagne Thanks

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: We chose a Montcalm Club room for the extra size and little extras the extra size was all wasted in a big cold bathroom and missing from room were a second bath robe a second wine glass and a second drinking glass Bottled water was only provided on day one no turndown service as one would expect from a 5 star was provided Breakfast was well below par and I have often had much better in 2 3 star rated hotels  Location was good but as a 5 star everything else was disappointing

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: nothing  The Staff were excellent the room was without fault and breakfast very good I would recommend it to my friends and colleagues and indeed stay there myself or at other Montcalm hotels

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: There was nothing not to like Only that we didn t stay longer   There were lots of little extras in the room from the staff Such as champers wine and cakes It was a trip for a 30th birthday and the staff did so much to make us comfortable Including balloons

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Not easy access to Heathrow Airport although Underground was only 10mins walk  Quiet setting and excellent access to city centre next door to Barbican Centre

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The extra loud woman in the lobby complaining lack of class   It s our second stay and the hotel is great perfect location underground wise to get around and super value for money if you book over a weekend Room service club sandwich is a must

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Let s face it it was not a five star hotel The rooms were small bathrooms shabby The first room we stayed in was extremely noisy even after i switched off the air conditioning The dirty window was facing the wall In the second room the tv set was not working properly After several request is was fixed though For the same value one can get a decent 4 star hotel which will be both better located and nicer   The staff was nice They gave me a birthday card and cupcakes when they find out i have a birthday To change a noisy room for a quiet one was also not a problem as well as fixing the tv set and the remote control

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: I was irritated by the level of charge for room service I know this is normal however I do not understand why a charge exists at 7 00 in the evening   Location was excellent and staff were very helpful Rooms were done out very well

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The hinge fitting of the shower screen allows minor flooding of bathroom floor if not very careful   Excellent location for Barbican Centre and London City Great bed Nice toiletries The attached restaurant hte Chiswell Street Dining Rooms is excellent

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The manager at reception asked for a holding deposit of 50 on my card after i had paid for the room and after checking he had put it through as a sale They said I didn t have breakfast included even though I had paid for it The room had a constant buzzing noise even with air con and electric off The layout of the hotel is hard to follow   The bed was comfortable Decor was quite nice a good size bath

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Fitness suite was very small but i appreciate its not the main concern of a hotel Just disappointing for me as i like a hotel with a gym   The building is beautiful the staff could not be more helpful and the room was very nice The Jugged Hare pub thats affiliated with the hotel served a delicious supper

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Everything Staff were excellent room was beautiful and extremely comfortable Location was great I couldn t fault this hotel and would say that it s by far the best hotel I have stayed in when visiting London

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The bed was extremely comfortable and the staff very helpful and professional Made to feel special and nothing was a problem for the staff I would go again for a longer stay and explore the facilities further

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Sometimes the housekeepers enter the room if you book late check out and they don t read notes on the account even with DND sign on  Alice is wonderful a great asset to the Montcalm The hubby and I have been coming to the hotel most weekends for a year and each time we receive a wonderful reception and love breakfast at the Jugged Hare A MUST

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The Club room was quite cramped and the double bed was small but comfortable The bathroom was good but no bath We overlooked the street but no noise that disturbed us   Great value wonderful stay Will be back The Jugged Hare the restaurant of the hotel is very good with great staff and excellent food both in choice and quality Breakfast was very good also Short walk to Spitalfields market which is worth a visit The Barbican is next door for cinema and theatre plus Museum of London 10 minutes away 10 taxi ride to Leicester Square or take the tube which is close by

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: If i was being picky it was only a double bed queen or king would be nice as standard   Modern feel Retained character Very clean Friendly staff feel in hotel

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Too much crammed into the room   Very impressive hotel great bedroom and very comfortable bed Good location not very convenient for sightseeing enjoyed the Chiswell Dining Rooms bar

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The two issues raised were immediately rectified by the staff but I would go for a bigger room than the deluxe double next time  The service was impeccable the location was perfect for our needs and the hotel itself was beautiful

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The route to our room from reception is bit complicated but there is direction sign   We love the ancient building but modern decoration inside Staff are very nice The sauna is great

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: No bar in the hotel the only bar was on the steet corner open to public it was very busy so could not get anywhere to sit disappointing had to use another bar a short walk away  Staff wonderfull hotel was immaculate

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: There was nothing we didn t like about this hotel   This was our fourth visit This is where we enjoy the comfort the friendliness of the staff the excellent food and a great location

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Given a really dindgy room no bath terrible lighting and a musty smell Booked in advanced any reason why i got such a terrible room I ve stayed here a few times before   Left my wallet went out of the way to contact me

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The room was a good size but a double bed seemed small surely a king or super king is the norm in this price bracket Aircon also woke us up both nights at 2am for an hour but I think we were just unlucky   Great location very helpful staff and a good size room We came with our 5 year old daughter and when we realised it was a normal double bed the hotel provided us with a camp bed foc

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Friendly helpful staff very comfortable room with everything you would need complimentary afternoon refreshments hearty breakfast excellent location for Barbican centre excellent deal with booking com

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Cooked breakfast was terrible Since the pub was closed All the staff are eastern European and speak bad English my girlfriend from Brussels speaks better   Location

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The staff are phenomenally friendly The building is gorgeous and the rooms super comfortable Good to have a small convenience store nearby too It s not too far from the subway Barbican

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Room too warm and we could not reduce the heat so we had to open the window   Lovely location beside Barbican Very nicely decorated Very friendly staff Bed very comfortable

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: TV was flashing and remove control run out of charge Also everything in the room have to be paid for as you leave Even apples weren t free  Room was clean and the bed was really comfortable Food was really incredible Juggled Hire is amazing pub

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Some of the bathroom fittings needed maintenance and repair but they did work   Friendly helpful staff throughout Ideal location for the Barbican Centre And only a short walk to tube station

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Dreadful hum all night from the massive vent system Sounded like a Chinook on the roof It s not the air con because it was off Even with earplugs it was very noisey Get a room facing the courtyard or just not facing Barbican way   Out of the busy tourist part of London but very close to Moorgate and Barbican 15 mins walk to St Pauls and the Jugged Hare is always buzzing

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Apparently we booked the cheapest room as we were put in a room without windows at first Hotels always seem to try to do that until you complain We ended up getting a better room but I truly dislike a hotel trying this These hotels don t get my patronage anymore So last time at the Montcalm

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
