Full_Review: The room we had was tiny but after complaining we were moved to a larger room directly above the bar which had a squeaky sign hanging outside the window Our first room didn t have a remote for the tv and our second room we were too far away from the tv for it to work The first room had a faulty shower and lighting system and the second bathroom was so big it echoed Would I stay here again Never I would rather stay in a tent on Wimbledon Common   One of the best things about this place is when you leave the building after finding your way back to reception

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Unfortunately my bath plug didn t work and when calling down to reception it took forever for someone to come so I didn t both with a bath I ordered breakfast to my room to which it arrived with no cutlery And now having looked at my bank statement I have been charged twice for my stay   The location is great Reception were warm and friendly And the room was clean There was no bathrobe which I read I should have had as well as slippers which also I didn t have

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Staff is extremely helpful and accommodative to visitors After informing the manager of issues with noise at night she was very attentive and further improved the experience Location and facilities are great Breakfast at the Jugged Hare is a classic treat

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Staff could be friendlier I found the receptionist quite blunt and a bit rude Also the toiletries provided were extremely perfumed and I broke out in an awful rash all over my face after using them Two days later I am on antibiotics and it hasn t cleared An enjoyable stay though   It was a lovely hotel the rooms were spacious and beds very comfy Bathrooms also spacious very clean throughout Slept like a baby

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Nothing  Club treats such as free drinks and nibbles before setting off out for the evening was amazing Beautiful room and bathroom with excellent facilities and super helpful staff

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Small rooms Not the best location almost on the border of the city london The hotel looks like a luxury motel  Helpful staff wifi is ok soft bed alot of light in the room Barbican underground station is 6 min walking Kings cross is 2 stations away Tesco express and cash machine are near

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The TV remote was temperamental and the taps dials for the bath and shower were difficult to navigate due to some being worn and wonky They also ran out of tables during breakfast in the restaurant area so we were sidelined to the bar area where no waiters waitresses were available meaning we had to physically get up and walk around to get anyone s attention   The staff at the hotel were very welcoming and helpful They really went out of their way to make my birthday weekend special with wonderful unexpected surprises such as a card balloons rose petals and champagne The full English breakfast was also very tasty and filling

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: My room was on the 3rd floor in the south wing very tough to find The lifts and halls need more directions My room was small with no window but that was fine but the lighting was poor Need brighter more lights   Great Location hotel staff were very very helpful despite it being a little chaotic due to a wedding party The rate itself was brilliant especially in the run up to Xmas

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Tiny room no view Maybe I had higher expectations as my stay at M by Montcalm was superb Also could not turn off the TV and the light was very annoying for sleep   Nice shower

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Location is in the business district Quiet during weekends   Very nice staff They accommodated my request to change rooms as the initial one was directly on top of the kitchen and was super noisy Big rooms and bathrooms

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Only gripe was that the rooms were a bit small and the desk chair wasn t comfortable but minor gripes  Service was top class Extremely comfortable bed Anyone looking to stay in the City this is an excellent hotel location wise

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: t v was on the blink i never reported it and apparently they would have had it replaced fixed the same day had I but as we were out most of the time no real problem  excellent staff super facilities

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: 3 95 for a bottle of water seemed a bit extreme especially considering what you pay for the room   Room was huge Very clean and the bed was so comfy Location was fantastic for a work Christmas function nearby Staff were very friendly and helpful and the midday checkout was an added bonus

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: We arrived early around 10 30 am and understandably no room was available so we left luggage We checked in and a room was allocated we specified a quiet room on the reservation asked for it when we arrived and were assured this not a problem all we needed was to pick up the key when we came back later Spent all day and evening in London We got to the hotel at around 10 30 PM picked up the key to go to our room and found out that our room was on the first floor right on top of a wedding party that when full blast on the floor below us Nobody would have been able to sleep with that noise Fortunately the receptionist agreed and was able to assign us to another room on the fourth floor away from the ballroom It ended ok but why were we assigned probably the noisiest room in the hotel that evening when we had requested a quiet room repeatedly   Location and friendliness staff

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: King size bed not normal size not so good for tall ish people   The staff were very friendly the restaurant bar had a nice atmosphere food tasted good too

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: 1 Uncomfortable bed smaller than we would have expected in a hotel of this standard and the sides very soft so hard to stay on the bed if one got it wrong 2 Shower tap came off in my hand and it was difficult to then get hot enough water   Location perfect

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: A little out of the centre but we actually liked being a little outside of the hustle bustle  We absolutely loved our stay from start to finish The staff were very friendly and helpful and the hotel was amazing We stayed in the Montcalm club room which was beautiful and very clean We arrived back to our room later that evening to find a bottle of wine and cupcakes complimentry as it was a special occasion and also the travel cot had been set up with a duck for the bath and a grooming set for our child Would highly recommend and we will definitely be returning

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Shower controls seemed random needed experimentation to find desired setting Thin walls mean next room TV easily heard Restaurant is in the next building   Really comfortable bed and great location for the TV Nice bath too

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Very nice building super comfy room with an extra soft bed and enough space for London The hotel is a 5min walk to the Barbican metro station The staff was really nice always there to help There is a boutique feel about this place everything is cosy and comfy and stylish I liked it a lot

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Would have liked a bath in the room although I did not request one Bit of a draught whilst in bed from the air conditioning   Staff were friendly and helpful although when I arrived there were a lot of them in the lobby Really liked the hotel clean comfortable had a lovely evening here

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: We got a small room so we complained as id booked a deluxe room Fortunately they realised their mistake and couldn t do more for us to correct it   The bed is honestly so comfortable

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The breakfast downstairs wasn t so good Order it in your room and it s so much better  Fabulous from start to finish Cannot fault this hotel Also highly recommend the jugged hare for great food

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Would have liked an internal restaurant To get to the Jugged Hare breakfast restaurant you had to go outside into the street for a few yards Although not far it s not good in poor weather   The very high level of comfort

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The only gripe was in our room there was a very thin curtain in the bathroom over the window which did let a lot of light into the bathroom early morning subsequently shining into the bedroom   As always another fantastic visit the the Montcalm at Brewery Friendly staff where nothing is ever too much for them beautiful rooms with a free complimentary upgrade lovely hotel

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The courtesy of the staff was of the highest standard with all our requests dealt with in a friendly and businesslike manner Breakfast in the Jugged Hare was one of the best we have ever experienced

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: There was a room service trolley in front of the service area door in the corridor next to my room Daily the housekeping team would leave on it used china and food It would stay there for days The key card had to be redone every few days   Good location staff are very nice and helpful Jugged hare restaurant is great

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Very little to complain about The toilet could do with a bit of additional scrubbing We had to ask for belts for the bathrobes which were supplied within a matter of minutes   Well situated close to the subway although we would have preferred the Westminster area Lovely room Great pub Friendly efficient staff Really good value for money

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: nothing was bad but i would have preferred a King Bed in the Clubroom instead of a Queen The room was massive so would easily have fitted it   The staff were amazing So accommodating and really went out of their way to do everything for us I would highly recommend this hotel for people having a weekend stay in London

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Hotel looked like a maze Check in out were needlessly complicated No parking available For unloading the car had to park across the street and cross the road with the luggage room was on the small side   staff were friendly Clean hotel

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Rooms are tired and general d cor is dated checking in for breakfast is a cumbersome process with much checking of lists no IT   Excellent location adjacent to The Barbican very good buffet breakfast

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: On the 2nd day they took away the used towel but didn t give us a new ones But that s just complaining on a high level   Good location nice rooms friendly staff huge beds and cosy linen All in all good value for money

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Location is excellent but London City is quite deserted after business hours We stayed there for an event at Barbican then the location is not to beat Staff forgot to refill bath tissues Minor complaint but should be mentioned for a venue of its class   Really nice staff very helpful Nice and comfortable rooms

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The shower Weak pressure Second day towels hard   Great staff lovely welcome and nothing too much to ask Even though the building is like a maze the staff were so careful to ensure I knew where I was going

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: First class response to an issue with the room soon corrected Excellent night duty manager made an extra special effort to rectify 5 Stars deserved This was my second stay I would have no hesitation in returning

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: 1st floor room facing street got woken early morning by delivery lorries with reversing sensors blaring   Close to tube Comfy bed Elegantly decorated

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Everything except front of house staff they were efficient   Maintenance is a big issue our room had no grout in the bathroom floor tiles with no grout made the bathroom feel dirty The room had a small window that you couldn t open and it made it feel claustrophobic Breakfast on Sunday morning was havoc we ended up sitting in the bar area with the worst staff we have ever come across they didn t want to assist and help customers in anyway it was even a chore to move the cups and saucers that people had used we as customers pay their wages The front area of the bar is filthy and this couldn t have been a one off when the restaurant was this busy so other guests would end up sitting where we sat looking at a dirty looking pub We have travelled a lot stayed in 4 5 star hotels this is the worst ever and not worthy of the star rating it has

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: My room lock was broken and had 1cm of loosenes when it got closed Some one with a card could open it in a easy way The came to repair it but the reparation was useless   The waiters of the Breakfast were always very pleasant and hepful

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The best hotel we have stayed at Attentive staff lovely club room with access to club lounge Breakfast was really good and close to 2 tube stations so easy to go from here to London attractions

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: We would like to have known what a comfort pack was on the minibar menu It was also not practical to run a bath through the shower head But these are very minor points   It was absolutely fine The staff were 100 The rooms clean comfortable and very well equipped for business and leisure with easy access Wi fi

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Our room was directly above the Jugged Hare pub Not good on a Saturday Loud music until 12 30am and loud people leaving until 1am   Location and facilities

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: We were upgraded but the room was smaller than our last two stays which was a little disappointing   The beds are wonderfully comfy The breakfast exceptional at the Jugged Hare if you have this option add it ON

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The reservation staff who even contacted booking com to tell them not to help us  Awful An error in the system showed my room was booked for the previous night it needed to be Upon arrival the hotel admitted they had taken out my money but were not willing to allow me to use that money as part of payment to stay the correct night Tried to charge be another 150 on top of 120 equalling 270 Could not care less that they took my money when we could not afford to pay the additional 150 Happy to take money and do nothing for the customer ruined the entire london weekend

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The location is OK Even it s close from the tube we have to change often the lines to go to the city center The concierge was insisting too much on the hotel s restaurant when we asked for one in town   We stayed at the Montcalm at the Brewery during 3 night mid September Warm welcome from the staff at the check in We had an upgrade to a Club room which was amazing The room is very modern the bed was very comfortable We had dinner at the Jagged Hare and it was delicious We will definitely comme back

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: nothing  1 minute away from the Barbican s theatre reason of the trip nice area pub next door has good food but quite noisy in the night Room was very nice bathroom was huge I would go back

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: In the bedroom because of the way the curtain rails were laid out it was impossible to cover all the windows and there was light early  I loved the lay out of the room and the comfort of the bed Staff was extremely professional and made us feel totally at home We liked the pub that is run by the hotel a lot where we has an excellent continental breakfast

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Dirty brownish stain seems like blood bed sheet Possibly not changed at all The hotel staff front office manager and receptionist only the ones who could speak English apologised saying it is a human mistake what else could be Check your bed before laying down if you are not happy don t change your mind with offered bottle of wine it is not worth   None not worth for the money we paid

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: No complimentary water Have to request for toiletries to be replenished not a sign of luxury boutique but budget inn Incorrect billing  Staff was friendly n polite Location is great

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Amazing 5 star hotel with a fantastic location just minutes from the underground Booked into a Montcalm Club room for my boyfriend s birthday and on check in we had been upgraded to the WOW suite Only downside was that we were only staying for one night I would definitely stay here again and would recommend to family and friends

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The location Although next to the Barbican theatre there s not a lot else around   Staff were great the building is quite spectacular and the room was clean and highly functional Dinner at the Jugged Hare was fantastic

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Our room card keys kept not working and we kept having to take them to the front desk to be reset We were told not to put them near a credit card or cell phone which when put in a wallet when going out for the day where else should we have put them In any case when we had the room serviced the cleaning staff would turn the AC unit off and close the vent when we had turned it on so it would be cool when we returned for the evening We were also not provided with a room service menu at first and when we asked for one we were told to just call and ask for what we wanted Then a menu turned up on the last night of our stay   The staff was very friendly and the location was great for hopping the Tube or catching a show at the Barbican We got the breakfast included package and it was well worth it A nice selection of hot and cold breakfast items each morning was a definite plus

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Hotel staff is very friendly courteous and professional I enjoyed my stay Hotel does have a bit of retro touch in its exterior primarily the entire building block Which I liked but interiors and the rooms are no less than any state of the art modern hotels The Hotel is at a great location a 5 minute walk to Tube stations and a 15 minute Tube ride to all the major attractions

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: No complaints   Excellent price for room Staff very helpful Very comfortable bed Bedroom facilities excellent Good breakfast I would definitely use this hotel again if I was visiting the vicinity

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The staff were great they made us feel very special The hotel has to be one of the best hotels we ve stayed in for a long time Love our stay and our pampering from your staff

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The waiting staff in the morning for breakfast We were sat down for breakfast and waited a good 20min before we were offered a drink whilst other guest were serve at once   The Hotel its self was good the staff were very helpful

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The ONLY criticism is the mood lighting in the rooms It s quite dim which makes it a little difficult to read or do other things requiring lighting But it s hardly the biggest problem in the world   Staff are fantastic There was a large queue when we arrived and they did all they could to get it down asap They could not have been more helpful

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Pleasant interior Disappointed with view could not see day light or sunshine Could not open open window Did not complain because of the price paid   Fabulous building and would stay again but would request a better room view

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Room was like cell maybe making old Scotland Yard into a hotel may be better we don t feel it was good value stayed at Horseguards for the same price and had a much better room breakfast overpriced and not all that the chain across the road did a better one for less than half the price  Hotel had a nice welcoming feeling

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The prices in the attached pub restaurant were high   The location was perfect for access to London s attraction with a tube station very close by Staff were attentive and enthusiastic

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The staff are incredibly helpful The club room is a great idea and the food and drinks offered and general amenity make this hotel a great experience

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The gym is very small and not air conditioned so probably not the hotel for you if you are a keen gym bunny   The staff were extremely friendly and helpful the room was beautifully furnished and very comfortable There are a lot of nice touches such as nice tea and coffee making facilities and mints on the pillow before bed The location is fantastic and the heritage building is beautiful

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Overall I had a very good experience but was just a bit disappointed to find out on my arrival that The Brewery actually didn t brew beer it was a conference center Also the work out facility which includes a sauna some exercise equipment and free weights is located on the lower level of a third building and is a bit cramped   Very comfortable hotel set up in multiple co located sites My room was in the building across the street from the main part of the hotel The rooms were very quiet and very clean Very good ability to control the room temperature WiFi was superb All the staff I met were excellent The hotel was also attached to a very nice restaurant and what turned out to be a very popular pub The Jugged Hare For those planning to take the tube it s a 10 minute walk to Moorgate Underground Circle H S and Northern Lines

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: A minor detail I know but the steam room sauna was out of action and there was no notification of any problem I wondered the lower floors for quite a while before I discovered that   The staff were exceptionally helpful and most pleasant to deal with

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: This was the end of our 6 weeks European holiday and a lovely way to finish From the moment we arrived Megha Singh and her team looked after us No request was too much trouble and the service was superb Great breakfasts and the Club Class was great with drinks and canap s every evening The room was serviced daily in true 5 star fashion with every item checked and replaced when used Resort style stay with true old fashioned service by far the best hotel of the 15 or so we stayed in

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Fitness room too small to be of any practical use and very hot Quirky layout a bit frustrating  Rooms small but sumptuous Public areas quite luxurious Staff and levels of service

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The cost the food available and the fact that although we were apparently in the Club room we were not informed that we were right by the main road It was stuffy uncomfortable and loud Also the fact that the room service staff were rude and unhelpful really let the other members of staff down no offer of help with a selective diet and the pasta I finally decided on was almost raw   The location is fantastic very close to the Barbican centre which was the reason for our trip The staff were also very helpful

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: There wasn t anything we didn t like   There are not enough superlatives to describe how amazing this hotel is Me and my partner celebrated my 30th birthday here and when my partner emailed them they helped to make our celebrations even better We had an extremely warm welcome and the staff were second to none I would highly recommend the montcalm club room as this is excellent value for money and well worth the extra expense as you get access to the lounge with complimentary snacks and alcohol The breakfast in the Jugged Hare is also worth the extra expense Overall an excellent hotel and we will be returning in the future

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Our room was kept spotless and had everything you could possibly need for a comfortable stay The staff were all friendly and gave outstanding customer service

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Room was small and dark bathroom way too small and no separate shower in a 5 hotel I would expect it Overall I would rate it a good 4 hotel not a 5   Central location good value for money when compared to avg London prices comfortable bed kindness of staff

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: I booked three rooms for my guest with my credit card I gave all informations two days before arrival by mails and callings directly but they didnt get the payment from my credit card they charged all the payment from my guests even all my warnings It was so shameful I do hundreds booking all over the world in a year I never face before like this   nothing from checkin to checkout

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Whoever was responsible for tiling the bathroom should be punished for the bad job they ve done   The window bathroom was a unique experience definitely go for it Excellent breakfast selection you can ask to get the eggs done as you wish Super comfortable bed Gabriel was very nice

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Given a very small room on my arrival Probably the smallest hotel room I ve ever seen I could not turn around in the shower as it was so tight   Good atmosphere strange layout in the hotel but added to the atmosphere Bar attached was good Staff very friendly knowledgeable and helpful Concierge from Hungary was excellent

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Amazing service No matter if it is the reception breakfast room service Just fabulous Extremely friendly staff Congratulations also to the management for creating such environment to work

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The only downside to this hotel is its location it s a 10 minute walk from the nearest tube and there isn t a lot to see in the area In saying that it would be ideal if you needed to be in the City for whatever reason and if you re happy to take a cab then the proximity to the tube is irrelevant   Everything else is great Every staff member we encountered was professional friendly and helpful The former brewery setting is beautiful and while accessing your room may necessitate the negotiation of a simple maze of hallways this only adds to the character Our room was clean comfortable and equipped with everything that you would expect from a hotel of this calibre Overall we had a great experience and would certainly return

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Time taken to rectify the air con issue we had   The welcome from the staff We had an issue with the room air con that was rectified with a room upgrade and then additional assistance upon leaving and when we rebook

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The room we were in 011 had no natural light as the window backed directly onto the foundations of another building  The staff were all efficient and polite the decor is pleasant in the pets of the hotel we actually used The Jugged Hare bar restaurant is lively and a really nice place for an afternoon or evening drink

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Upgraded to one of the apartments on the opposite side of the road to the hotel and felt duped when assured we had at least been allocated the Club Double Room we had originally booked The room was small with an unwanted kitchenette hardly conducive to a romantic one night stay There was no complimentary water or fruit on our arrival the TV was not working and the promised response to the inoperative TV never materialised No promised complimentary newspaper appeared the next morning and the advertised Hermes toiletries were not provided in the bathroom Breakfast was spoilt first by the waiters hurrying customers in their breakfast choices as there were apparently insufficient menus available and secondly by one of the waiters putting his hand right across my husband s plate to help himself to one of the jam pots to add to another table without even an explanation or an excuse me totally astounding rudeness   The reception manager sensitively listening and responding to our account of the disappointment experienced during our stay at the Montcalm at the Brewery

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Breakfast on Sunday morning was problematic as it took a long time to even get a table We were told it s an issue every Sunday which raises other questions as to why it hasn t been resolved There seemed to be plenty of tables becoming available but they weren t being cleared quickly enough to allocate to new arrivals

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The arrogant receptionist in the breakfast room The young lady has much to learn not a smile smashing the menu on the table The last morning Friday there was another professional lady welcoming us and living up to the standard of the high class of the staff in general   The club lounge offered an excellent start for an evening in London It was nice have an aperitif before the theater etc

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Location was so close to underground Breakfast buffet was beautiful We loved going across the road in the afternoon to sit outside on the leather chesterfield lounges in the sunshine enjoying some drinks

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Nothing   The hotel was very up market not what I was expecting much to my daughter s amusement It was beautiful and the staff were friendly and lovely to talk to really helpful and kind We went to see Hamlet and the location was utterly perfect for the Barbican Centre

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: The room I was given was one half of an adjoining room which is off putting and I could see the light from that room all night underneath the door The room was also extremely loud I kept waking up because of the sound of the road and traffic and the other guests slamming their doors Also this is my third time staying here in as many months when I checked in this time the staff made me really uncomfortable they had notes on screen when I said my name and two members of staff were whispering about them in front of me They then took my card payment twice for reasons unknown I m a single traveller but they asked me several time if I was sure that I didn t want two cards It was a really uncomfortable check in and felt awkward and not friendly   This is my third time staying here so it obviously does have some good points The rooms are lovely and the little extras are great Hermes bath products nice fluffy robes amazing rainfall shower heads

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Room not cleaned properly Large room but lacked additional seating only a desk and chair provided Room next to main road and exposed poor sound proofing secondary glazing Curtains did not close properly so lacked privacy No information in room on availability of restaurants within the facility   Location

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: privacy issues concerned me after i departed information was given to a third party without my permission  very friendly well run hotel always seeking to please

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Room in 4thfloor west wing took a while to get to up stairs and a different lift Also room was a little I small side and bed sloped badly off either side

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Air conditioning was very noisy and had to be switched of during the night Dirty dishes and some old food left outside in the corridor for greater that 36hours Noisy guests in the open spaces outside our window at 03 30 which was only addressed by hotel when I complained They should have been proactive  Location

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Room a little small and a long and confusing walk to the room which is in another building across a link bridge do make sure you take the offer of assistance from the guys at reception who will guide you They obviously know this can be an issue for guests arriving  Very comfortable bed and great rainfall type shower Staff very friendly everyone smiles and greets you and guys taking you to your rooms needed top notch

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Really enjoyed the visit Quiet surroundings and within walking distance of where we wanted to visit The hotel was clean the staff were very attentive and the visit was hassle free No complaints about any aspect of the hotel Would definitely go back

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: What a lovely hotel The welcome was fantastic and lovely treats left in room and upgrade as our anniversary The room was spacious and the bathroom huge The room was great with a wonderful bed v comfortable We popped out for a walk via the secret jugged pub and sneaked back in for a wonderful night sleep Will definitely return again and experience wonderfully helpful staff and top facilities Amazing Breakfest

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: This was a treat for the final 2 nights of our honeymoon Room 410 was difficult to get to The LG exit was blocked by dishes from the kitchen The bath and shower were essentially useless and after a 12 hour journey it took 30 minutes to half fill a bath with lukewarm water The mechanism seemed totally impractical The room was good but cramped for two people The kettle area was particularly crowded with items but the fact that there was a kettle was a bonus The air conditioning unit outside the room made sleep very difficult The window was small and needed to be cleaned but in any case little light enters the room as it is feet away from the wall of the next building Locating the light switches for corresponding lights was a bit of a project Three requests before a second bathrobe came on evening 2 of our stay   Comfortable bed

Hotel_Name: The Montcalm At Brewery London City
Full_Review: Although the accommodation was very good our bathroom mirror light didn t work old screw holes were visible where the toilet role holder had been moved there was the odd chip on furniture and the bathroom door stop was missing A little more attention to detail would improve the overall impression  The service was excellent and all the staff were extremely helpful and pleasant

It would have been nice to have had a bathtub   All of the professional staff at Hotel Powers really made my stay special so merci beaucoup to all of them From the moment that I arrived Gilles was especially attentive and helpful The room I was given on the first night was not what I expected from the photos on Booking com but he made sure that I was given a very nice room for the rest of my stay Both rooms were very comfortable and clean They were charming yet had all the modern amenities to make my stay comfortable The lobby and dining room were inviting and elegant Great location to walk to the Champs Elysee s for dining and shopping I wouldn t hesitate to recommend this hotel or stay there again for a delightful Paris experience

Air conditioning could have been a bit cooler typical Americans It was very warm in Paris but the night cooled down Jacuzzi tub could have been cleaner   Bed was heaven and pillows High end toiletries very nice Staff was lovey friendly helpful and great recommendations for the city and dinner

we made reservations for 3 rooms unfortunately we had to cancel one rooms because one of us was involved in accident with the car injured moved to hospital and got a surgery we offered to submit an official document from hospital the hotrl did not show any understanding sympathy ir compassion and the hotel insisted on charging us and gave us penalty There s a lot of hotels in paris i will not choose kind of hotels What about you   The room is big

The only negative for me was that the bed was hard as a rock For the money spent a pillow top mattress would have been nice   The staff were very helpful and friendly The location is excellent A short walk to the Georges V metro stop a taxi stand across the street as well as the 32 bus which I took to the Eiffel Tower and Roland Garros stadium Restaurants line the block A 1 minute walk to the Champs de elysee with all the shops and restaurants you could ask for
The big keys to open the door it was a bit old fashion you have lack the room s door with those huge keys when you re in the room  Great location

Perhaps because located in the middle of the building the room where I stayed number 36 did not benefit from a strong signal which resulted in unreliable wi fi connection which was free i e included in the tariff In the common areas of the hotel including the reception the signal was ok   Excellent location close to the Champs Elys es good both for tourism and business Spacious bedroom very comfortable bed modern and perfectly working bathroom Friendly staff continuously attentive to the well being and satisfaction of the guests

Nice room A little dated but very spacious and with a large modern bathroom We were on the first floor with a window facing the street so the room was noisy Breakfast is just fine but you have a lot of coffee shops and restaurants within 2 blocks I strongly suggest going out instead of the hotel breakfast

The only slight criticism is the price of breakfast which seemed steep even for a city centre location we chose to eat breakfast out   The Reception team were friendly and helpful The room was airy and light with some lovely period features and the balcony overlooked an attractive road with the Eiffel Tower just visible above the buildings opposite The bed was extremely comfortable We loved the proximity to the Champs Elysees with its shops and restaurants and Charles De Gaulle Etoile was within 5 10 minutes walk We thoroughly enjoyed our stay

The room was unfortunately quite noisy and the bathroom was cramped   Beautiful old building which still retains its old world charm despite its conversion to a modern hotel Friendly staff and comfortable and clean room

Cleanliness NOT smoke free in the rooms and hallways Rude night shift First two days until I confronted them Rooms smelled and dingy Need major upgrade Definitely NOT 4 STAR 2 star at most   Location That all

Located in Paris Golden Triangle and just a block from the Champs Elysees the location was absolutely fantastic Great restaurants shops and a metro station are all within a short walking distance from the hotel The hotel is aging but full of charm and well maintained Our room was spacious and beautifully decorated Loved the balcony and the view A big thank you to the front desk staff who were wonderful accommodating and always so friendly They really made our stay very enjoyable and we look forward to staying here again
Bath had mold Bed cover has seen better days Obvious stains and has not seen a washing machine for years Noise from the street Had to return the keys every time I left  Location concierge
The furniture is old and narrow the doors are the same old the bathroom is small the toothpick and the shawl accessory you have to ask at reception  The staff is very kind

We d booked a junior suite and were originally assigned to one on the sixth floor which was a very different quality and type of room to the junior suites advertised on the hotel website I appreciate not all rooms can be photographed but the webpage should at least be indicative of the quality type of room you are booking The staff were helpful in moving us to a different room for the remainder of the stay However the room we were put in pictures provided looked like the deluxe room on the website While it was better than the room we were in it either wasn t a junior suite which raises questions around the equity of pricing for deluxe suites vs junior suites or the pictures on the website are very misleading   Good location very clean nice old fashioned hotel free wifi and helpful night staff
Wifi was down for the first day which was disappointing but the staff were extremely helpful   Awesome location lovely staff helpful service close to all the sites and public transport
elevator is small and always breaking small lobby no arabic TV channels I didn t try the hotel restaurant   location cleanness wifi speed amenities staff housekeeping security balcony etc

Great boutique hotel 1block off Champs Elysees Had the smallest room there but still very comfortable Did not want or expect a large modern North American hotel Exactly what we wanted Great location for shopping and wandering

Perhaps the hotel could offer guests free bottles of drinking water   This was our third visit to the property We love the location of the hotel and the ambiance of the rooms This time we had a room on the 1st floor which was really large for Paris standards Our bathroom was lovely and we even had our own walk in closet

The staff were lovely and very helpful The hotel has a lot of character and is in a convenient location for sightseeing it s also very close to the metro which is a great way to get around Paris Would definitely stay here again

Cute little boutique hotel one block off of the Champs lys es I m sure we had the smallest room but it was clean with a new small bathroom and we were in Paris in an old building so did not expect or want a modern North American hotel Walking distance to Louvre 15 20 mins walked to the Eiffel Tower 10 15 mins Many many restaurants close by And shops every which way you turned Great for just window shopping in the evenings too Never felt unsafe in the area Front staff were courteous and helpful with all our questions Always a taxi or 2 waiting just across the street from the entrance to the hotel We did not have the breakfast offered I would return to this hotel and recommend it

Bar was rather quiet I know that depends on guests at the hotel but it didn t seem to draw you in with its atmosphere   Staff were exceptionally efficient friendly and helpful Rooms spotless and position excellent

We didn t have an open balcony a feature I was really looking forward to There was a lot of noise from an upstairs room one of the nights and upon telling reception in the morning I was not a fan of how they told me I could have called throughout the night and that there was nothing they could do I would have liked to have been offered some form of compensation for our stay as this is quite an expensive hotel per night I was made to feel a little like a silly child who had moaned about something ridiculous but at the end of the day this stay was a treat for me and my partner and not something I would usually splash out on so I was upset that I only got about 3 4 hours sleep on my second night   The bed was great it was huge and really comfortable We got upgraded which was really nice The staff were very efficient especially with room service The hotel is styled in a traditional Parisian way and the junior suite is an incredible size

I wanted to watch TV the cable wasnt plugged because it was broken i asked for help from reception unfortunately the technician wasnt available I found it outrageous for a room that cost me Eur 450   The location is good and there is a big mirror above a chimney that are nice the only nice thing in the room

No slippers only a bath robe No facilities for make a coffee or a tea in the room   Right behind champ de Elyse beside Cartier jewellery shop and Rolex shop The only problem for me it was that in the room no kettle coffee or tea In the rest all perfect

Couldn t try the breakfast as at roughly 28 euros a head this was a bit much   Staff were amazing willing to help with everything and very friendly yet still professional couldn t be better Rooms were beautiful cleaners did an excellent job every day with the most incredible location best stay in Paris ever
Reserved for my Mother in law because it was just across the street from us They upgraded her to a room with an Eiffel Tower view and she couldn t be happier to get the full Parisian experience

Maybe because it s an old building the wooden floor make noise No tea coffee maker for a 4 star hotel  Excellent location surrounded by shops and restaurants near to metro station very safe All staff are very helpful

I have stayed in several hotels in Europe by far this is the sweetest one Location perfect staff perfect room decoration incredible heating system very very good We did ot want to go out from the room Strange but true
It was difficult to use the wifi he disconnected And law signal The lift is very small  The staff are very kind and friendly they tried to helped us in any issues The location is perfect

The lift is a bit too small but since it looks like a vintage hotel so it s fine  The location is excellent just right next to the champs elysees and there are lots of shops around the hotel area More importantly the service and the staff is extrodinary Very friendly and nice staff
The bathroom is very old with problems and it s maintenance is not serious and should be renew next time I will check it before I pay   Only the location

Incredible location just minutes walk from the Champs lys es We received a free room upgrade with a stunning view of the Eiffel Tower which made our stay even more special The staff were extremely friendly and accommodating and nothing was too much trouble
Our room was slightly hot most nights even with the control of thermostat  Staff were very friendly and helpful Hotel was beautiful and location was perfect central to everything

The internet was unacceptable It s a shame that we live in the 21st century with such an internet connection No excuses for that   The staff were very friendly and helpful Excellent staff and treatment Best location you can dream of in Paris Beds very comfortable Look and feel very Parisienne I loved the woodwork at the lobby

Breakfast is too expensive you can have it much cheaper at restaurants in the neighborhood Soundproofing is very bad you can listen people walking and talking in the other rooms even in uper floors   The excelent location near Champs Elises with restaurants and bars 10 minutes walking to nearest metro station 15 minutes walking to Petit and Grand Palais for exhibitions Good location for shoping For airport transfer there is a taxi stand just in front of the hotel
The room seemed to be very hot Had to shut bathroom door at night too much light came in   The staff were friendly and helpful You could walk to some of the sights

Hotel is dated and needs uplifting Rooms toilet are awkward it looks lik8an afterthought literally it was a partition inside the room   The location is prime within a walking distances from moda shops fine restaurants coffee shops and the Champselese

Not much I liked about this Hotel False advertising on Booking com do not book the superior double room you get a substandard double room Unless you book the deluxe room do not consider this hotel No toilet paper on arrival in room had to go and ask twice before they brought me some Room was cleaned only after 4pm Sauna was never on so don t know if it was even working No clean glasses replacing dirty ones in the room had to also go and ask All in all I will never stay in this Hotel again and do not recommend it at all to anyone One of the worst hotels I have ever stayed in don t know how it gets a 4 star status   Comfortable bed
Poor room aminities No slippers No mouthwash or shaving kit   Breakfast was amazing also room service food Bed is really comfortable Wifi is fast All in all I recommend

Bedroom floor was squeeky It disturbed me at night bc I could hear the guests upstairs walking and running around But that s me You might not feel it No English Channel except CNN My children watched Harry Potter in French   Located very close to Champs Elyse street Nice Small restaurants across the street for lunch and dinner Quick check in check out Everyone was just so friendly at the hotel I felt at home right away 5 10 min stroll to Eiffle tower I had a view of tip of the tower from my room Quiet street at night Internet was very fast Kids loved it I had prepaid SIM with 4G so I followed GPS found pretty much everything around the hotel Short walk to small supermarket too

A Tea Coffee kettle in the room with the consumables should be provided it s standard in good hotels globally longer Room service hours  Good location good clean rooms small but clean bathroom good housekeeping friendly and helpful staff

Wifi was no n existent nail 9pm each day  Very friendly staff Room on 6th floor had a great view of the Eiffel Tower Perfectly situated in a lovely area
No tea coffee making facilities in the room   Boutique hotel Clean and friendly staff Would highly recommend the breakfast Lots of fresh breads croissants and cheeses

The bathroom in my room was as if created in a cupboard The lift in the hotel should be changed it is very old   The location is excellent The breakfast was not great but the staff on hand went the extra mile to see you are comfortable
I like this hotel so much Very classic French style with wonderful service Perfect location and room service And our Parisian balcony is super big with spectacular street view

Breakfast prices too high go out and enjoy the street cafe breakfasts at a third of the price  staff very helpful and good walking location for Eiffel Tower Champs Elyses Arc D Triumphe and the Seine Surrounded by restaurants

Nothing   Everything about this hotel was amazing the room was excellent great central location and a really good breakfast Also the staff could not do enough to help

nothing  The staff were politly and helpfull Room big comparing to other paris hotels very clean and comfy The best thing the location steps from le champ And montaige st Carfure city store few blocks away Very nice for family
