Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: We were initially put in a lower ground room with no window and found it claustrophobic asked to be moved but the hotel was full that evening but promised a new room the next day and this promised was kept with reception making sure we liked our new room   The staff were very efficient and friendly and solved our queries quickly Great location for the tube station

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Directions in the hallway could have been a little better The hotel is on a high street with plenty of variety name brand shops M S Boots Sainsbury s Tesco Express Primark however the caliber of the shops is low Higher quality is nearby though around St John s Wood   Staff were extremely helpful I like a firm bed so I slept very well The air conditioning cooled quickly and easy to adjust Shower was reasonable size not the tiny booths that you find in some places Breakfast assortment was pretty good and they would accommodate special requests

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: The rooms are a LOT smaller than I expected We even had one of the superior rooms with a window which is a luxury in this hotel Do not expect to be able to walk around the bed The reception staff were not particularly helpful with leaving luggage In fact they ended up leaving our luggage in the lobby even after asking them specifically to move it to the room Really not happy especially after I walked in to the reception and waited at least 10mins for a member of staff to appear Poor   The decor was great and the location was fantastic For the price point this hotel was ok It s not up to the usual Best Western standards

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: We were put in a basement room with no windows It was probably one of the worst nights sleep I have ever had If you stay at this hotel do not get a basement room It is horrible   Not that much to be fair

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: My son said that he wished he had spent more time at the hotel which is a good recommendation  Did not have breakfast I booked the hotel for my son who was on a business trip

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Basement room No natural light my wife had to exit the building to check the mornings weather each day noisy due to staff in and out of adjoining door all night Bathroom was functional but very small unable to sit properly on the toilet as it was almost up to the wall the shower was in the bath and you need a step ladder to get in and out The wardrobe rail was about 6 3 high I am 5 5 and my wife is smaller There are steps down into the room when you get through the door the safety deposit box repair man fell down them The staff don t appear to talk to each other as messages about us wanting to change room weren t relayed to the morning staff The receptionist did offer another room if we left out bags in the reception area the next morning before 12noon where she would watch them for us but on questioning this she stated that she would NOT be responsible for them and we did not want to waste the small amount of time we had in London trying to change room Last time we stayed here it was reasonable but not this time The room was very hot despite having air conditioning it only worked on low fan speed and no matter what setting were made it didn t cool very much The corridor to the basement is enclosed by glass and smells awful When we were checking out the receptionist asked what complimentary offers where we given answer none were offered Breakfast was not included and what we paid for the first morning was laughable the coffee was strong and almost cold the selection on offer was very poor We ate elsewhere the next morning   The area was reasonably nice and local to where we needed to be

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: No hot water in the evening and then electricity outage in our room the following morning No offer of compensation in any shape or form   Large shower and mirrors that did not mist

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Upon check in I found the staff member to be quite rude very unhelpful and I received a number of blank stares from this particular worker who was slow The other worker checked 3 people in during the time it took for us to be checked in and she was friendly and very informative unlike the girl we had The room was tiny not much room to move around at all but it was very clean and modern and was fine for what we wanted We had paid extra for the breakfast and were at no point told that this was only a cold buffet if you wanted a hot breakfast there was another additional charge for this The wait staff I found to be rude the milk smelt off on the table and I had to ask 3 times to have different milk and I was met with the same blank rude stares I had been given at the check in desk the day before At 145 for one night this was not value for money and was not somewhere I would recommend or return to again I am not picky and I am a firm believer in you get what you pay for but at the cost of this I would of expected much much better   The hotel was very clean and the location was excellent for getting around London

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Staff were a bit odd when requested breakfast that I had not included in the booking Sink in room was defective  Good in room facilities tea coffee etc Generally friendly atmosphere and very centrally located easy to get around from the hotel

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Not much I could say really everything was satisfactory  The room was a good size The restaurant downstairs was incredible Very friendly and food was beautiful

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: nothing if i had to nitpick i would nt want to be hanging about the area after 11 30pm as a lone female traveller but that is not the hotel s fault   The bed was so comfortable and the staff were really friendly and helpful Location is only 3 minutes from Kilburn Park tube and their are 2 pubs and a tesco nearby which is convienient

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Poorly maintained bathroom plumping Inconvenient placement of TV Non detachable hangers in closet in tight space   Location convenient with transportation Decoration cleanliness

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Noisy room Some kind of tumble dryer going until 11pm Anytime anyone in the hotel ran a tap you could hear it Informed staff all they did was laugh I wouldn t stay here was his response Avoid this place at all costs

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: The room was difficult to find and I got lost several times with my heavy case The receptionist should have given better directions The very comprehensive folder in my bedroom stated there were complimentary biscuits but I failed to find any   Staff were very very helpful helped me with my case without my needing to ask for assistance Room was great bed was very comfy

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Apparently the room next door was very noisy and keep knocking the wall or scratching the wooden pieces on the wall making it very annoying and hard to have a peace of mind in the night and morning Might need to increase sound proof system   The bed was very comfortable and everything in the room was pretty good

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: The air condition unit was broken It was blowing out very cold air The off switch button did not work The room was very small hence there was nowhere to hide from the constant cold blast   Clean

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Nothing  Absolutely brilliant I was greeted at check in by assistant manager Raveca and Amy whom were both very professional and polite Raveca went the extra mile to make my stay as comfortable as possible Location was excellent I had to attend an event in Knightsbridge and found it was quick and easy to get there Great facilities room was very clean and quiet what more could you ask for Will definitely be going back

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: A room without a window Honestly I felt trapped and I don t think I saw that on the description of the Executive King Room when I booked it I think it should be in there so people can choose The room was freezing cold when we entered and after a while we managed to turn it off but it took a bit until it was back in the normal temperature The bed wasn t king size either I think it was two separate beds joined together   The room was clean and so was the bathroom Fairly spacious The shower was spacious too The location of the hotel is a huge plus Very close to the underground and Paddington train station isn t far either

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: My bed was under a skylight At 5am something dropped from that skylight and hit me on the face I turned on the light to see what it was and was surprised to see a live maggot on my bed I spent the rest of the night on the sofa I put the maggot in a glass and presented it to reception on leaving and asked whether I might be able to get a refund I was offered an upgrade of my breakfast from Normal to Continental I replied that there was no way in the world I would be eating in the hotel No manager was available to speak to me   Nothing

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Bad value for money thinking of the location size of the rooms the are tiny as cupboard no luggage room all bags are lying in the hallway unattended Very small and basic breakfast variety And main thing for us we had booked King Executive room which was on basement floor underground and with no window   Shops restaurants bus stops all just around the corner

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: On arrival receptionist wasn t full of the joys of spring the transaction seemed more important than the service   Private basement room spacious comfortable and very clean modern

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Told by reception not to bother booking a table in the restaurant and last food orders were 9 30 I was then refused a table at 9 05 as the restaurant closed at 9 00 The waiter said he would try to get the chef to serve me The chef ignored me completely complaining loudly in Polish over my head and giving me a death stare I said to forget it and ate elsewhere Yes you can t have a meal after 9 00 in a 4 star hotel in the middle of london Will never go back  Hotel is conveniently placed for the tube and comfortable

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: The check inn started at exactly 2 o clock so we had to wait quite a while   Nice fresh fruit with breakfast Close to the metro and a great pub across the street The Old Bell

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: The beds are small Also the area can come across as a bit nasty at night   Value for money Expected a lot worse for this price Also all rooms do indeed have windows I booked 7 rooms for a group booking and all had windows which it says it doesn t on the discription In fact this hotel presents better value than most centrally located value options around Hyde park Paddington and other central discount hotel hotspots Breakfast was good for that price

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Very small room sometimes smelled damp for no apparent reason Bathroom not properly constructed ie heavy basin not fully supported on bench   Clean and tidy

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: There was not enough staff working at this fully booked hotel Rooms were not ready at check in dinner was a wait as only 1 barman server and breakfast was chaos as only two waitresses   Dinner and breakfast was very nice and all the staff there were excellent and working very hard

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: WINDOWLESS SMALL CLAUSTROPHOBIC ROOM NOISY ROAD PIGEON NOISES ALL NIGHT MOST TELEVISION CHANNELS NOT WORKING I SPECIFICALLY AVOIDED THE ROOM WITHOUT A WINDOW WHEN MAKING THE RESERVATION OPTING FOR AND PAYING FOR AN EXECUTIVE KING ROOM THAT I ASSUMED WOULD HAVE A WINDOW THIS CLEARLY DID NOT HAPPEN  NOTHING IN PARTICULAR

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: The bathroom It was a SSS bathroom no proper separate shower toilet sink and shower all in one room There was a constant strange odor in the bathroom that made it unpleasant The room had too much furniture and it was a tight squeeze The couch was right in the walkway entrance to the room so you had to shuffle around it to get to the bed very strange layout   The breakfast nice selection of food The staff friendly helpful location internet

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Room and area  Booked hotel because of its proximity to Wembley Not a particularly good area restaurants nearby ok No window in room and therefore no view and felt like a cave Also smelt mildly of damp Breakfast good

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Hotel catered for Muslim by not supplying bacon it smelt terrible it was dark and the rooms were small  The hotel is run down it s not luxury the rooms are dark and small and the hotel smells damp and fusty the area around the hotel is run down and quite intimidating especially at night the breakfast at the hotel is poor only continental which you didn t state when saying breakfast was included anything more than continental had to be paid for and also the hotel does not supply bacon Being English in England I find this offensive

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: We didn t like the fact that we were not allowed to open the window at all and air conditioning was not working properly Also bathroom was not cleaned properly There was a lot of dust on a dryer Also during our stay the light didn t work so it was pretty much dark most of the time Another thing is the shower door I couldn t open the door from the inside without my partner open it for me from the outside It was stucked It was also very hard to flush the toilet We had to push so hard The security deposit box was broken Overally it was good but fixing these small problems would really make the stay much better   It was a good value for money Breakfast is good and staff is friendly

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: First floor room was actually in the basement without a window and very poor air quality not what you expect for a superior room  Staff were very helpful

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: I booked a standard room with no window and was pleasantly surprised on arrival to be allocated a room at the front of the hotel with a window Room was small but had everything in it I needed Would be happy to stay here again

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Very close to underground ABD overground transport Bright cheery reception and bar Room compact but very clean very comfortable bed and great shower Towels werewolf and toiletries very nice Continent breakfast was good Great price Thoroughly recommend stay

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Booked the room because the deal for a suite with a lot of extras included like fruit soft drinks magazines bathrobe None of it was included and the staff wasn t at all interested in checking why that information was on both their own and booking coms website   The size if the room was good for London But then it was a suite

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Had to get room card re activated and new Wi Fi code every day  The Old Bell across the way is worth a look Good food friendly staff and value for money

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Only hotel we have stayed in that didn t let us check in till just after 2pm even though there were a lot of guests waiting   Clean and comfortable and near underground

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Breakfast was continental We would have prefered full English instead Thought this was offered for an extra 7 95 each   Close to station modern inside clean friendly

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Room was tiny Decorators sealant up half the door frames when should ve been around the floor Staff weren t very helpful in check in   Located right near tube station and near local facilities Wi Fi was included Restaurant attached next door was a great price

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: We had absolutely no hot water and the staff were aware there is none when we checked in but failed to tell us There was still not hot water the following morning and only received 50 refund after a lot of complaining and arguing the minimum expectations of a hotel   The decor was good

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: The room was stinking mainly in the shower area it was foisty The room was a bit on the small side   Getting complimentary drinks when arriving We had to haggle a bit to get them though for being a genius member Staff were friendly and it was in a good location Buses were outside to get too and from the main tube station Would definitely stay again and it was good value for money

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: the only thing I can pick at is the lack of a plug socket near the bedside unit so I had to get my lazy ass out of bed to put my phone on charge   Nice air conditioned room comfatable bed and really good shower What more do you need

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: How small the room was  The room was great value but very small The lights was hard to find and there was a fan that I was unable to turn off so was very load throughout the night We had booked 2 rooms and the other room was prefect I had phoned earlier and asked for a window and that was given to me which was fantastic

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: We found that the wet room leaked water onto the bedroom carpet which left an unpleasant lingering smell   Quick and easy check in Nice choice of breakfast and reasonably priced

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Selection of vegetarian options on food menu However plenty of restaurants and shops nearby to eat out at e g Spicy Basil Pizza express   Beds are comfy

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Excellent location A train tube station is 8 minute walking distance from the hotel Very good continental breakfast A supermarket is right across from the hotel as well as ATM and bus stops that take you directly to downtown London The bedrooms are very clean and spacious compared to most London hotel standards Definitely recommend this hotel

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: I booked as a genius member and one of the perks was welcome drinks Staff were rude and said that because they have a lot of genius members they don t do them I d also emailed to give a heads up we were celebrating a 50th birthday and got no reply In the end we got welcome drinks and the manager was great gifting us a bottle of champagne The reception staff however were unhelpful and rude and I had a few run ins with them during my stay   Lovely modern hotel in a nice location

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: The room was small and was supposed to have a city view we were very disappointed our view was of the back yard were the dustbins are kept we could not open the window because of the flys Not a power shower like it stated  2 welcome beers on arrival comfy large bed and tea coffee in room Good Location for Wembley concert

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: The continental breakfast lacked choice but having it included as such a low price for London was a bonus   For the price this an excellent hotel super easy to get to from Paddington and the room was perfect for a one night stay

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: The room space was small and did not present big enough for two people The air con took ages to become cool which was horrible considering we had opted in having a bedroom with no window there was a window but it couldn t open   The hotel staff and kitchen staff were polite and friendly from arrival to departure

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: King size bed was very close to wall at one side making it very tight difficult to get in out of bed Thankfully I m reasonably slim or this would ve been a problem

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: My modern room was beautifully appointed and super clean I couldn t fault it But as I was in residence for a week it would have been good not to have been in a basement room with no natural daylight The bonus however was that it was quiet   Close to tube and busses and an array of local shops Good relaxing coffee bar area Modernised interior Friendly helpful reception staff

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: I booked king size room but the room was ridiculously small Not sure it even reached required standards as not enough room to walk around the bed less than 8 10 inches between end of bed and wall Too expensive for what it was Very disappointing If staying here go for cheapest room possible having stayed in standard room before the room I had then was bigger than the king size and much cheaper Unable to check in early  Bed comfortable

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: The rooms are placed like a maze You go up then down on stairs and no elevator down so you carry your luggage The toilet seat too close to the towel rail heated rail that you can burn yourself Sink in the bathroom fit in a very narrow way that there is no place to rest the soap Phone was not working on Saturday afternoon reception told me no maintenance to replace your phone Checked out on Monday and still phone not working so you can imagine I had to keep going through the maze back and forth to order food Staff is nice but definitely management is absent

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Breakfast not a patch on how it used to be Waited 20 mins for coissant and when it came was far to hot and still not cooked   Staff friendly great location for my work

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: I was happy with everything  The bed was really comfortable and the shower was amazing and it s close to a lot of buses that go in all directions plus there is a Tesco and Starbucks straight across the road

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Room was very very small Didn t feel like a hotel room felt like a storage room When I heard a very loud and strange noise was told there were no staff to help out Thank God the noise stopped or else I would ve ended up awake all night   Friendly staff decent location

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Staffs were friendly Breakfast was good quality Rate was reasonable The AC was great Room were a little smaller than we envisioned Easy access to local buses and Killburn Park station to town Take bus no 16 to Victoria Station in 25 mins Next door to laundromat was very convenient Grocery store across the street and local restaurants nearby I strongly recommend this hotel for anyone visiting London

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Breakfast used very cheap ingredients unimpressed Had a basement room which was quite small and when air conditioner was on as there was no window there was an awful stench Sat in the bar as the room was too hot without putting on the awful aircon but they kicked us out before 11pm   Nice look to the place Friendly staff and good location

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: The room without window and a little bit small and the small of humidity   The hotel is near the subway the room and the bathroom were clean and the breakfast was good

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: In the bathroom the loo seats would not stay up A minor but irritating detail   The hotel was conveniently place for us and the staff were helpful and efficient at all times

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Unbelievably bad experience We did not receive a complimentary genius drink upon arrival During booking at check in and on the last night of our stay we requested a late checkout and were assured it was possible On the day of checkout at the agreed upon time we returned to the hotel to find the hotel staff had finished packing our bags and removed them from our room claiming the night shift failed to relay the message I have never been more angry at a hotel I could understand if they disregarded a single request but I made the same request on 3 separate occasions and this is inexcusable So while the accommodations may have been acceptable I wouldn t keep any of the front office staff under my employ and I can t recommend this hotel in good conscience

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: the room was small for my luggage but i heard some noise voice its was horrible its comes from toliet and i called the reception she came to my room after 20 minutes after when the voice gone she said to me if happened agin am gonna change your room   The quality of the the room and also the hotel the stuff there were helpful

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: The receptionist was rude on arrival The housekeeper walked into my room without knocking When I complained the receptionist put the phone in my face I was offered a complimentary meal The chef obviously didn t understand the meaning of rare steak AND DID NOT CHECK THE SALAD AS THERE WAS BLUE PAPER IN IT The best thing in the hotel was the waitress very professional   The bed was comfy

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: I was not aware that we had booked a room with no window Perhaps I missed this during the booking process I didn t follow up on this with the staff as were staying for only one night Although the room was in the basement with no window there was some noise from the street during the night anyway   The hotel is easy to find and located close to the tube station The room and bathroom were newly renowated and clean Friendly staff at check in

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: A lot of the rooms have now windows and are smelling really damp This Hotel is a joke how can a 4 hotel be allowed to sell prison cells No mention of that on Booking Stay away from this Hotel   Hotel looks nice from the outside

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Fired eggs were a bit greasy and bacon was more the american rasher type thin oily and not great so a bit of a disappointing cooked breakfast I would have expected better in the UK from an actual cafe I knew room I d chosen was basement with no window so not bothered too much apart from alarm clock was an hour behind and fire alarm went off due to apparently from someone taking a shower So was rudely awakened and a bit of a maze and worry getting out since no window in room but got free breakfast   Adjoined to next door Italian cafe for breakfast so coffee was great

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Location close to tube with easy access to central London 45 minutes to LHR via Paddington Express Lots of casual neighbourhood cafes bars and restaurants close by

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Very small room noisy as right next to a main road with no double glazing shop around and only buy if it s less than 70  Good location clean room

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Slightly noisy as there s a busy street outside but wasn t bad as you expect this because of its great location so it didn t really matter  With breakfast included in the booking deal I sound the Pain au chocolats were amazing and late check out was convenient They were also kind enough to keep hold of our luggage on the day of check out so we could spend the day and pick it up before we set off from home

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Room was small poorly designed and pretty much every fixture and fitting was broken Chipped sink TV hanging off the wall window didn t work window fittings held in by old tape shower made a horrendous noise when turned on Very poor   Location and comfy bed

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: I have stayed in executive suite and it wasn t what I have seen on photos Shower was not separated from the rest of the bathroom so I could sit on the toilet whilst showering Also once you take the shower you cannot enter the bathroom because the floor is covered in water so you either have to mop the floor after you shower or have constantly wet feet I have asked for a different room but apparently they were fully booked and I was offered a smelly room without a window in a basement   Comfortable bed and clean

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: The room was slightly cosy but ok for the price   Breakfast was lovely and the staff were so friendly and went out of their way to help They made the visit and would recommend as a result

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: There were no windows and the A C was not working We complained to the front desk several times and they gave us a little fan which did not work either the first time around Second time it did but it was so tiny that it barley made a difference We were sweating all night and could not rest The front desk staff had an attitude that we were being too picky or doing something wrong We were not happy

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: The address on this hotel stated Camden when infact it was no where near Camden and for someone not familiar with London this was very disappointing It should not have Camden in the address when it is not as it gives people a false impression

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Air con was broke so the room was like a sauna Bleach stains on carpet bed was incredibly uncomfortable Staff didn t seem bothered when we aired our concerns about the air con  Location was pretty good for what we wanted Near to tube station and shops

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: It wa a great I could leave my bags before and after check in but I was disappointed they were left in the lobby for anyone to pick up   Staff were very helpful and friendly Nice breakfast and close to tube

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: The fact that we could here all the noises from the next door room the top room as well and especially the wooden floor under the carpet often at times their was a very loud noise from the pipes we were in room 216 and it was very uncomfortable to sleep   The bed and the decoration

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Not at all  Wonderful people in the whole staff A particular mention to the restaurant for its food very well made and for the fantastic balance between quality and price The staff is perfect in the restaurant too

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: The room was boiling hot windows did not open had a view of a chimney the staff were ignorant and I think the floor may have been more comfortable than that solid mattress There was mould all around the sink in the bathroom Should have gone to the travelodge

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: The bedroom and entire floor we were on had a distinct and overpowering smell of marijuana the television in the room was broken we were in the basement of the hotel so every time someone else on another floor used the toilet or shower we could here the pipes  Location very good for the underground

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: The size of the room was far to small found it hard to move about and was a struggle to get up out the side of the bed room got very hot quickly shame there was no outside view from the window over all a lovely stay staff were most helpful although my only criticism is that they wouldn t give out taxi numbers would ring them for you guessing as this is there way of getting commission

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Fire alarm went off 3 times in the morning which ruined any chance off a lie in Called reception and was told someone in the hotel was smoking so caused the alarm to go off No apology from reception Room was tiny but that s expected in London I guess Bed was very uncomfortable lack of pillows Air conditioning didn t work properly   Accessibility good access to all areas in London

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: The parking was a nightmare was told that there was local parking which was open all hours however the car park was closed on arrival and was far from the hotel so therefore had to park down a side road which took ages   The hotel was lovely and clean

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: The bathroom in general was a bit grubby toilet seat loose with red stains on it Shower if you were not careful soaked the whole room Had to use towels to mop up floor Fridge light didn t work The worst thing was being woken at 4 a m after a lovely evening out the purpose of our trip to red flashing lights in our room and the fire alarm It frightened the life out of us I rang reception to ask if their was a fire to be told it was a guest having a very hot shower After this we couldn t sleep   The bed was comfortable

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: I went with my girlfriend for what was supposed to be a relaxing night for her birthday however we were woken by the fire alarm at 4 am and again ten minutes later This was followed by the smell of weed wafting through our bathroom air vents Not ideal   Comfy bed and lovey shower

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: The room was so cramped that there was no space between the bed end and the wall to be able to close the window blind An executive king room I do not think so The awful red marble in the bathrooms was like an autopsy had been carried out The blinds at the window once I had crawled across the bed to close them were filthy The room smelt musty There was no mirror in the room to dry one s hair by I had to guess what I looked like It was basically rubbish and I didn t want to stay for breakfast The reception staff had no idea of the local area and told me the road I was looking for was 11 minutes away It was across the road visible from the reception desk

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: We have stayed before at the property as the location is good However this time we were met at the reception desk by a very robotic receptionist whose English was not her first language No warmth or greeting just a list of the facilities including the fact that I had already been pre charged for the stay Usually I am asked whether I would like to pay immediately or after the stay I asked whether we could have a complimentary drink as is usual at the said hotel for Genius bookers A heated consultation with the other three receptionists ensued before we were told that this was not an option unless we joined the Best Western Hotel users club then we could have a complimentary drink By this time we were feeling annoyed and irritated by the receptionists attitude and lack of interpersonal skills so we just went to our rooms   We have stayed before at the property as the location is good

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Pictures didn t match the room we actually were put in fire alarm tests at 6 30am on a Sunday weren t exactly how I planned to wake up you could smell the drainage after using the shower or toilet in the bathroom overall was poor considering I took my girlfriend there as her first trip to london  The staff were really friendly and welcoming

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: the only room we could get unfortunately didn t have a window which was annoying but not the end of the world and to be fair we did know that before arriving at the property   lovely smart hotel and situated very close to Kilburn tube station which was really helpful for getting into London

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: When I went to check out there was a fire alarm malfunction which knocked out the computers The sole girl on reception did not have the password for the system No response to her phone calls for help Fortunately another staff member came in to work and helped This was 8 15 so there should have been more than one receptionist available for checking out I had to ask them to call me a taxi on their account as I was now going to be late for my meeting which I had planned to walk to When the taxi came he asked me whether I liked the hotel When I told him of my experience he told me that this happened frequently there and he often picked up unhappy guests who had requested a transfer Plus my shower was lukewarm there was no loo brush in the bathroom and the coffee was lukewarm too A very poor experience very disappointing   Convenient location

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: On opening the door to our room we were greeted with an overpowering smell of damp mouldy stench We opened the window to try and reduce this As the hotel is on a main London street the traffic outside was relentless and after half an hour sitting with the window open and the constant noise we realised that the stench was not going to go We went down to reception to ask if we could be moved to another room and were told that all rooms were fully booked but front of house would try to resolve something for us We went back to the room and sat in our coats with the windows open for another hour waiting to hear from reception but heard noting We thought we would have a hot drink whilst waiting this is when we discovered that one cup was clean and one cup has sugary residue in the bottom obviously it had been used and put back then had not been washed by house keeping staff when preparing the room Time to turn the kettle on this is when I turned on the socket to the kettle and my arm very slightly brushed the bedside wall light this was extremely loose and swung upside down obviously the cleaning staff must have known about this why wasn t if fixed before a customer had been put into that room I phoned reception to ask what they were actually doing and did not receive any productive input in fact they gave the feeling they had forgotten about us I had to suggest that if we could not be moved could someone at least come to the room with air fresheners and try to ascertain where the smell was coming from as up to then we had made one visit to reception two phone calls and yet not one member of staff had bothered to even view the problems with the room Eventually a member of staff turned up with one timed battery air freshener and a can of spray air freshener They agreed the room smell was putrid and overpowering and she was also shown the very loose bedside lamp   Bar and restaurant staff were friendly welcoming and professional Food in the restaurant was very well prepared and cooked beautifully

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: The amability of the staff At the reception Ravena and Adam were amazing and the cleaning personal was also extremely kind and helping The hotel is very easy to reach 1 min of walking distance from the tube station very quiet very clean As a single traveler for 2 nights this hotel is all you need I will definetly come back to this hotel for my next trips in London

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: On check in being a genuis customer i rang before hand to ask about free earlier check in when arrived this wasnt the case they didn t let me and the first lady on reception wasnt the most helpful Apart from that the receptionist staff were pleasant Silly to charge the 50 security when there is no mini bar in rooms anyway and it takes 5 days to be refunded This needs to be looked at   Great location and cheap to ride in taxis using uber to nearly everywhere no need for tube rides Great breakfast nice coffee shop restaurant Air con Definitely a plus

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: The room was a massive walk away from reception and had cobwebs room was ok size bathroom was like a fridge I hate to say this but the staff didn t really understand as much English as they should working in an English hotel We clicked yes to the que jump for tourist attractions but the staff didn t have a clue what we were talking about I m not sure whether it was the cleaning products or not but the hallways smelt funny too  The bed was super comfy

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: All good I Would stay there again   Nice Rooms bathrooms For the Price nicer than most bayswater Hyde park 3 accomodations Nieighborhood not a good hangout place but near to Transport and grocerystore and Starbucks Bar restaraunts right outside the door Rafkins is good and Luisa is very kind and nice Thank you Luisa

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: As mentioned   1st night had no aircon or phone in room working cold night 2nd day moved to another room liiked ok then at night could not sleep due to water boiler noise every half hour matter reported maintenance stated it was a water problem Had little rest had no choice as to vacate a day before and move into a Premiere Inn in order to get a good nights sleep before my return travel In all of the five days booked had little rest and had to leave a day before this was supposed to have been a celebration weekend Not happy at all

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Will be making a complaint water came through the bathroom light the solution was to wipe it up with tissue and because it stopped dripping that was the leak fixed As a gas engineer i was shocked at the lack of investigation to find the source the panel above the bathroom didnt get moved to see where it was coming from Both staffs english very poor and didnt understand what i was saying I over heard ot happened the previous day and also the room next door had the same problem so obviously lack of experience in this field to fix basic plumbing Also had a funny smell in the hall and bedroom   Nothing to like

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Bar closed early  Staff friendly Decent breakfast great transport links 24hour shop around corner Tesco and Starbucks across road Great value for money

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: I arrived at the hotel at 1 40pm and was told that I couldn t check in until 2pm the woman at the check in desk held firm even when I reminded her that 2pm was only 20mins away so I had to wait I got to the room to find that birds had built a nest in a vent in the wall evident from the amount of noise so I had to ask maintenance to come and clear the nest away they weren t surprised when I told them so this was clearly an ongoing issue The birds were already back in the vent again the next morning I had a shower in the morning and stepped out of the cubicle to find water pouring through the bathroom fan in the ceiling which luckily wasn t on otherwise it could have been extremely dangerous The water had soaked the bathroom and all the towels which I then tried to dry myself with before ringing reception again to sort out this problem All of these things happened within 18hrs so it didn t provide the best experience particularly taking into account the hotel price   The room had been recently renovated the bed was comfortable and the shower was hot

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Small rooms a bit of negotiation to get around the room especially with two of you but for the price in Central London this is only a minor issue Also a bit of dust here and there and marks to the walls but this is normal hotel wear and tear Also shower only luke warm didn t bother me but the bf likes a hot shower   Really comfy bed nice d cor lovely bathroom with a great selection of good quality toiletries Very efficient and polite staff on check in and check out Beautiful bar area and we loved the breakfast One of the best breakfast buffets we have seen Location great and the only hotel in London where it was quiet enough to sleep well even though on a main road Would stay again Please congratulate all of your staff on their professionalism especially the breakfast staff really on the ball cleaning and replenishing with great finesse speed and courtesy

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale

Full_Review: No windows in many rooms or at least cannot open those Too warm in the room no oxigen could not sleep well even furnitures are great and clean and comfortable My biggest problem was that cannot make any breeze in your room as only air condition system running which is not easy to setup As first time offered a room without window in the basement 2nd try was a room with window but to small max 8 m2 no possible to stay here even for 1 person No place for your stuff So the 3rd room was capable related to size comfort but again NO window so no fresh AIR   Close to Tube station and Paddington trainstation Easy to pop in to the city center and many shops arround Breakfast is great and Staff is very helpfull Thanks to Their help for having me better room after the first check which was inconvienient

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Booking com genius perks annoyed we didn t get our welcome drinks staff were awkward when we went to check in you had to leave your bags in the reception area right next to the front door they pre authorised my card but I wanted to pay with another and then still asked me to pay 50 security which they then said oh well we ve pre authorised that so I suppose we can leave it the worst thing is that we were on floor minus 1 the noise from the kitchen dining area was horrendous You could hear banging people up and down the stairs this was going on until at least 1am and at 6am you could hear it all again too Massive TV but no working freeview box   Beds were comfy location is fantastic for the value of the room we had Starbucks across the road literally 2minute walk to Kilburn Park underground station tea coffee in the room shower in the bathroom fantastic Free wifi

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale

Full_Review: The air con was tricky to get right but managed it eventually Our room 127 had no windows and was internal to the hotel which might seem to be a bit claustrophobic to some people hence the need to get the A c right   Stayed here for one night as we had to attend a birthday party nearby Very comfortable rooms and beds All modernised and well laid out Very helpful staff with things like booking taxis and extra amenities for the rooms Great value coffee house next door with cake and coffee for two for 8

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Unfortunetly the aircon combined with the noise from outside kept us awake most of the night providing a bad night sleep Maybe a good solution would be to double glase the windows Thank you  The staff was lovely specially the breakfast ladies that unfortunetly we didn t get their name But thanks to every one

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: The bed that was supposed to be kingside was infact two single beds pushed together Also the room was very small so you couldn t move around much without tripping over things We picked the excecuative room so thought we d have more space but didn t Also the shower was leaking in the bathroom so water kept going everywhere Breakfast was also misleading although it states continental breakfast in with the price for 10 it s actually cheaper not to pre buy breakfast and have a full English for around 5 7 pounds which they don t tell you The cleaning staff seemed a little abrupt with people which was disappointing and the waitresses at breakfast time   The reception staff were lovely and friendly

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Firstly hotel is trying to manipulate the room spec They offer standard room w o window as a cheapest option but even if you choose Executive room with king size bed you will learn that it can be blind room so small that you cannot fully open doors to bathroom cause they are blocked by the bed room 124 for example Extra 50 night is fee for king size bed as I learned from receptionist ROTFL As it occurred there are executive and executive rooms The true executive rooms are with window fridge and decent in size The other executive rooms have no window no fridge and are so small you cannot even enter bathroom No clue in what way they are assigned to guests Secondly heating in the rooms is not working and requires strong argue to make it operating After several trials central A C started to operate however due to broken temperature sensors it was switching on and off constantly with no possibility to heat the room decently Thirdly there was no possibility to take shower without flooding all bathroom as doors to the shower didn t close Fourthly rooms were generally dirty Windows in rooms could be opened as they are nailed to the wall room 115 and I suppose they were cleaned last time when Queen Victoria was ruling the UK In bathrooms you can find variety of life forms between tiles on walls and floor inside the sink in the shower Hotel offers black cups for do it yourself tea would be nice if they are washed when doing rooms In each of rooms we were the cups were dirty after the night before guests We washed them but let s not play the game it was an ugh experience Finally the card I used for booking com reservation has been charged for the stay without my acceptance On checkout it occurred payment was already done by night watch to speed up checkout   Localisation 5 minutes walk from subway station Decent breakfast

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Size and cleanliness of Room General state of Repair Cooked breakfast awful   Room Executive King Room 129 was cramped Walls dirty Toilet Roll Holder coming away from wall and what we thought was a bit of cake left behind by previous occupants because it was dry and exposed to elements was actually a complimentary cake The bed was comfortable enough I paid 5 extra for a full English Breakfast which turned out to be Turkey Rashers with a chicken sausage and beans which were sour because they had gone off Serving staff were nice and very apologetic though All in all a poor experience We won t be returning to that Hotel and since it was our first experience at a Best Western Hotel we are a bit dubious about trying another one

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: The cold room with cold air conditioning and when we called a member of staff to help the instructions were not clear regarding how to work it The staff member should have physically helped us with the air conditioning instead of giving my partner unclear instructions   The location was close to the station The pastries were nice

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Road noise unbearable Room was so small you could manoeuvre around the bed The reception staff asked me for photo ID and wanted a copy of it I refused They also wanted me to give them my credit card and take a 50 pound deposit from which if I did not use would be returned to me in a few days I refused No hot water in shower The lift was out of order Very disappointed with this booking   Close to tube

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Some top sheets on the bed were still stained The bathroom had a lot of dust around the skirting boards We tried to check in at 1pm but had to wait until 2pm I know that 2pm is a standard check in time but I have never had to wait at another hotel they usually accommodate I left bags with the reception and they were left in the main walkway that anyone would have access to The bar did not have coke or lemonade as the pump was broke there were no provisions in place for this like just buying some bottles   Location was convienent for where we were visiting

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: The room was very clean and the bed was very comfortable The hotel was overall very good all round No problems at all would definitely stay here again

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: The room was teeny tiny though I appreciate the price but for two we couldn t even open the door to the room without a struggle and both the tap and shower made a horric screeching sound when in use   The bed was super comfy and most of the staff were helpful polite and friendly Breakfast was also better than expected Clean rooms and modern twist with electronic notification board for room service etc that displasy outside the room

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: My room had a nasty odour especially the bathroom I did report it but my room was not deep cleaned as the odour was still there on my second night  Location Quiet facilities

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Staff tried to force us to move to Ealing Booked a Double Room received a Twin Blood over the curtains Couldn t even get by to other bed without climbing over one as beds were full breadth of room Rooms dirty  Location was ok although was in Kilburn Road rather than Maida Vale

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: After paying extra for an executive king room the lady in reception tried to give us a room in the basement with no window After returning to reception and arguing and told that there are no more rooms available we eventually were given the room we had booked With a window The shower was freezing in the morning and night at midday tho you could get a hot shower tho The staff in the restaurant were unhelpful and the continental breakfast was poor   Very clean facilities good location close to train and tube

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Nothing  Realy close to the underground Room was clean but a little small Realy gentle staff Easy to locate 10 minutes walk to Abbey Road plentiful and vegan friendly breakfast

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Room was tiny Shower took ages to work out and heat up Tv no reception Tap very loose Woken up by noises from other rooms  Bed was very nice and big

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: This Hotel is a disaster and I will NEVER stay again they made such a mess of charging me and eventually charged me TWICE and it took a lot of emails to get it reimbursed   Not a lot

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: Two complaints didn t like having to constantly re enter the wifi codes which changed daily Also the room would sometimes get a little hot and stuffy but the windows are bolted closed But these were small problems   Was really pleased overall and highly recommend this hotel Love the neighborhood the local pubs the cafe on the ground floor the Tesco across the street And was reasonably priced and still relatively central

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: The check in system was down when we first arrived there was no back up so there was about 20 people waiting no comfort or refreshments provided until one of the other guests kicked up To make matters worse the girl behind the desk was rude passive aggressive and had little sympathy The man who looked like he was ment to be in charge just flapped through the whole situation and in the end we ended up being late for our appointment   Free breakfast was a great addition room was lovely and clean Great location

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: On a prior occasion there was no hot water at the hotel Promised a call back from the manager which I didn t get On my last visit there was another maintenance issue that caused a broken nights sleep The manager ignored me when I brought it up on check out walked off and let his staff take the flack   All Restaurant and some Front of house staff are great Food is good too

Hotel_Name: BEST WESTERN Maitrise Hotel Maida Vale
Full_Review: The room was freezing the fridge had mould and the bed was very hard Also the management dont allow their staff to sit down at the recption on a night shift they are kept standing for hours through the night i found that absolutley horrid and cruel   The friendly reception he was very nice and polite
